text:
Title: Samsung galaxy ear buds PRO Review: Well. I really wanted to love these... but there a few things...
PROS
Super easy to connect to ALMOST any thing that has blue tooth
Sound is surprisingly good
They seem to charge quickly and keep a charge for a fair amount of time
The storage and charging box is small - but gets lost in the bottom of your purse
CONS
The tips they send with the ear buds are GARBAGE - in order to really use these you are going to need to invest in some memory foam type tips
The controls are spotty and sometimes don't work
The 'noise canceling' aspect doesn't really function - somewhat better with better foam tips
***********
I purchased these for travel - but haven't traveled with them yet. I hope I can find some good tips - apparently I need a larger memory foam tip than is out there. Eh.
Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful. I feel that a 3 1/2 star rating would be better, I did generously give them 4. Time will tell.

Title: Soft Fabric
Review: When I first opened this, I thought that there was no way that the XL would fit my size 16 body. However, it does stretch quite a bit and I was able to fit into it. It's not a flattering look by itself for someone my age, but I could definitely wear it underneath something. The description says it has a shelf support, but there's really no support at all. The fabric is soft. I would like something a little longer, but the length is adequate. I wouldn't want anything shorter.

Title: Big, takes up more space than the passport by itself. Honest review.
Review: A little too bulky for my taste I will debate on whether or not this is convenient after some time because I do not like having bulky things with me when I travel.

Title: Nice moisturizer, small jar, high price
Review: From a size perspective, this is a great little jar of moisturizer to keep in your pocket or purse to have with you at work, at the store or while traveling. The moisturizer is really nice, a little thick and takes a while to absorb, but afterwards my skin feels super soft. I am deducting a star, however, because of the price. I mean for $52 (the current price while I am writing this) is crazy high for what you get. I have lower priced moisturizers at home which work just as well , come in a much larger size and cost less. If it's only the portability you are looking at than this is a great little jar of moisturizer. Otherwise, shop around a little.

Title: bean bag lap roll
Review: My 82 year old mom just loves this.  It replaces an old one she's had for many year before it finally quit.  She chose the black color - I was surprised by that, but she chose it!  It's soft and the beans allow her to settle her note pad or whatever she is looking at in her lap.  It's small enough to be thrown in a bag for travel and she uses as a neck pillow when she feels like it.  All good in my opinion!  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: A face wash where I must avoid the eye area is not for me; also it does not smell so good Review: When I selected this product, I originally thought this was a face cream (as in moisturizer). However, it's a cleanser.

This face wash is definitely not for me. A couple of times on the back of the tube it warns about avoiding the delicate eye area or any contact with the eyes. Yet it also says it is a gentle cleanser and effectively removes traces of makeup. I use makeup on my entire face, so a face wash that should not be used in the eye area is not very useful for me.

I did try this on the rest of my face and neck. A small amount of product (the size of half of a dime) lathers up very well. The wash feels very slick / slippery. I did not care for the smell. After rinsing off, I did feel cleansed and my skin felt soft. If this skin care cleanser was safe to use in the eye area, I would have rated this 4 stars (taking off points for smell and slickness). Since this is a face and neck cleanser, it must be okay to use on the entire face in my opinion. For that reason only, I dislike this skin care product and would never purchase it.

Title: Massive shrinkage for navy blue color
Review: I purchased the men’s XL for my son. During a cold water wash and low heat dry, it shrunk to a women’s medium size. Irks me a tad, but I’ll be able to at least keep it for myself.

Title: Barely there cream with a subtle lavender scent; left my face smooth
Review: This cream is extremely lightweight. It is also almost scentless. Until I put this on my face, I could barely smell any lavendar; however, there is just a hint of lavendar.  Although, this left my face smooth, I prefer a more intense scent and a heavier cream. This did nothing for my acne scars but I do like how my skin feels soft after applying this. This cream is light enough for summer. In summary, this is not for me but it is not bad either.

Title: Works fine, but feels cheap
Review: The hub itself works fine, but my issues are with how cheap it feels. It is very light and feels plastic-y. When you push the buttons by the ports, you can hear the hollowness inside the unit. Additionally, there are no rubber feet on the bottom, so it slides around on my wooden desk. And lastly, it is a fingerprint magnet. The entire thing has a glossy finish, so it was covered in fingerprints after just a day or two.

Title: Love these leggings!
Review: I am 5'7", about 160 lbs and the large fits me great. Long enough for me, higher waist and it really does pull the tummy in. Material is soft and super stretchy, these are great for yoga or working out, or more so just to wear with a tunic blouse. I really like these and have already ordered a second pair. Highly recommend!

Review: It works extremely well.  It was a gift, and I love it!

Title: Decorative
Review: This apron is beautiful, but it's really more decorative than functional. I am a longtime fan of Vera Bradley and this one was kind of a let down. The fabric is gorgeous. It's a vibrant print. However, it's just cotton fabric. It seems to be the same type of fabric that they use with their face masks except it's a single layer not double. (I should know because I bought a lot of their face masks during the past year!). I have 4 non-Vera aprons hanging in my kitchen. All of them are a thicker more durable fabric. Some of them seem to be canvas or something similar. I think that some kitchen spills could easily seep through the fabric which defeats the purpose of wearing the apron in the first place. I was excited that VB has added some new products to their line, but I think this one needs to be reconsidered or at least tweaked.

Title: Just Fine Review: I have had this sticker on my tumbler for about 3 months now. It is fine. I hand wash it and don’t submerge it in water for very long. It is sticking fine. The feet around the claws sometimes feel like they are shifting around, but they aren’t peeling up yet.
Really, my only complaint about this sticker is quality for the price. The sticker isn’t packaged at all. Just cut vinyl on contact paper. You’ll have to apply the sticker yourself, which is fine. But the sticker itself is just a standard cut vinyl that anyone could do with their Cricut machine. It makes for a very disappointing gift.

I really like the way my skin has been looking since I have been using it daily for a little over 3 weeks. My 60 year old skin has a youthful, healthy glow and feels soft and smooth and healthy. Highly recommend this for anyone looking to add a boost to your normal skin care routine!

Review: I purchased 4 different types to try.  So far this one is my least favorite.  It is sort of tinted... a peachy color. As a ridge filler it did very little - I would say about a 2 out of 4.  Another issue.  However, so far, none of them are scoring very high in the ridge filling department.  You do need 2 coats at the minimum.

Title: Lifted the front of my hair, but it’s a bit drying. Review: I’m growing My dyed hair out after years and years of coloring and a blonde weave. My hair has a slight curl in some places, and too much hot hair dryers and irons I noticed has broken my hair off in places!
At first when I used this, lift me up, I sprayed this on the roots of my hair all over. I don’t wear big hair, but dying my hair gave my hair more body , as it expands the cuticle of the hair and seems to give body to your hair!
After using this I notice it did give more body at the roots but dried my hair.
I have used this at different times just to lift my long hair that comes over one side in the front.
It works well, but I also use a purple mouse on my silver roots that does the same thing
, and does not dry my hair. Using, lift me up, I don’t think made my hair look any thicker.

I think this pricey.

Title: Perfectly fitting, great quality!
Review: These are comfortable and fit me well (I am a size 10 and I got a large as I am 5'8"). I really don't care for the V waistband and normally would not have worn these, but they surprisingly don't make any rolls of flesh poke through (as I was afraid of happening). They hug my body snugly, but not overly tight and they are very flattering. Soft and well made, these are a great athletic pant made for either working out or, as I usually do, for wearing under a long tunic top. I have never worn Halina fashions before, but I am now seeking out alternate colors to help supplement my fall/winter wardrobe.

I have tried this serum for a couple of days and I just can't get past the smell. The smell doesn't last after putting it on, but it's so strong smelling that I don't even want to put it on.

Title: nail polish pump
Review: I purchased these to replace one I've had for many years.  The spring finally gave out on my old one.  The old one was taller and straight.  These are more bulb-esik - so they are more stable.  The opening is wide enough to pour directly into the bottle, however, they did provide a tiny funnel.  It was so small I wasn't sure it would even stay on the bottle, but it just does.  Use if you like!  It pumps beautifully and works exactly as it should.  You get 2 bottles, 1 funnel and some stickers if you'd like to mark the bottles. I don't use the stickers.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: For a group of girls.
Review: It was for a group of 6th grade girls, so they could match. They told me that they really liked the top.

Title: Runs small, not sewed well.. Review: This jumpsuit is not black, but has a black background with a pattern of red, and white stripes.
Has loop holes for the tie around the waist.

There is a hidden zipper in the back that is Hard to Unzip in certain places, but once I got into this, My husband could not get the zipper back down! Don’t ask, I had to wiggle my way out of this jumpsuit.

This is supose to be a Large, and I could barely get it on, or Off.
I’m 5’3 , 130 lbs..I wear size 8 to a 10 in jeans, & a medium in the top.

The Legs where Too Short without shoes on. I looked like I was going to a flood.
The waist was snug, around the tummy it was tight.has side pockets. .The top part was ok..
The bottom of the legs were not sewed well they were uneven, and puckered.

The material is Cheesy, as the Sewing is also.
The material is Not a good Quality.

Title: The item fits, however a little too tight. ...
Review: The item fits, however a little too tight. The case interferes with tap games that uses the bottom of the screen, and trying to remove the case to play games properly was so strenuous, it felt as if I could crack the screen in attempts to remove it. Finally did, but wouldn't be placing it back in.

Title: battery operated warming jacket
Review: My husband is a 5x and the 5x fit him like a glove - not too snug - but cozy.  The battery unit charged up fairly quickly - however - they power is a bit short running - 2 1/2 hours on high.  There are 3 warming settings - high - medium and low.  The REAL bummer is that you apparently cannot wash this jacket!  For nearly two hundred dollars and you cannot wash it?  I am afraid that while it sounds really cool to have a warming jacket - as my husband was really looking forward to - it loses some of that luster when you realize that it will be dirty (100% cotton) and you will not be able to safely wash it.  Eh.  He should have more carefully read the ad page - there is not a single mention of cleaning - but he's a dude and cleaning wasn't the top of his list. In the end he decided to return it. Probably a good choice.

Title: OPI ridge filler
Review: Generally speaking I love OPI products, but this ridge filler wasn't my fav.  It's a pasty white and matte.  I wish it were a more of a neutral color.  It did serve as a ridge filler, but not until it was about 3 coats.  Eh.  I tossed it.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Not the easiest to set up, I still need to figure it out completely
Review: Usually I am pretty tech savvy, but some of this I couldn't figure out (and the TrackR help on line doesn't seem to have the answer). I wanted this because of Alexa capabilities. I planned to use this on my keys. Instructions told me to set it up with my cell phone, so I figured I needed to do that first. I finally connected my phone to my Ipad TrackR app. Of course, I got Alexa easily to find my phone (and ring it). However, when I tried to use find my phone on my Ipad it rang my Ipad (not my phone) so, I will now have to go back to square one with that. But, again, my original intent was to use with my keys. I did get that to work with my ipad, but I wanted Alexa to do it as well. I cannot get Alexa to find my keys with the TrackR device attached, only my Ipad can do it. I will do some additional work on this when I have time. I wanted Alexa to find my keys, not my Ipad. Oh well, so much for technology.

Review: Glows great , looks good in reg light too , downside it takes forever to dry .. like forever ! Then smears if not dry and like all glitter polish ... hard to get off!

Bottom line is, it is very easy to get your finger print on the adhesive side - even solutions cannot guarantee that - unless you are really skilled. Maybe I can do better with a second film, but alas, the one I bought is definitely wasted ....

Review: I'm not sure if this is a packaging issue or if they changed the sizes but honestly this just felt way too small to be an XL the sizing is pretty much Asian sizes again nothing wrong with that as long as they let us know in the product description that it is smaller than expected, specially I could tell the sizes were smaller because of the arm fit not at all as described, I'm unsure where I put it so as to take a picture but I will look for it and see if I can return it soon.

Title: Beautiful- cover is a little slick but it has a handle.
Review: Much better than an average cover. A LOT better than the Kindle Covers and less expensive too.

Title: Didn't last long
Review: Bought these to charge my phone, but they didn't last long. One quit charging right away and the other two only lasted a little longer.

Title: High priced but nice!
Review: This is a nice facial moisturizing/care set. It consists of a cleanser, a serum and a moisturizer. The cleanser is very gentle on my skin (non-exfoliating) and the serum is light and absorbs quickly. The moisturizer goes on thicker but also absorbs quickly. After using this set for about 3 weeks now several times a week, I honestly can say I really like these products. The light orange fragrance does nothing to disrupt any other fragrances you might be wearing and smells very refreshing. The fact that this contains vitamin C  helps to repair and maintain my 60 something year old skin. I am deducting one star simply because of the price. I think you can do better buying products separately for a lesser cost. This does come in a nice set, though, and would make an impressive gift for someone.

Review: I ordered it a little big: I wear multiple clothes under: gives me the room I needed: good jacket: keeps you warm when you're out: nice price

Title: I really like this collagen serum!
Review: Really nice serum. I have been using this now almost exclusively for the last few weeks. It goes on easily and is absorbed quickly into my skin. Contains collagen and vitamin E which my aging skin really needs. I have noticed my skin looking plumper and brighter since using it. I will be buying more. Highly recommend!

Review: I like the print on this cover and it works 'ok' as a stand.  It does fit perfectly as a cover.

Title: Not worth the $60
Review: Dont get me wrong. Theyre nice. They add height. They look good, they feel... okay. But theyre just cheap. The soles especially show this. Theres no traction, no grooves. These are NOT the shoe to wear out when its icey, you'll break a limb. I guarentee they'll break in a month if you wear them out regularly.

Title: Smaller than I expected, but fine.
Review: They are too small for my husband to use as a nose & mouth covering for CVD-19, so we’ll use them folded to line other masks 😷  But quality wise they wash up well, and are fine for a traditional handkerchief.

Title: Great shampoo, my new favorite!
Review: I am always in the market for a quality sulfate free shampoo to help me prolong my salon keratin treatments. I really like this Moroccan Argan oil shampoo. It smells great, lathers well and my hair remains smooth, soft and frizz free. I liked it so much I also ordered the same brand conditioner and I know this will now be my regular shampoo routine. For the price, I feel I am getting a salon quality product at a lot less than my regular products. Highly recommend!

Review: I gave this to husband as gift but 2 days later strap broke!!! Cheap would not purchase!

Title: So easy to use
Review: I bought this for home because I have one at work. Absolutely love it

Title: I use it every day & love it! Review: This is by far the best lighted, magnifying mirror I have ever purchased.

I love that you can charge it versus using batteries & the charge really lasts.

If you are looking for a great little lighted/magnifying mirror, I highly recommend this one.

Title: Don't like this anymore since it has been changed.
Review: I agree with the other recent 1 star reviews, something has been changed with this perfume oil. I have purchased this before a few years ago and I loved it.  I decided to buy it again since it used to be a great product and now the scent is completely different. I don't even know how to describe it, but it's not good at all and it is really weak. There are other recent good reviews which leads me to believe that the formula must have been changed recently or something like that and some sellers may have old stock of it. My bottle came with the new design and full label on it instead of the older design that had the painted feathers on the bottle.

Title: Get it
Review: I was concerned about how this would look on my Milk Chocolate complexion but it’s So Pretty!!! Perfect color to wear all year around. Neutral with a punch!! I Love it. Base coat, one coat, 2 top coat layers is how I like mine. Very easy to apply! Great brush! Looking forward to buying other colors!

Title: Broken

Two of them are usable, but I'm always nervous when I squeeze them that they will break, too. They're definitely not well made.

Title: Great product for my wavy crazy hair!
Review: This a great leave in conditioning product for my hair. I have naturally wavy hair and try to get keratin treatments every couple of months to keep my hair under control. I had doubts about this product wondering how a $20 product could have any impact. Boy was I surprised the first time I used it. First it applies lightly and does not weigh down your hair or make it greasy. Second, it made my hair super soft and shiny. Third, my frizzing and waves seemed to be more under control after using this. I absolutely recommend this to anyone with hair like mine that is looking for a salon finish on unruly hair!!

Title: Pretty but not practical!
Review: This was a super cute bikini but it was in no way practical. You would look great in photos and that is about it! Don't try to swim in it or anything else as there is absolutely no support in the bra and you will end up falling out!

Title: Cheaper than a plastic surgeon
Review: I have been using the Olay Anti-Aging protocol for just about a month. I admit I do see a difference in my skin. I am 53 years old and have been finding my skin getting drier and drier as I age. The protocol system is complete and is beginning to restore the moisture and suppleness of my skin. I particularly like the impact the Eye Restoration Complex has had on the dark circles and crows feet which had been surrounding my eyes. I have noticed that minor wrinkles are beginning to diminish. The only reason I didn't rate this product 5 stars is because I think it is very pricey for what you get. I also have used the Biomedic line of products in the past and have found them to be even more effective. For a product sold by Oil of Olay to cost over $60 seems unreasonable, as I see O of O to be more of a drug store/ supermarket product and shouldn't warrant the price. If Amazon is offering rebates or specials on this product, then definitely buy, buy, buy.

Title: Need a better design.
Review: This is a long wallet, not like it shows in the picture. The spaces that hold each credit card is too tight. The cards are hard to put in and take out..especially on the top because in the corners, the zipper is too close so you end up scratching the card across the zipper. The only way to avoid that is to fold the zipper back as you remove/put in the card. The inner zipper that holds the coins was very hard to open so I kept opening and closing it to loosen it and it moved more smoothly after that. I guess it might be an ok wallet if you dont need to use the top card slots. It was nice to hold though.

Title: This is a glittery pressed powder that did not highlight to me and is more for a teenager or young adult
Review: This is all light shimmer and no highlight. I could barely see this on my face and when I got close to the mirror, all I saw were sparkles.  I'm an older woman and this is really more for a teenager or young adult. It did absolutely nothing to highlight my face.

Title: It is not the quality
Review: I expect better shoes from Sketchers, which I actually buy for all my sandals. The shoelaces are designed short so you can not tie them up. This should be told in the advertising, I will buy long laces for this shoe. I will keep the shoe but it is not as I expected from one of my favorite companies.

Title: Great lightweight tint
Review: These sticks have color that is really a "tint" which is good.  It's easier to apply that way.  The cherry gives you a nice dark pinky tint, looks nice.  The lighter colors tend to wash out my lips, which I don't really care for.  Also you should know there is a slight cherry odor, but not really a taste.  In fact, it sort of reminds me of the "tinker bell" glosses you got when you were a preteen years ago.  That's gotta date me!  Hope this helps!

Title: Adorable baby shark clips that hold a wisp of hair; finish wears off easily Review: These clips are adorable and perfect for a baby girl or a pet that has just been to the groomer. There are eight baby shark clips in various colors. They have a shimmery finish to them. They hold like bobby pins but there is a trick to opening them (see photo). One arm has to be bent in the opposite direction to open, then it can be slipped over just a tiny bit of hair and then bent in the opposite direction to close. 

The biggest negative is that the finish wears off relatively easily. I was just trying these on my cat (see photo) and part of the finish came off two of them as can be seen in one of my pictures.

At the current price of $7.99, they come to a competitively priced $1 each. If the finish did not wear off, I would have rated this 5 stars.

Title: BEWARE!!!!!.......DO NOT BUY!!!!!!.....
Review: DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!Color is coming off after less than 1 month of very little use

Title: Perfect
Review: Very happy with our purchase and thank you!!!

Title: Compact, Reliable
Review: Previously I was using another make of a 10-port hub and it worked okay, but it did not support USB 3.1, as this does.  Also, it had a very distracting strip of blue light showing that it was powered on.  This one has a tiny "pilot" light by each USB outlet, that lights up when that port is active.  I like that much better, as you can tell which ports are active.  Also everything plugs in vertically; my other hub had only 2 vertical ports and the remainder came out of 2 sides.  The side ports did make the cables a little neater, as they laid flat, whereas with this hub they stick straight up and don't look quite as nice.  The hub is compact, better than the older bulkier one that I was using.  You can never have too many USB ports and I am already using 8 of the 10 available, even though my computer is equipped with several also.  Just about every device these days is USB or wireless.  Nothing to do for set-up.  Just plug it in and use it.  Of course being a powered hub, you do need an available electrical outlet, which could be a downside, but it does ensure you are going to have the power you need to drive your USB devices.

Title: Was Hopeful.
Review: $12 to determine that it wasn’t my Remote that wasn’t working but my Soundbar. I was so hopeful the new Remote would work.

Title: Ok quality
Review: The router’s quality is ok. Not the best router I have. It’s cheaply made and it makes my wifi pretty slow. And it is also pretty hard to install and I had to call technical support. And the support team seems to have language barrier too. Overall. I’m not impressed

Title: Disappointed
Review: I have several pairs of regular binoculars. What piqued my interest with these is that the description said they had night vision capability. After they arrived I was disappointed to learn that they did not have night vision but rather low light vision. Since then, the product description has been changed and no longer says night vision. Had I known that in the beginning, I would not have ordered these because I don't need another pair of traditional binoculars. As far as performance, they're fine as regular binoculars. The low light vision is fine, but not any different than what I have with my other binoculars.

Review: Comfortable in the ear, microphone is "okay"... I use it for a handsfree option that doesn't have to be charged.  I will update if there are any wear/life or other issues.  Arrived quickly (I have Prime) and well packaged.

Title: Really nice back pack, holds it all
Review: Perfect backpack for me to use with my 15" laptop. Great for me when I am traveling for business (couple of times a month) to hold everything I need to bring on board the plane. Attractive, well made, plenty of areas to back and zip in things you need. I can even bring a spare set of clothes to have for an emergency (if my luggage gets lost). Great price, too. Highly recommend for the student or business person in your life.

It also has a cinch cord at the base to pull this tighter around one's head. Unfortunately, their large size is very tight on my small head. I take a size small in a hat and this cap is too tight. I love that on these cold winter mornings (it's been in the 30-40's most days in the last few months in Northern Florida), this hat Is great. I keep the top and sides of my head cozy warm. If I need to, I can even move it down to cover my ears. I love how soft it is and it looks great on. Highly recommend for either a man or a woman as either way, it is a great winter hat.

The quality of the fabric is good, but this shirt needs to be longer for the larger sizes. If you are 5'10" and above I would not recommend.

Title: I really like this top!
Review: This is a super cute tunic top. I got a size large (my usual size) and it fits great. Nice length, not too big. The 3/4 length sleeve makes it great to wear on cooler evenings in the summer. Looks great with a pair of white leggings. I've received a lot of compliments while wearing. Highly recommend!.

Title: Dainty

The pictures are misleading because they are greatly enlarged and show the details well, but in person you really can't see them. I think it is more appropriate to market this as a stackable ring, not as a wedding one. With all that aside, it is pretty. My 17 year old daughter really likes it. It is a good piece of jewelry for her because it is simple and dainty.

Title: Love the spray action but it is hard to see level of contents & bottles smell Review: I love the colors of these three bottles and the size. The spray action is excellent as well. The problem I have with them is that it is very difficult for me to see the liquid level in the bottle, expecially with the blue bottle. There is an ML measure on the side but that and the "window" is the same color as the bottle. The "window" should have been clear with the measurements written in black. In addition, the bottles have a smell to them; however, a little lemon and water should take care of that.

This is perfect for mixing perfume or essential oils with a carrier oil. It is also good to use to spray vinegar on small items that have to be cleaned, etc.

At the current price of $11.99 plus 5% off, these are a bit pricey but still competitive.

PS All lint and pet hair easily sticks to the outside and inside of the silicone bottles; this is a negative of tacky silicone.

Title: shower tabs
Review: These are so awesome if you have a cold, or just want a spa like experience.  The hot water of the shower causes the aroma to float up to you and all you have to do is breath.  I have a bench in my shower so I can sit and let the water hit the tablet and works sort of like a steam shower.  The mentol helps to make your nasal passages feel more clear when you have a cold.  Although, I really love these even when I don't have a cold and want a spa like experience.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Remember to cut tip before using; measurements in ML & are impossible to see Review: There are four angled plastic bottles in this set. The measurements on the side go from 140 from 140  to 260 ml in 40 ml increments. There are no ounces listed and the increments that are listed are impossible to read. Based on Dr. Google, 260 ml equals 8.792 fluid ounces. So these bottles hold a little over 8 ounces.

I needed a strong scissor to cut the top tip off. Do remember to do that before using because otherwise the liquid will spill out the sides during squeezing.

Overall, I am not impressed with these and would not order them again. They are just okay but they do work as designed. The current price of $4.50 comes to $1.13 per bottle.

Even though this is considered a kid's set, it's an awesome kid's set and I use it just as much as my kids.

The slides can be a pain sometimes because a slight bump on the table will move it. So long as there's no sudden jolt, though, it should be fine.

Title: Bare bones masks; elastic is not adjustable; price is right Review: There were four of these masks in the package I received but apparently only three are supposed to be in the package unless the Amazon description is wrong.

The masks are thin and not really padded much. They do block out the light. My biggest complaint is the flimsy elastic. The elastic is not adjustable, so the mask does pull a little around the eyes.

These masks do work but they are not high end and are not the quality of mask I gravitate towards. At the current price of $9.95 it comes to $3.32 each or $2.49 if one receives four masks.

The plastic is thin and transparent so there is no problem with them when they wear them in preschool and 1st grade classes. And, the best part of all, they want to wear them (unlike the paper ones). They love the design and the colors and have often fought over which one they will wear for that day. Title: My 3rd + 4th sets of TSLA leggins Review: I am 5'1" and 105lbs, 24" waist 33" hips, ordered an XS.

This fit more tightly than my other pair of leggings with a pocket at the waist rather than on the leg, kind of like a compression legging, but both styles are very comfortable. They smelled a little weird out of the bag so I threw them in the wash/dry and tried them on - good fit. They are more what I would call a mid rise, coming 2.5" below my true waist. Still a comfortable rise for me. I also own a pair of TSLA XS black fleece leggings. All four leggings are squat proof and pass a flash photo test (that is, you can't see my underwear if I take a photo with the flash). I keep coming back to this brand because it's so hard to find nice, affordable leggings especially in small sizes. I wore these leggings on two 1.5 mile long walks in the heat and stayed comfortable, so I would say they are moisture wicking and good to work out in. Whether or not they are good for runs probably depends on how they fit you as you really do not want to run in leggings if there is any chaffing at all or any other fit issue. They do have flat seams that are good for running.

Title: Disposable – this brush won’t last because the bristles fall out at every use
Review: The brush feels okay in my hands and brushes well but leaves static cling behind in cold weather with low humidity. However, the moment I used this, the bristles started to fall out. Every single time I rubbed my hand on the brush, more bristles would fall out. My opinion is to avoid this. It will probably last several weeks but it is certainly not worth the $29.95 price they are asking.  I would consider this brush disposable and any price more than $1 is robbery as this will have to be thrown out soon.

Title: Extremely Thick Cream Leaves Greasy Film Review: This Amazon Brand SOLIMO DRY SKIN CREAM (Fragrance free, Paraben free, Phthalate free, 16 Ounces) is an extremely thick cream that contains petrolatum , mineral oil, and lanolin, among other things. (Petrolatum is the main ingredient in both Vaseline and Aquaphor.) Because it’s so thick, the cream needs to be rubbed in--it isn’t easily absorbed into your skin.

After it’s rubbed in, the cream leaves a greasy film atop your skin. If you apply the cream to your hands, you will want to wipe off the residue. Otherwise you will transfer the film to keyboards, touchscreens, kitchen utensils, or anything else that you touch, for quite a while. If you apply the cream to your body, you will want to wear some sort of clothing over it to avoid transfer.

The cream is white, and totally fragrance free. The big 16-ounce jar will last a long time. I think that the product is best used as a night cream on dry feet, arms, or legs (covered by sleepwear). However, I prefer dry skin creams that are much more easily and quickly absorbed.

Title: Looks expensive Review: These are very nice looking earrings. They actually look expensive. I will be wearing them with a nice necklace.

I can’t say if they will tarnish or change colors. I haven’t had them long enough or worn them much. I wouldn’t wear them in the shower or while applying hair products.

Review: Not sure if it's the fault of the phones or my iPad, but I have yet to get them to connect to my iPad.  They connect to my iPhone no problem, but I didn't buy them to use with my phone, which has an earphone jack.  I bought them for the iPad, which doesn't.

Title: Lined with lies Review: I apologize in advance for the dusty condition of my mirror.
I ordered these knowing they wouldn’t be warm but expected a tad more than what I got. They’re one step up from an under armour material. It’s lined with literally nothing. It’s one piece of fabric, not even doubled. You can see through it when it’s stretched, in one of my pics, my dark panty line!!! Other than the false advertisement, it’s a pretty good pair of regular leggings. Kinda soft in the one rectangular piece on the side of the right leg ONLY. These might do a decent job in South Louisiana where it doesn’t snow but other than the South, good luck.
There is a phone pocket on each leg and they are pretty comfortable and stretchy so I gave it one extra star.
I ordered a small. I’m size 3-5 jeans, 5’2’’ and 123 pounds. As you can see, round booty and these fit great. Not too long for my legs either.

Title: Sad Fit Review: Picture clearly shows knee length..
this was T-shirt length...and it will not cover my butt! BTW. I'm 5' 5", and under 100lbs!!
Ordered XL , barely makes it past wasteline.

Title: Great tv it’s just too wide to fit on the chest I was going to set it on
Review: I  returned it because it was too wide for the chest I was going to set it on….

Title: Glides through my hair wet or dry but is not anti-static Review: I have short to medium length fine curly hair. This brush glides through my hair wet or dry. However, it is not anti-static. In addition, the current price of $13.99 is too expensive for this, especially since it is cheaply made. I can get a brush like this for $4 at my local store.

I like this as a regular brush only--forget the claims.

Title: Works Great
Review: My son is very happy with his charger ...works great with the Garmin that he got for Christmas

Title: Waste of money
Review: They come unraveled easily when trying to use them as a tie to hang up cables and leads. They are great if you just want to use them as a wrap, but to try and hang anything from the D ring is pointless as the Velcro comes undone. Waste of money.

Title: cucumber + lemon = yuk
Review: I do like many of the everyone soap varieties. I saw this one for about half the price of the others so i gave it a try.  Yes, the smell of cucumber and lemon is in fact as bad as you think. Yuck.

Title: One Star
Review: I can't say much because it won't even open....! Odd....

Title: Description of pulse oxygen measuring isn't complete Review: Not what I expected... From the description I thought I would get all day pulse oxygen measuring however it will only measure during sleep or for altitude acclimation. Battery life is very good, the monochrome screen is OK.

I prefer a color screen and all day pulse oxygen measuring.

Decent but not for me.

Title: tankini set
Review: Sizing is WAAAY off.  But according to their sizing info, this SHOULD have worked.  Eh.  I knew it ran small.. but this is ridiculous.The 3x (thats right TRIPLE X) was too small for my neighbor who is about a size 8.  SUPER cheap too.  I put in the donation bag - not worth the return hassle.  Listen, it was cheap.  You get what you pay for.  In this case... not enough.  I would say - PASS on this unless you are a size 2. Meh.

Title: I guess I'm not ready for a smart house. Review: Kinda creepy that this is always listening for you to speak its name. Ended up unplugging it.
I guess I'm not ready for a smart house.

Title: Nice
Review: Cute, unique, roomy, small handbag. It barely fit my iPhone XR though.

Title: Nice
Review: A little tight, but once I wear them more, I will break them in. Beautiful and exactly what I pictured.

Title: I was very disappointed that the bracelet looked nothing like the picture shown
Review: this was purchased as a gift. I  was very disappointed that the bracelet looked nothing like the picture shown.  The tone was mostly grey and tan instead of coral and rose.

Title: One more gadget to be obsessed with
Review: Other than the GPS absolute NONSENSE for tech obsessed people who are in constant need of affirmation.  Clunky bulky and just plain ugly but hey seems we have to be obsessed with some sort of device throughout the day

Title: Smells heavenly, lathers well, & leaves hair clean but packaging is dangerous
Review: I love the fragrance of this shampoo and how well it lathers. It also cleaned my hair exceptionally well and did not weigh down my curls too much.  The NEGATIVE is that this is packaged like an avocado juice drink and someone who cannot read or quickly reads the label, might think it is safe to consume. To me this is very dangerous. I have seen many times in stores where products that are packaged like food are put in the food aisle by accident and there are people who just look at picture and think it is a drink. This is the only reason I rated this 3 stars. If it was packaged like a shampoo, it would have gotten 5 stars from me.

Title: Runs very small, order a full size up Review: Very cute but runs very small.
I wear 8 1/2 to 9 & bought the 9. It was WAY to small!!!

Title: Gorgeous shower caps but not adult size; these do not stay put on my small head
Review: There are four double-layer shower caps in this set. They are absolutely gorgeous to me. Unfortunately, they do not fit my small head. They do not stay put at all because they are more kid-sized. The current price of $9.99 is excellent for this as it comes to $2.50 each. Unfortunately, these are being marketed as adult caps. If they were listed as kid-sized caps, I would have given them 5 stars. I cannot use these.

Title: Too small for anyone with curves. Also the skirt or lower part of the dress looks different from the picture
Review: This did not fit me at all and did not look like the picture that much. It is very pretty but it was ultra tight even though I ordered a size XL it felt like an M no kidding it was superrrr tight and small I would recommend if you don't mind that it's a little different from the bottom part and also if you are more on the petite side of things, otherwise just don't even try it. My boobs barely fit in here and definitely did not cover my curvy body.

Title: Gyp
Review: Absolutely no value for money here. Want your humidor to be at the correct humidity? Fill a shot glass with distilled water and place it in your humidor. In a few days you'll be between 64 and 74 rather than buying this expensive nonsense

Title: Beard trimmer Review: Husband uses this trimmer to fine tune his mustache and sides of his beard (check and neck area). He reports it works perfectly and he takes it with him as he travels a lot. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: 6/19/2017.... After a few months of use, the trimmer began actually cutting my husband's face! It has been carefully cleaning and stored, so I am not certain what has happened, but I am forced to update my review with this information and reduce our stars. We threw the clipper away and will try a different one for the close trimming he likes to do.

Title: Not a lightening charger
Review: Just got this yesterday night and plugged iPhone 12 into charge around 10pm. Didn’t fully charge to 100% till after 5 am and my phone was at 64% when I plugged it in to charge. Cord length is fabulous and it did charge but don’t expect in a few hrs to fully charge your phone. It’s good enough for what I need.

Title: This is the size of one Mini Babybel cheese; it’s super tiny but smells nice & moisturizes well
Review: This is the size of one Mini Babybel cheese. It is super tiny. It works by melting with the heat of one's hands. It has a nice lavender fragrance but is a bit oily. It is hydrating but I do not care for the greasy feel or the exorbitant $22 price tag for such a small amount.

Title: Arrived with broken pump on one bottle; fragrance lovely; lotion lightweight Review: This is a lightweight body lotion. There are two heavy 10 ounce pump cans in this package. Unfortunately, one arrived with the pump broken.

I love the poppy (i.e. tangerine and lily) fragrance. The lotion is lightly moisturizing and leaves my hands silky. Overall, this is a nice lotion but they must package this better for shipment. Luckily, I can use the other pump when the one bottle is finished.

Title: Kaka
Review: Worst chargers ever. This is my third. The first two are broken. I can’t believe I keep buying them. No more. No thanks

Title: Looks the same but does not feel the same.
Review: Functionally this remotes works like TiVo peanut remote but the keys do not have the same feel. There seems to be more travel in the key press which make this remote seem less appealing then the original.

Title: Cute
Review: Adorable and my child will actually wear these ones!

Title: Too wide
Review: The shoe was tooooo wide for my feet, returned the shoes for credit.

Title: One Star
Review: Shady advertising, the unit only cost $119.00 at BOSs web site.  After installing, the volume jumps from low to LOUD.  The screen does not adjust well to sun light hitting it.  So if you have a back up camera, you won't see the person or car to avoid hitting them.

Title: LOVE IT
Review: always loved prell  hard to find in stores  but i knew id find it here ... and a good price for 5 bottles !!

Title: semi disposable slippers
Review: I just put in new flooring and I don't want outdoor shoes inside... so I purchased these for guests ... for the price they are 5 star.  However, they are really semi disposable - not very thick or comfy. But they'd do for a short visit.  I also offer the slip-over shoe covers - they may actually be more useful in the long run for most people - but these are very cute at our beach house.  There are 4 size "large" (estimate a 10-11 womens - maybe 9-10 mens?)  slipper sets and 4 size "medium" ( estimate about an 8-9 womens size). I personally found them fairly wide - I have normal width feet. They are bright white thin terry tops with slightly non-skid, textured soles.  The decoration is embroidered sea life items.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful and I hope this was helpful to you!

Title: think twice
Review: Not a real Bally briefcase!!

Title: Not a good purchase!
Review: Stay away!  Low quality.  If they develop a problem, don't expect much understanding from the TV ears folks.

Title: Really nice daily facial scrub
Review: I picked the chocolate variety, although the fragrance seems like all coffee. This is a great scrub, really makes my skin feel super clean and smooth after using. I have been using this daily now and I do feel like my skin is healthier and glowing more. I am deducting a star as the first time I opened the jar, the scrub just went all over the place (there was no internal cap to hold the ingredients in place when opened. I worried a bit about it not being sealed and someone tampering, but I took a chance and used it anyway. I wish they would have been more cognizant of packaging when first opened.

Title: Super cheap small plastic flower clips w/mild hold Review: These clips are small and made of a super cheap plastic like the plastic prize one gets out of a gumball machine. The clips are not easy to open because it is hard to get leverage on the edge of the clip that is lined up with the dip (hole in the flower). If it were in a position where the flower piece comes out it might be easier to open.

There are also two cheap elastic hair ties included.

At the current price of $8.99, I am not impressed with this ensemble. A young girl might like this but from a quality standpoint, one can purchase better.

Title: Small and does what it’s supposed t
Review: Small and does what is supposed to

Title: Seems well made/ ear plugs are too big
Review: This headset appears to be very sturdy however the ear plug part is too big for my ears. I put them in my ears however they come out of my ears almost as soon as I put them in because they are too big and I am not a petite person. The headset did not come with different sizes of ear plugs.

Title: Great idea.
Review: I used to store batteries in the junk drawer.  I never knew how many I had of each type or whether they were any good.  Now at a glance, I know exactly what I have and what I need, and the tester is right with the batteries.  What did I do without this?

Title: Great disposable shaver if you don't mind the cost
Review: Of course when I think of disposables, I think of those little cheap ones I used to get 10 for a dollar or two. These new BIC Flex4's do the job of a solid razor with the benefit of being disposable. I gave these to my 24 year old son to try out for me. He gave them a 5 star ratin. First, they lasted longer than a typical disposable (he told me one of the razors lasted him over 2 weeks of daily use). Secondly, the shave was really close with the 4 blade technology. He highly recommends these for anyone looking for an upgrade for a traditional disposable. They would be wonderful to take on vacation this year to use in place of your every day razor and you can throw it out before you leave the islands to come home (less to pack). These disposables come as close to a traditional razor as you can get.

Title: Seen no difference
Review: Used it, but I seen absolutely no difference from what I normally do vs with this.

Title: Lace was twisted
Review: The white lace on the dress was twisted half way through. I ordered a replacement and I’m really hoping the new one isn’t sewn incorrectly.

Title: Lovely, Everything I thought it would be.
Review: Absolutely love this bracelet. Didn't cost a lot but it doesn't feel cheap.

Title: Love these dresses
Review: I have a few of these dresses, they usually come out of the dryer like new. This dress is great but the material is not so dryer friendly, please remove it right away and you will be all right and it looks great. If you forget to remove the wrinkles will not go away when hanging the dress. You have to put it back in the dryer because you can not iron this dress. But I love the style and buy it again. Great for around the house, shopping even going out or to a party just change shoes and put on nice jewlery. I love the pink and ivory dresses, the little cap sleeves are a plus and make it dressy.

Title: Ah Nah!
Review: Not good for putting on foundation, better as a duster.

Title: OK but not good with phones with curved backs Review: Well this sort of gets the job done depending on what kind of phone you have. I have a Motorola phone with a curved back. When I tighten it either the left or the right side rubber pieces move up and off the mount along with my phone.
So I have to take those rubber pieces off which means there might fair amount of pressure on the phone on the sides. There also isn't really a tilt function which would be useful to help get the right distance from the eyepiece. An better design would also provide an optional piece that would cradle the phone along the bottom, this would solve this problem of having to grip it on the sides alone to hold it in place.

Title: BROKE IN A WEEK WOULDNT STAY TIGHT Review: Broke in frickin week of me wearing it
Wouldn’t stay tight so it had to keep getting tightened up and the knot came
Out due to the constant adjusting when knot came out magnet fell off string and got lost ... very disappointed had high hopes for these I wouldn’t recommend getting this brand maybe try a different seller .

Title: Refurbished Plantronics Bluetooth Headset
Review: I Really Like Plantronics Bluetooth Headphones, & Plantronics Product's. But This Refurbished Plantronics Bluetooth Headset, Was Not An Acceptable Bluetooth. It Could Be A Possibly That, Because It Was Refurbished, It Was Not Acceptable.

Title: Poor quality!
Review: This is the second one I've received, had a problem with the first one. This one will have to be returned as well as one of the fans doesn't work!!

Title: This works great.
Review: This adapter worked perfectly and items attached work well, too. I recommend this adapter.

Title: Sizing and fabric :(
Review: Fabric quality sucked. Thick and hard fabric. Also ran super small. I ordered an xl and it fits a medium.

Title: Nah
Review: Okay material. Shirt was made too small. Not worth the price, even though the price wasn't high. I'm looking for a softer set.

Title: Corners don't grip well. Review: For the most part, I'm happy with the cover. The colors are nice, but the thing I like the most is that there are 3 grooves to stand up the IPad instead of the only 2 grooves many covers have. That third groove is important to me because it enables me to stand it up straighter when I need to.

The one negative is that 2 of the corners do not grip well. It seems like they're not deep enough. Two corners snap in, the other 2 don't grip at all. I don't carry my IPad outside of my home so I'm not too worried about it falling out of the case, but I would feel that it might slip out of the cover if I needed to carry it around outside.

Title: So far, so annoying
Review: I just got my Echo Show 5 delivered today and it's been nothing but an annoyance so far.  The power cord that came with it appears to be loose because the device turns off, then on again if I move the cord or pick up the device.  Also, the clock appears wonky.  I set it to a modern style with flip numbers - nothing fancy, just white numerals on a black background, to make it easy to see.  But after a couple of minutes, the numeral color changes to orange and the size of the numerals gets smaller.  I've turned off all the settings that would alter the display based on the time of day and/or the ambient lighting.  Very ANNOYING!

Title: Its ok
Review: Having owned both the amazon brand case an the fintie. I will say the amazon is a nicer case. The fitment is better, it also has a nicer feel. The fintie case does the job a case needs to do. But it struggles to hold the fire 10 in portait mode, it feels cheaper. But if your whole goals a cheaper case that protects your fire i suppose it accomplishes this. Personally id spend the extra and get the amazon one but thats me.

Title: Hard to open case, peachy color. Review: This has a good looking black case, but I found it hard to open!
After I broke a nail, but it finally opened to the bottom part that just has the puff, then I clicked on a little tab and the blush came down.

The color has a slight iridescent to it, that I’m not a fan of. I think it looks like your sweaty!
The color was more peachy then pink for me.

Title: Connected right away!
Review: Our son lost our other remote. This one connected right away when we inserted the batteries. Working great thus far!

Title: Cheap fabric
Review: It fit well for the couple of hours I wore it.  I washed it alone on hand wash setting and when I took out, I noticed a couple fabric flaws on back of leg.  Not sure if they were there prior to wearing!  It's been hanging in my closet more than a month so it's too late to return it.  Won't purchase this brand again.

Title: WASHES WELL. Stays New-looking.
Review: I like these compression socks a lot. Comfortable and really absorb excess moisture. I use them at work where I'm in retail and on my feet all day. I also use in the gym and they absorb well. The best part is how well they wash. No balling, yet.

Title: Good Sound/ Customer Service-not so good Review: I have bought these headsets before and the sound is just fine. These have a two year warranty which is nice. After about a year and three months my microphone stopped working. I notified the seller, and I thought I was on the way to getting a replacement. The last two times I emailed the seller I heard nothing back and then all of a sudden when I tried emailing again they blocked me. I am notifying the manufacturer and letting them know what happened and hopefully they will give me a replacement.

Update: I notified the manufacturer and they indicated that they would probably replace my microphone or the whole headset. The last time I heard from them was on July 11th. Like the original seller here on Amazon, they are now ignoring me so I must assume they’re not going to honor their warranty. If you’re looking for a good headset I would go with J&M. At least they stand behind their products and honor their warranty.

Title: Cheap and melted in the car.
Review: Cheap and nasty smelling. I left it in the boot of my car at a festival, went to get it out during a rain storm two days later and it was a melted mess. Do not waste your money.

Title: Two Stars
Review: stop working after 4 days.

Title: Way too small
Review: I wanted to love this dress but had to return it. I am 5'10" and about a 16, 38C cup.  I can normally do an XL in dresses and due to the reviews that said to order up, I did buy this in a 2X. The bottom half of the dress was fine, great length on me and I liked the fabric. The issue is with the top half of the dress, it most definitely runs very small. I couldn't button it up all the way and the sleeves were extremely tight. Had I tried to bring my arms to my chest, I would have probably ripped out the back of the dress. I don't commonly have issues with sleeves or the chest of tops and dresses running small on me at all, so I know its the sizing of it. Especially since the bottom half was completely fine. If the top wasn't so crazy small, I would have loved this dress.

Title: Heavy, hangy, clingy. Not a fan. Review: Disappointed ! I thought this was going to be light and summery!
This material is hangy, heavy, and clingy. I do not find this top flattering.
Another made in China Cheesy looking top.
The front has weird steams coming down in the middle front sides!
The back is big and long , if you want to cover your butt you will like that.
I weigh 123 to125 lbs, 5’2. This is a medium.

Title: Didn't work exactly as I'd hoped.
Review: I was hoping the list of number codes would allow me to control two TVs I use as computer monitors. I was able to find a workaround, but I was hoping it would have been easier. I only use it for power button for two TVs though.

Title: Impressive Sound, Severely Unimpressive Volume. Review: Extremely High Quality Sound.
Very crisp and Clear.
Easy to use.
The Negative - The reported Wattage isn't even Remotely what's delivered.
I mean at a guess...Less than 20%...to the point that I would not recommend the purchase of this item, nor purchase thier products in the future.
Extremely Dissatisfied overall.

Title: Ok facial cleaning tool, not great with battery life
Review: For the money, this is a good facial cleanser. I keep it in the shower and use it to help in exfoliating my facial skin every morning. Really does help keeping my skin clean and shining. Lots of attachments (although it seems I only use two). I like that it is waterproof so I can keep and use it in the shower. Doesn't hold a charge that long, so be sure to recharge often.

Title: Film
Review: To expensive

Title: This fragrance is just awful to my senses Review: Fragrance is a very personal taste. This mystic bliss perfume essential oil blend in carrier oils smells like stale urine to me. I applied this to my neck and the inside of my wrists and was offended by the odor that I had to immediately wash this off. The fragrance did not come through fully by just smelling the roll on; it was only after I applied it that the full "scent profile" came through.

The current price of $12.95 is competitively priced for this but it has to be a fragrance one loves.

Title: Fried a water Pik with an American plug in France.
Review: Don't trust any of these converters. What the heck as happened. I used to be able to travel all over the world and use my American iron, electric tooth brushes, etc. Now everything gets fried.

Title: So unhappy
Review: Very disappointed.  I love this color so much but it actually dyed my nails green and no amount of trying removers it. Sad  I'm Irish so of course this color caught my eye and applied it looks beautiful.  It's removing it that reveals a problem that won't go away.  I have several colors from then only this one does it.  I also can't wear some of those other colors that are almost see through and contain glitter.  The green is visible beneath it.

Title: Nice comfortable fit
Review: Nice leggings. Fit as expected

Title: These work great!
Review: These cover your camera without interfering with anything else.  I love it.  I can get on zoom and cover my camera if I don't want to be seen and uncover when I want to be seen.  It's easy to install and stays well. No problems with it coming off at all and it doesn't interfere with the function of my camera.

Title: A bit over conditioning for my hair; I like the fragrance
Review: This is a leave-in conditioner. I applied a little bit throughout my entire head of short to medium length fine curly hair and then let my hair air dry as usual. This does condition well but my curls were a bit weighed down and my hair was flatter and shinier than normal. I do like the fragrance, however. It smells like a vintage scent.

Title: Waist of time and money...
Review: Terrible purchase. Can't even get the correct app downloaded for it. It has no serial numbers therefore no need to buy a sim card ( won't work) and its absolutely useless w/out a sim.

Title: Three Stars
Review: I bought 2 and they both broke on me, stating weak charge

Title: Pencil color goes on too light to provide good coverage
Review: Perhaps this would work for someone else; however, this honey brown color is too light of a color to fill in my brows. I also have a fair complexion (almost ivory) with brown brows. It does glide on smoothly but the top is too thin to lay down more than a faint hint of honey brown on the brow. The sponge side is a bit better for blending and the color is darker there.

Title: cute mouse
Review: have bought this mouse twice

Title: Fads come and go! I've been using this mascara since 1978! Review: I've tried many many mascara brands, but I always return to this Cover Girl Original!
I have purchased the expensive brands like Lancome to LOreal and all in-between and even more expensive
brands. The old favorite original Cover Girl brand is the best for not clumping and not smudging. It makes your lashes look good without a lot of fuss!

Title: wired headbands
Review: I purchased 2 sets of these - one in a black/blue mix and another in a black/brown/red mix.  I wish they were just a tad longer.  I don't have a big head or anything- but just wish the tips were about 1 or 2" longer to provide some other tie options.  As they are - you have one option and that is to twist the tips - which leaves about 1 1/2" long tips.  so no bows or double twists.  If you're ok with that - these work.

Title: Works, but better options are out there Review: I bought two other replacement remotes for our Frame tv after the puppy ate the original. One was completely garbage, but the second one paired up and has worked perfectly for months. This one was meant to be a back up to the back up remote since the pupper is still a pupper.

However, I think I'll just stick to brand on the other one and not use this one. The buttons take longer to get a response from and sometimes it skips forward two selections with a single press on the selection button. Additionally, I have no clue what rakuten is and that same button on the original and the good replacement remotes is reserved for the Samsung Free TV app. And that's what I want instant access to from the remote. Everything else I want is an app - Netflix, HBOmax, Paramount, Hulu, Prime etc.

Title: Webcam Is Too Complicated for Simple Video Conferencing Needs Review: This LOGITECH BRIO WEBCAM (Ultra HD Webcam for Video Conferencing, Recording, and Streaming) doesn’t meet my needs. It uses complicated software, needs a cable connection to a PC or Mac, and must be mounted on a monitor or desk.

For video conferencing (which is all that I do), it’s much simpler to use my iPad Pro along with an app like Zoom. The iPad Pro has a terrific forward-facing camera, and Zoom is incredibly easy to use to set up meetings. There’s no cabling required, and my iPad Pro can be positioned anywhere for optimal lighting.

Title: Not flannel, are very large, cover your whole foot, but still ok.
Review: These ones came in a little too large for my taste I believe I ordered a Large but even if it was an XL the pants fit great at the top yet were really long all the way to the floor to the point my feet got stuck with them. They do not really feel like flannel if you ask me, and boy do I know about flannel because I've worn similar flannel pants all my life and always buy on winter whenever I get a chance, these are definitely not flannel. Overall they are ok I just need to make a few adjustments to the hem probably since it is a little too low/large but I was also a little disappointed that it's not soft flannel but rather feels more like cotton, so more stiff. The top part is ok though and eitherw ay they are probably more sturdy than flannel ones, although I personally prefer the latter because of the softness.

Title: Rich in hyaluronic acid, noticeable imprvoement in my skin
Review: For the positives, this is a good moisturizing facial serum. Rich, absorbs quickly and contains hyaluronic acid (something both my dermatologist and my local spa technicians recommend greatly for younger looking skin). I have been using this now for almost a month and I do see a nice, one improvement in my complexion, skin looks glowing and hydrated. For the negatives, at close to $100 this is very expensive, you can purchase hyaluronic acid in other products at a substantially less cost. I also don't care for the fragrance, I find it a little overwhelming for me. Of course, given 5 minutes or so, when absorbed, the fragrance is basically gone. For the two negatives I am taking away a star in my review of this product.

Title: QUEEN HELENE Cocoa Butter Creme 4.8 oz
Review: Leaves my skin so soft, a little oily, but works well, not much of a fragrance, a bit small but I got it a a good price

Title: What happened?
Review: Wow...this is an UPDATED review:  I had to COMPLETELY change my review... they must have changed the formula (or is this a fake product?). I was so happy to see the bottle was larger than in the past...however, after using as I had in the past, I'm getting NO results and using 4x as much.  :(  What a horrible disappointment.  I hope that my previous review that remembered the OLD product haven't convinced someone to try this. I am so so unhappy with this product now.  Sure wish I could find the old product because it was literally the best I've found.  This, sold here, is ok as a eye makeup remover and that's about it.

Title: 2 Display Spitters
Review: awsome. . .just what I was looking for. . .came on time; works great; going to have to order more for friends

Title: Lovely scent
Review: Even though I have the refill size, I find it just as affordable as buying the dispensers in bulk.  Good value, nice looking, smells great.

Title: Size is ok...
Review: This was pretty easy to install on a tablet, but it had air trapped underneath so I lifted a corner to release the air but now the corner refuses to stay down, it's very frustrating...

Title: Not the same hunter green as the scrub top
Review: Great scrubs for wearing, but it is NOT the same hunter green as the Sivvan scrub top. They are distinctly different shades of hunter green. So I can't wear them together without looking awkward. Very disappointed.

Title: Comfort and Cute
Review: I love these shorts. They wash well I plan to purchase more in the future

Title: smells good
Review: As you would expect, it smells wonderful.  Also know that it is a CREAM, NOT an aerosol spray!  So when you go to dispense it, be prepared for CREAM to come out!  :)

Title: Label Lists No Germ-Killing Ingredients; Not Made by Tea Tree Review: This ANTIBACTERIAL TEA TREE MINT HAND SOAP (with Spearmint, Jojoba and Olive Oil; Multipurpose Liquid Soap in Pump Dispenser; 16 oz) lathers reasonably well, but it does smell a lot like gasoline (as another reviewer noted). The pump is very difficult to open up.

This is NOT a Tea Tree brand product--it is a Buena Skin Cosmeceuticals product with a label that emphasizes just one of its many ingredients (tea tree leaf oil).

I think it is false advertising to label this hand soap as “antibacterial” soap (in the title of the product page). According to the label, the soap “helps wash away bacteria”. Well, so does water!

The ingredients are all “natural” ingredients. The listed ingredients do NOT include alcohol or any other germ-killing chemical. When you’re using this, you’re probably getting the same “antibacterial” effect that you get with ordinary soap and water. (My web research says that tea tree oil MAY be antibacterial when applied to the skin.)

Title: Lose fitting in the back, everything shows. Review: This really is a cute top for the right person!

I wear a Med, to Large. This seemed large on me. I wear a size 10. 5’2.
By going by the picture my top does not look exactly like that !
Its also a bit confusing with the lines, and colors of the pants the model Is wearing!

This did not fit me snug like the back of what the model shows .

The neck line came up higher.
The arm holes where to big. The back Criss-Cross hung down open, although this idea is cute .
I think You have to have a Firm body to wear this, as everything in the back is open and shows.
In the front of the top, If you have a tummy it will show..

Title: Bleh Review: It lags on my computer when I try to overlay more than one clip. This is with 8GB ram and a nice processor.
There's a crackling sound in the audio that I can't get rid of.
The aspect ratios are really stupid. 16:9 is usually good for YouTube, but it's all screwed up once I upload it.
It lowers the quality of the videos. Doesn't matter what format you render it in.
I'm unimpressed.

Title: Crinkled
Review: The products came super folded up due to that when you put them on they don’t come on correctly and washed off within a day. It’s a lot of money to be gone in a day literally.

Title: Love the serum but hate the pump mechanism Review: This serum is great. A little moisturizes a lot of skin. I used this on my arms and legs. I also do not feel greasy after using this. It also appears to be scentless. However, I absolutely hate the pump mechanism. Unless I hold the bottle at an angle, the pump makes a mess when dispensing the serum.

The current price of $44 is expensive for 3.4 ounces but this will last a while. The reason I rated this 3 stars is because of the dispensing pump and how pricey this is.

Title: Short term use
Review: The idea is great. I had these boxes before. I thought the snaps would be better. But the minute you grab the box. The sides fall. Its great for sorting. But you need a real box or case after. The only thing you can do. Is to glue the snaps. And as far as the storage area is ok.

Title: Barely provides any color but enhances other lipstick with a gloss
Review: This lip gloss hardly provides any color to my lips at all and I have light lips and light skin. However, it does enhance my other lipsticks by providing a sheen over them. I also would not call this hydrating. If it did not enhance my other matte lipsticks, I would have given this 2 stars.

Title: Save your money, find something else
Review: What a lousy CD player.  Don't lose the instructions or you'll never figure out how to operate it.  And the sound?  Immediately brought back memories of the 60's and transistor radios !!!  What a waste of money, believe it will be going back for a refund.

Title: Material balled up
Review: They started to ball up (material) before I even washed them for the first time.  Waist of my money .

Title: Wonderful light foundation that covers all your skin flaws!
Review: This is a great, lightweight full coverage foundation. Goes on smoothly and does not look cakey or flakey on my skin. I am typically fussy when it comes to my facial products, so I was skeptical when I first ordered this. However, I was pleasantly surprised to see how flawless this product worked for me. It smoothes my skin, minimizing poors and making me appear to not be wearing foundation (but my face looks amazing). I had never heard of DermaBlend before I ordered this, but I am definitely sold. This will be my foundation of choice going forward. Absolutely love how it makes my skin look and feel.

Title: Way to long
Review: Way to long . I’m 5’6 and have about 5 inches to long.

Title: Infinity circles on a gift card for sisters. I did not get rose gold, its silver color! Review: The idea is nice to give a loving sister, or a friend , although it comes on a card that is meant for sisters.
I think that limits this gift to sisters only, or take it off the card, leave it in the box as a gift.

I gave it to my daughter, and she loves it.
Even though the chain is adjustable, its still too long for my taste.

This is light weight, does not feel like sterling to me, and hope the chain does not bother her neck!
It reads to me that only the infinity circles are gold filled, but not the chain!
This is not rose gold, it is all silver...looks a little cheesy. I think the price could still stay low using surgical steel.
Although di not know what this sells for!

Title: Do not buy!
Review: This is the second Sony BDP-S5100 3D Blu-ray Disc Player I have owned. The first one was refurbished and stopped accessing any internet content after about 6 months. Amazon was very nice and replaced it for me even though it was well past their 30 day refund policy. The second one was supposedly brand new but came shipped in a plain brown box. Once again it worked great at first but here I am only 3 months later and having the same problem. Says I have no problems with my network connection but won't let me do anything that requires internet, so no Netflix or Amazon video, which is the whole reason I bought a new Blu-ray player in the first place.

Title: Pretty detangling comb/brush combo but cheaply made; too expensive
Review: The current price of $16.99 for this set is outrageous. This feels cheap. The tines on the brush feel like they are made of dollar store plastic. This does detangle but sort of rips at my hair. It is best used in the shower. The comb has a wide tooth and is okay but is also cheap. The set is pretty but it is not worth the price. If this were $4 or less, it would have received 3 stars as just an okay set for occasional use. At its current price, I would say pass. Note that fingerprints show up easily on the faceplate of the brush.

Title: Doesn't work
Review: Item did not work as promised.  returned.

Title: Too subdued and blah for my tastes; good for mixing lipstick colors
Review: This mauve pink color is too subdued on my lips and does nothing to make them pop. For me, this is only good for mixing lipstick colors. I tried their other matte versions such as [[ASIN:B07J9PWGN8 sugar]], and they sparkle, shine, and POP but not this one.

Title: Holds the edges, with an added bonus (insert sarcasm here) Review: I'm a 3c curly with some gray. I wanted to sleek back my hair in a ponytail to highlight the silvers but keep them tame. My hair length is mid-back with major shrinkage, really fine, and prone to frizz.

I followed the directions - this product did it - sleeked my hair and I thought I was fly.

Until the flakes came like cradle cap! This caused *major, major* deeply embedded flakes all at the hairline. Once I stopped using this and applied a scalp treatment to the hairline, poof! Flakes gone.

What a waste. I couldn't return as it's outside the 30 day window period.

Title: Its too big
Review: Love the colors, the material and design but it was too big

Title: outdoor blink
Review: We purchased these to put inside - which we normally wouldn't do - but we are selling remotely.  Wish they would develop these in a white color (not just the "inside" version) - but we are firm Blink supporters.  We have 2 full systems and as long as you have wifi connection, they work well - no monthly fees.  I will say - keep in mind - each of your systems is limited to 10 cameras total.

Title: Cute, just a little stiff
Review: Nice, a little stiff but should soften in the wash. Color is an off White like ivory.

Title: Wonderful product! Highly recommend!
Review: I need to begin by saying I absolutely love Ahava products. I found Ahava on a pilgrimage I did to Israel in 2008 and a visit to the site of Masada at the Dead Sea. I picked up a gift package of a few of their products and I was immediately hooked. Every day I use their Mud exfoliator, at night I use their night cream and at least once a week I use one of their Mud Pack facial products. I am 61 years old and am often told I look to be in my low 50s. I was thrilled when I saw this new Ahava Osmoter product. I have been using this daily now for about a week and I will say my skin feels and looks like it is glowing. It goes on like silk, has a nice subtle fragrnace and my skin feels amazing throughout the day (even after I put on makeup and/or sun screen). I know this is pricy and you might be able to do better purchasing elsewhere (if you find it cheaper). You won't find a product line that is better for you than Ahava, feeding your skin richly with Dead Sea minerals and keeping you looking young and vibrant.

Title: Unique design is helpful for a good grip; clippers are not as sharp as my regular ones Review: There are two clippers and a tiny carry satchel in this set. The clippers can be used like regular clippers in the straight position or the head can be angled. I tried them on my toenails and it did take some getting used to the configuration to cut my nails. What I do love is that I have a better grip on the clipper due to the angle. However, I do not feel the cutting edge is sharp enough. My regular nail clippers are sharper or at least work like they feel sharper.

The current price of $14.99 comes to $7.50 per clipper.

Title: Great gift for a teacher!
Review: Really nice gift for a female teacher. Nice presentation for a gift. When you open it, it looks great with a cute little writing on the inside of the cover. I had my grandson give this to his second grade teacher and I was there when she opened it. She absolutely loved it and all the gifts inside the box (especially the candle). I highly recommend this for gift giving!

Title: For small feet
Review: I got these for me. Then I realized I would probably bust my hind end on the floor because they're so soft and silky.  I decided just for bed socks maybe. but they would barely fit my size 10 feet. They went to the younger girls in the family. They feel wonderful, ut they're just too small. That was the only problem. So, if you have ity bity feet go for it.

Title: Very comfy, fits great
Review: I have been searching for the perfect summer shoe for over 2 months. I bought 2 other brands, but they didn't fit so I returned. I got these in yesterday & love them! Very comfy. Fits as expected. Only problem, the top sole is a little thin. I hit it on my bed frame & punctured a hole in them. Im so heartbroken

Title: Great between pedicures to keep your feet looking beautiful!
Review: This is actually one of the best things I have ever gotten from Amazon. First, I go to get pedicures at least 2-3 times a month. I have awfully rough heels and the balls of my feet that the pedicure people try to address. And, although my feet feel pretty good and smooth for a few days after my pedicure, it isn't long before the bottoms of my feet are rough, scaly and peeling again. In comes this Denicer foot file. I am now using this once or twice a week between pedicures. It's a quick and easy procedure and the results are amazing. My feet stay soft and smooth all the time now (not just a couple of days a month) and they look, and feel healthier. I am thrilled to have found this product and I know there are other brands out there. I don't know if other systems could possibly be better (as I have never tried any others), but this one is great.
