It is powerful and it works. I highly recommend this to anyone who has rough and scaly feet like me.

Title: not for me
Review: I'm an old guy with rough feet because I run around barefoot all the time.  This gave me a peel, but not as deep a treatment as I had hoped.  For normal guys with normal feet, I think this will probably be more than adequate.

Title: Loved the fragrance but did not like the wet and dirty looking results on my short hair
Review: This makes my hair look wet and dirty. It smells great but instead of replenishing my short hair, it just looked like I wet my hair with water and after it was dried, I could tell I had used a product because my strands were slightly stiff. This might work for some but it's definitely not for me.

Title: Bargain!
Review: It was good for the price, I could have use a size larger.

Title: Yay! We can use the WII again! Review: Bought a new TV for the family room and it didn't have the input that came with our WII. this product was a perfect solution, and very inexpensive.

The product plugs into the WII and then you plug in an HDMI cable from the adapter to the TV. Couldn't be easier and worked like a charm.

Title: Nice cleanser for everyday use
Review: This is a nice facial cleanser. Does remove makeup and leaves my skin feeling soft and smooth. I am not sure about the claim to exfoliating as I didn't feel any scrubbing particles in the cleanser. However, I have been using it exclusively for almost a month and I do really like it. I use it nightly before bed to reduce the daily dirt and makeup collected on my face. It also has an extremely light fragrance that I also liked. I recommend this for anyone looking for an oil based cleanser.

Title: Huge
Review: I’m 5’2’’ 125lb, I bought the small green and it’s huge. Must be plus sizing because it’s a large on me.

Title: It’s cheep plastic.
Review: I am sure it cost 20 cent to make it and I end up paying $15. Not worth of money. Bork after 2 days while set up.

Title: Nice cover for my Kindle
Review: Fits well, protects well and is an attractive cover for my 7" Kindle. If there was any downside it's the smell. I hate that faux leather smell. I am thinking that over time, hopefully, it will lose the plastic/rubbery smell.

Title: Tips are too thick to be incredibly effective Review: I am disappointed in this set. There are four tweezers in a pleather case. All the tweezers have a tip that is way too thick. The worst one is the slant tip and then the flat tip. The point slant tip is the best as is the pointed tip. Although the blades align, I only find that tweezers with a thin metal edge are best as opposed to a thick edge. I tried pulling eyebrow, chin, and lip hairs with these and my success was 50/50 compared to the  [[ASIN:B08RX9FJBD PAFASON Precision Tweezer Kit]] I use regularly.

To me these are just okay. I also feel the current price of $14.90 is too expensive for this.

Title: Perhaps these were seconds.
Review: I ended up returning these shoes. I underestimated the shoe size, ordering a half size larger than normal. This resulted in shoes much too large. The multicolor lining looked a bit odd, making the two shoes a mismatch. Also, the logo on the tongue of one shoe was red and on the other shoe was blue.

Title: Battery Operated Fan, USB charger, 360 Rotation, Base Stand/Clip, White by Alytimes
Review: Mine didn't arrive with a rechargeable 18650 battery. It still works if you plug it into an outlet with the provided USB cord. The strength is not variable which is odd because there is a dial used to turn it on that indicates the more you dial the stronger the breeze (but I think that may be for battery only operation).  The user manual indicates the wind should be variable, it says at the low setting a battery charge would last 6 hours, while a high setting would last 2 hours.  Also it's a nice compact fan that won't blow you away - the noise is a bit higher than I would expect from the wind produced but nothing I can't tune out over time.

Title: I have blonde-white eyebrows so it’s hard to color them ...
Review: I have blonde-white eyebrows so it’s hard to color them and look natural. This may take some practice to get right. It’s a little thick and sticky but does stay on well.

Title: Would NOT buy again
Review: While the colors are pretty, I did not like this product for a number of reasons and will not be purchasing again. The main reason is the nail polish won't stay on. I tried different base coats as well, but within 48 hours they all peeled completely off. Since I already bought it I will continue to try and see if I can get it to stick, but so far have been unsuccessful. I also do not like the shape of the brush. It's bulky and not natural to the nail shape, causing the paint to be difficult to make look sharp. I typically don't have that issue, but have had to do a lot of clean up afterwards because of it.

Title: How Ironic!
Review: These slippers have been returned and refunded.  So now you ask me what I thought about them?  Huge disappointment.  Also returned the black pair.

Title: Not Big enough for Thick Hair
Review: For shoulder length, thick hair you need a bigger comb. This comb is nice, but not big enough for my hair type.

Title: Keeps him warm
Review: My husband bought this. He only takes it off to wash it. He is cold all the time. Great jacket.

Title: It looks like it's some pulled out thread but it's just missing
Review: These jeans have a defect.  There is a line across the front of missing stitching.  It looks like it's some pulled out thread but it's just missing.

Title: Took them 3 times to send me the correct shoes...
Review: but shoes do fit well and are comfortable

Title: Best hair dryer I have ever used!
Review: This is a really cool hairdryer. Never tried anything like this before. I will say, it was one of the fastest hair dries I have ever had and, now that I am used to it, not, sure I can go back to my old dryer. Really sleek, light weight, super quiet and maneuvers super easily. Only downside is the price (I don't think I would spend over $150 to get one of these in the future). But, I love it and highly recommend it if money is no object.

Title: Smells like unrefined shea butter; it is not as thick as expected & is a bit greasy Review: This body butter smells like unrefined shea butter which has a slightly unpleasant aroma that I have sort of gotten used to. Also, the cream is thinner than I expected; it's more like supermarket creams that get pumped out of lotion bottles. I did expect it to be thicker.

It is moisturizing but does not fully absorb and leaves a slightly greasy residue on my skin. I neither like nor hate this body butter. After having tried it, it is not something I would order as I prefer thicker body butters with wonderful scents.

The current price of $ 19.95 is competitively priced for 8 ounces of a product like this.

Title: Not a good buy for my size 48B
Review: I have a hard time finding a bra in my size, it works fine around but the cups are usally too large and bag out as is the case here.  I know a good bra fit can be done because I've had bra's in the past that fit very well.  Somehow things are not being manufactured as they once were and this bra ended up as were others - in my donation bin.  Too bad really, wasted my money and am continuing to have no choice but to wear the old bra's.

Title: Okay, but not durable by any means
Review: Theyre not the most comfortable. They are good for going out, but theyre not soft enough to be comfortable and lounge in. The seams have actually started to loosen and come apart after just two washes.

Title: Could be better
Review: When watching playback camera drags a lot. It’s not the Internet because it’s next to it

Title: Good size and good price.
Review: I actually bought this for my turtles.  They love looking at themselves  and the fact that it’s plastic with a handle makes it perfect to submerge under water while fastening to the aquarium side.

Title: Paper thin
Review: Although I think the outfit was still cute I could not wear this so thin I could see my hand on the other side of the fabric so I will be returning

Title: Present
Review: Bought these for my Mom whose legs are always cold. They look nice and I think they will do the trick of warming her up.

Title: Nice but overpriced facial serum
Review: This is a nice facial serum. Goes on a little oily but quickly is absorbed into my skin. Smells nice but not overwhelming. I love the fact that it contains all the vitamins my 60 something skin craves. I don't see any noticeable improvement after using this for a little over two weeks now. If I notice a difference, I will update this review. I deducted a star because I think it is overpriced.

Title: Nice!
Review: Very nice, husband really likes them. Comfortable.

Title: Great low cut socks look great when I play tennis!
Review: These are great with my sneakers. Super comfortable and do not roll down (and onto the bottom of my feet) after a full day of wear. I love the variety of colors as well. These are very lightweight, but strong, and are perfect for every day use.

Title: Comfortable!
Review: So comfortable! I don’t want to take it off. Perfect fit. Plan on buying another in a different color if available.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Perfect condition. Would recommend to anybody.

Title: DO NOT BUY
Review: When a pair of ink packs costs more than a printer there is something VERY wrong. This thing is SO LOUD and slow!

Title: Soles are thick and hard, Not for a narrow foot. Size chart was off for me! Review: I went by the chart that I do Not see here any longer!
I have a narrow foot, and these where huge on me.
My foot slid right threw the front of these slippers, and the front of the soles are not comfortable,
There Hard.
I also found the soles to be thick and heavy, not soft like my Uggs are.

If you have a slim foot, these are not for you. I also do not believe
The bottom of the inside of the slipper is shearing, only the cross top part is.

Title: Perfect
Review: I love this, so comfy and got my body perfect and I'm a big girl.

Title: Wrinkles easy :looks like a t-shirt
Review: Dislike the wrinkle

Title: The most slippery substance I ever got my hands on; good soap that cleans well but creates a dangerous shower situation Review: This vegan and gluten-free soap is the most dangerous soap my boyfriend and I have ever used in our life. It is so incredibly slippery that it is impossible to hold and ricochets off the shower walls and floors causing a very dangerous slip and fall situation. I purchased two bars at Home Goods because it smelled nice. It cleans well but it's slickness is so dangerous that I will never purchase this again.

I forgot to tell my boyfriend about this new bar of soap in the shower and after he showered I got an earful. He said to me "What is it with that soap? The most slippery substance I ever touched was a garden slug and this is worse than that. THROW IT OUT."

Instead of throwing this out, I purchased [[ASIN:B008AFCEJC One Evriholder 623-2 Paradiso Soft Weave Wash Cloth]] at WalMart to enable me to grip this soap in the shower. That is working for me; however, I WOULD NEVER PURCHASE THIS AGAIN. I don't care if it cleans well; it's not worth the risk.

Title: Meh
Review: I like all the Brickell products but this one falls short for me. The smell just isn’t there. Not invigorating for me

Title: Intense musky floral fragrance; very nice Review: This has an intense musky floral fragrance. I like it. The cap has an extension stick that can be used to apply this to the neck and wrists.

The current price of $23.95 is competitively priced. I do wish it came with a label or ingredients list. Although the satchel is nice, this is not giftable without it being fully labeled in a box. Also, the photo on the Amazon site shows two different bottles which makes it unclear which one (or both) someone is going to get. I took off one star for lack of box with ingredients list and ons star for the unclear listing.

Title: Just like MAC Goldfinch lipgloss
Review: I used to wear MAC Goldfinch, until they discontinued it...it's the closest I've found to theirs. I pair it with my lipstick & it creates a wonderful, shimmering lip. Not only is it a great color, but it also has staying power & moisturizes the lip. I highly recommend!

Title: Best skin cleanser on the market today!
Review: This Revision Skincare Papaya cleanser is my new favorite addition to my daily beauty regimen. A little goes a long way and my skin feels amazingly clean, soft, smooth and doesn't leave my skin dry after using it. I am a 62 year old female who is very active and after I visit the gym or play a game of tennis, this is my go-to facial wash. I also really love the fragrance of this as well, leaves my feeling fresh and revitalized. I highly recommend this for all skin types and ages.

Title: Camera's
Review: I really like them. Glad i purchased them.

Title: Great organization
Review: Just ok leather but organization is fabulous.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Like it a lot and more protects scratch on screen thanks .....

Title: Larger brush is more effective for me.
Review: I admit to not being a make-up pro or connoisseur of brushes, which might affect my review. For my basic, everyday needs, though, I found the larger of these brushes to be quite nice. It's a great texture/tightness and super effective in applying powder. The smaller brush is much looser in texture and didn't seem to pick up as much product (highlighter), or be quite what I was looking for in applying the product. The smaller brush is not the "must have" for me, but the larger brush is a keeper.

Title: Lovely lavender coconut fragrance; glides on smooth; protection only lasted me 6 hours Review: There are three 2-ounce solid tubes in this package. The deodorant glides on smooth and  it feels moisturizing. Unfortunately, since this does not have aluminum (which I require), I stink after six hours. The fact that it even lasted six hours is amazing because other non-aluminum deodorants last me only two to four hours. The results are two stars for me. I rated it three stars because I know for a fact that no product w/o aluminum has ever worked 24 or 48 hours for me. They claim this works 48 hours but that might only be for a few people. Personally, I take a shower every 12 hours, so I do not need such long-length protection. I do love the coconut lavender fragrance, however. 

Note that the stick deodorant has to be pushed up from the bottom to expose the balm. This means if too much is exposed, the cap has to be used to squish it back down into the tube. I would have preferred a container that has a turn dial instead.

At the current price of $12.72 ($14.97 minus 15%), this comes to an expensive $4.24 per 2-ounce tube.

Title: Bad all around
Review: Material is very cheap and the size is very off. I have been wearing true vintage and reproduction since the 80s I know how a 20s dress should fit, the top portion was great but the drop waistvto hips were not proportioned properly leaving the hipscway too wide,  if the material were better I'd have it tailored but it's a wash. I do not advise buying.

Title: Check the size
Review: The lenses were smaller than I thought.

Title: Thin !
Review: I was surprised When I open these pants out of their package because they are extremely thin And almost see through. Everyone is afraid to wear them because you sit down they are afraid We will split open. But they look nice otherwise and have lots of pockets.

Title: Very nice
Review: Gave as a gift to my sister who lives in another part of the state, she was thrilled with it.

Title: Why would you even sell this?
Review: The whole point of clear stampers is so you can see the image & where you're placing it on the nail. I have owned like 50 stampers & I've never seen this before - there is a bubble in the plastic that you see either way you use the stamper.. right in the middle! It's annoying & should have been viewed as a flaw by the manufacturers bc it is one. Not happy at all.. will be using the stamper heads only & tossing the holder.

Title: Seems dried out
Review: I’ve bought this mascara before and it was good then. This seems dried out. I recommend you pick it up in a store.

Title: Overpriced
Review: Nothing special.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Had the Touch Screen stop working after about 3 months,  once it went out of warranty

Title: Amazing aloe gel for multiple uses!
Review: Living in Florida, where the sun shines most of the time, I was looking for a great aloe vera gel to treat sunburn and overexposure. I also get microneedling occasionally from the dermatolgist and my skin burns. This aloe gel works great for both, my skin feels cool and pain is diminished. I love the lavender fragrance in this gel as well as it not only cools, refreshes and moisturizes my skin but also leaves my skin feeling and smelling great. Highly recommend!

Title: Failed after 4 months Review: My Samsung 32Gb EVO Class 10 Micro SDHC card (genuine) failed in my Samsung Galaxy Tab Pro 8.4 after 4 months. Lost all data, could not reformat. It's a nice little orange and white wafer to look at this point, nothing more. I'm going to try a 64GB MicroSDXC next. Wish me luck!

Update 7/9/2016 I sent this in under Samsung warranty and received a new replacement which has been working fine so far, but I'm not using it for critical data. So I upped my rating from one star to two stars for honoring the warranty.

Title: Good for breaking a sweat. Fits well but material is very light.
Review: Good quality, exercise style fabric/material, not the best material out there but fair enough. Fit is good and easy to exercise in. The material is a little too light for my taste though and I noticed it could be a little water resistant probably at least. In general good for cardio or running, light exercise.

Title: I love these earrings! Qualtiy made and beautiful!
Review: Beautiful Celtic design, hangs daintily from my ears. I love Irish themed jewelry and these fit the bill to a tee. Nice size, too (I don't like my earrings too small).

Title: Thin Review: This sweater is thin and the color is not as bright as the picture.
Also the pockets just flop around when the sweater is open.
I returned this

Title: Easiest way to track your activity ... and it syncs!
Review: I chose the Fitbit One to better record my activity (as an alternate to a pedometer which had iffy accuracy.)  Now that I've had Fitbit One for a few days I must say that I totally love it!  It is small, clips securely to your clothing, the displays are great (including its cheery greetings!) and it automatically downloads info into Myfitnesspal or other diet tracking sites.  Couldn't be easier!  The Fitbit site is great and very useful.  This unit even tracks your sleep patterns!  Would recommend this item to anyone seeking to track and improve their activity levels

Title: The results do not wow me; my hair was soft but lifeless after using this Review: This review is for the Pantene Nourishing Oil Split End Serum.

I applied a couple of squirts to the ends of my short to medium fine curly hair and worked my way up. My hair dried soft but was completely lifeless after using this. I also cannot determine if it helps split ends because I cannot find any on me. However, I love the fragrance. It smells like apple to me. Nevertheless, I need to be wow'd by more than just the scent. It is okay but nothing spectacular.

At the current price of $12.59 (after applying the $1 coupon offer), this comes to $4.20 a bottle which is on the high side.

Title: Stretchy Neckline Ruins Effect of Pretty Knitted Lace
Review: This TRUE ANGEL WOMEN’S V-NECK POINTELLE LONG SLEEVE PULLOVER is made of cotton fabric with a very pretty knitted lace pattern.  However, the neckline is so stretchy that the garment totally loses its shape when you put it on.  The vee neck distorts into something resembling a scoop neck.  The fit of this garment was extremely disappointing.

Title: Love the fragrance but this is not volumizing at all; it relaxed my curls - 2.5 stars
Review: I absolutely love the fragrance of this shampoo. It is very creamy and creates a great lather; however, it  is not volumizing at all. I have short to medium fine curly hair and this relaxed my curls. It feels and acts like a conditioning shampoo more than a volumizing shampoo.

Title: Poor quality
Review: looks nice, but blue tooth pauses in the middle of the songs, Screen doesn't shut off. Keeps displaying AM, CD, Bluetooth ect. over and over never stops. Customer service said thats what it does. I hated that it didnt shut all the way off.

Title: Virtually impossible to set the right day!
Review: The (watch) looks nice, feels great. I personally like the weight of it, but the date portions of this watch are absolutely terrible. It is virtually impossible to set the right day, then it ends up being that day for a few days. I am not sure if the watch is defective but It is irritating. However, I do still use the watch, it keeps time and that is whats important. A previous one that I acquired only has the time, and I'll probably end up using that one more.

Title: Typical lightweight eyelash curler; feels cheap; not giftable Review: This is a simple eyelash curler. The curler is lightweight and all metal like most typical cheap eyelash curlers on the market.

It is easy to use and curls well and gently. Since it comes in a plastic wrap, this is really not giftable.

I personally prefer my old metal curler to this because it is heavier and feels more substantial. This curler feels very cheap. The current price of $6.08 is on the high side of competitively priced for such a cheap curler.

Title: 2nd warranty on purchases
Review: Excellent service when I bought this extended protection for my laptop. Now I purchased a battery-operated power mower and a power mower like this is unknown to me. So I purchased this warranty again. It pays to have it.

Title: Beautiful
Review: Beautifully crafted. Eye catching

Title: Good
Review: Very light weight, easy to use, good item for the price

Title: Not good for small chested women
Review: Not good for small chested women. Cute suit and liked it everywhere but the chest. The pads in it are really weird shape too

Title: Not a fan... Review: Nice scent but it did not last long.

After I blew dry my hair, and put hair spray on, I gave this shine 3 pumps , and held it a couple of feet away.
It gave my hair a shine, but my hair looked like it was separating, and oily after.

I have other spray shines, and my hair never looked oily after useing them.

My hair has a blonde weave with a natural slight wave, that I use a big brush to get he curl out, and
My hair is thick, and in very good condition.

Maybe for other peoples hair this would be great!

Title: Five Stars
Review: Out standing for under $300

Title: Returned
Review: Returned

Title: Cheery color; brush heads are soft w/no shedding; some are too stiff Review: There are 10 make-up brushes in this set. The bristles are soft and there is absolutely no shedding.

Their soft bristles feel great against my skin and work like many other brushes I tried previously.What  do not like is that two of the large brushes feel like paint brushes because they are tightly compressed together. I prefer the one large brush that flows with my strokes. It is the same with one of the small brushes. The handles are okay but not as easy to keep a grip on as brushes with an hourglass type handle. These are definitely functional and there is a brush for almost any task but there is no lip brush.

The current price of $14.39 is cones to a slightly pricey $1.44 per brush. This set is not my first choice in brushes. The Daubigny 16Pcs Complete Green Premium Synthetic Makeup Brush Set (Amazon Item #B08PFQQ9FP) is much better and is cheaper per brush.

Title: Great hair dryer, works excellent!
Review: Not just your basic hair dryer. I do love the way it fits in my hand (ergonomically correct) and it is a powerful 1874 watt dryer so my hair dries fast. It is easy to maneuver and dries my hair flawlessly and my hair looks and feels great. No complaints, only Kudos to Revlon for another great styling product. Give your hair an upgrade and toss the old dryer you have been using for years and get a new one.

Title: Pretty pearls, difficult clasp.
Review: I returned the pearls because the clasp was much too difficult to open and close.

Title: Terrible fitting.
Review: they’re loose everywhere but too low for women’s hips. I’m surprised these stay up at all! Definitely not made for anyone with any curve whatsoever.

Title: Flattering bathing suit, crazy design.. Review: I was a little taken back by this bright sunset orange color, and Hawaii black big palm trees beach design all over. Its not the white
Back round it shows here.
I could see this design more on board shorts! The sleeves are black, as is the neck , and zipper.
The cups are sewn in, and one side has a big indentation in the cup, other side is ok.
You do not have to have this all the way unzipped, as the zipper locks in place good higher up.

I Can’t imagine what kind of tan or sunburn you would get from this bathing suit that comes up to the neck and has sleeves!
I live in California at the beach. I realize the sun all the time on our skin is not our friend, but this is strange.

I wear a size 10, and I’m 5’2. I think a medium instead of a large might of fit me better, but this L I can wear. The back was a bit big, or for a taller person. The tush looks cute.
This does NOT come up real high on the sides to almost your waist, and it is a flattering bathing suit.

Title: Terrible
Review: This product is terrible. The strip is poorly designed, and they need to do more USB ports. Overall bad quality.

Title: I enjoy my headbands
Review: I enjoy my headbands.  They fit snugly against my head and are sturdy.  I don't like flimsy headbands so these were perfect and they're pretty, too!

Title: Made my orange paws stand out!
Review: Great polish and background for my Tigers Paws! Doesn’t chip. Perfection! OPi and BUTTER are my favorite two nail polishes. OPI never disappoints

Title: Okay but certainly not great
Review: Not what I expected but then buying bras without trying them on is always somewhat tricky. My fault for ordering this in the first place.

Title: Two Stars
Review: These ear buds worked great for a few weeks but eventually the buttons stopped working.

Title: Marginal quality scrunchies; satin ones come terribly wrinkled Review: These scrunchies come in one flat compressed package. I had to be careful not to cut the scrunchies when opening the airless bag. Inside are 12 hair ties and one plastic bag as shown in my photo. The velvet hair ties are nice and look decent. The satin ones look terrible because they are incredibly wrinkled. There are six of each kind.

These ponytail holders are not plush or substantial like some others I tried before. They hold hair well, particularly the velvet ones; however, they are not high end.

The current price of $9.99 comes to $.83 cents per band which I actually feel is a bit pricey for these due to the quality. I do not feel these are worth more than $.50 cents per scrunchie--particularly the satin ones which look horrible.

Title: good product
Review: i didnt buy this specific one ... i got it on ebay for like $1.00  and it works great but i wouldnt pay 10 bucks for it  just saying  in fact i think there was 2 in the pack maybe for 2.00

Title: Helps to keep shoes from sticking
Review: They were too small to stretch over the toes of my shoes. I wear a size 10 shoe. They are not as slippery as other socks i have used.

Title: One Star
Review: The slit cuts up to your vag and the material is very thin and cheap.

Title: Was too small. Had to give them away.
Review: Was too small.  Had to give them away.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Refreshing forest fragrance.

Title: Pickleball??
Review: What the heck is pickleball?!?!

Title: Didn’t fit
Review: Couldn’t get it to fit on the iPad.

Title: Won’t last the day
Review: This removes bags under my eyes for a couple of hours but it’s much too expensive

Title: Not what it says
Review: It says 3/4 sleeve and it’s long sleeve :(((

Title: Blonde looks Auburn, and a bit shinny. Not a good look. Review: I ordered the Blonde, and on my eyebrows it comes out looking Auburn! Not a good look.
I have never had this happen before using any eyebrow blonde pencil before..

It also does not go on looking like small strokes. but more of a shiny wax type of pencil.
The price was too good to be true!

Title: convenient
Review: I have a whole DVD library that I will NOT be trading in for "blue ray"... and it is SO convenient to load up to 6 movies and watch a series or sequel set.  Nice.  Love it.  So far, works great.

Title: Spacious wallet w/9 card slots & a double billfold but this anthracite black shows all scratches Review: This is a tri-fold wallet with a center ID window. On the left and right folds there is room for four credit cards on each side if counting the slot behind each bank of three slots and a center ID window. There is also adouble billfold.

The front of the wallet has a nice lion's head embossing on it.

The wallet also comes with RFID protection to protect the credit cards fromscanners. However, I have no way of verifying if this works or not.

It also comes in an attractive giftable box.

In summary, the slots in this wallet allow for the easy retrieval of all cards. What I hate about this wallet is that the anthracite black color shows all the fingerprints and scratches as the surface making all imperfections visible. The leather is stiff but also on the thin side. I feel any price more than $10 for this version of the wallet is too much.

Title: I liked the T5'S why not try the T7.
Review: To soon for legitimate review as far as reliability. However, I do own two T5 Samsung SSD drives for photos and files respectfullythat are solid products. Lost files from traditional SATA drives twice, so trying these for legacy files.

Title: What's it do?
Review: Someone needs to decipher the description.

Title: Don't waste your money. Review: Doesn't work for long. Anything I plug into it doesn't have a connection after a few minutes. Such a waste.

Update: received a second one that did the exact same thing.

Title: LG AS110 3D glasses Review: Since we only got 2 pair of glasses with our 2010 LG 60" 3D TV we quickly learned it was hard to have company over to show off the 3D.
with prices ranging then from $100 and up a pair we decided to wait a bit.
The glasses work just like the more expensive pair we own and we noticed no difference in how they wear or battery life.
having 4x pair of 3D is nice. if the price falls back into the $30 range we'll get 2x more pair.
easy to charge, same issues w/ wear as other glasses (each person is unique).
too bad there aren't many great 3D movies out yet.

Title: These are ok.  They don't put out much scent
Review: I think the scent is lost down the drain.  I take hot showers so there is plenty of steam, but these just don't release much.  they do dissolve a little slower than other steamers I have tried.  I think it's a good idea, but maybe, should come in some kind of bag or something.  I have to keep kicking it back so it doesn't go into the drain.

Title: Does not match the description
Review: These did not match the description. My husband likes the button closure and that is what the description said. However, the ones shipped have the metal clasp closure. Not the first time the description didn't match the article on Amazon.

Title: No Almond scent, and thin lotion. Review: The ingredients in this seem ok, but I do not notice any Scent of Almond oil, which was the reason I was interested in this body lotion.
This is a body lotions, that I find very thin, and does nothing to help my older skin.!
I do like this is a easy to use pump, but the bright color of pink is tacky to put this on my kitchen counter or in my bathroom,
Or guest bathrooms.

Title: Too bland of a fragrance for my diffusers & I don't use it for other purposes Review: For .33 fluid ounces, the current price of $18.99 is very expensive for this. However, based on the description, this is harvested from trees that grow in the South American rainforest. I'm not sure if it actually comes from the Amazon or if Amazon trees are grown elsewhere and it is harvested in another location. Nevertheless, the description said it was sweet smelling. Therefore, I ordered it thinking it would be perfect for my diffuser. After trying this, it is very bland and has almost no scent worthy of sniffing.

Per the Amazon description, this type of essential oil "is a powerful anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antibacterial. The unique aroma and properties of this terpene can be utilized as a food additive, in cosmetics, creams, toothpaste, and other commercial products."  I suppose if one is using it for those purposes, it would be worthy of a higher rating. Unfortunately, I am disappointed as the statement "Copaiba Oil has a friendly, sweet aroma that encourages easy breathing" does not hold true for me.

Title: Great facial brush!
Review: This NewDermo cleansing brush is great. I use it daily each morning in the shower along with my favorite facial scrub and my skin feels incredibly smooth and clean after use. This brush holds a charge for quite a long time (I have been using it daily for almost 3 weeks now and haven't had to recharge it yet). I highly recommend this device to all people with all skin types. It's so important to take care of your skin and this NewDermo brush is a great way to start!

Title: Dry dry dry
Review: Dry dry dry. I purchased nude and it’s more like cantaloupe. Awful, not worth the drive to return it. I’m very disappointed.

Title: Surprisingly small, sample size product for the price
Review: [[VIDEOID:43f8815276ceb6c93e02e6f0b700ae75]] I was extremely surprised at the size of the highlighter stick ,I  wasn’t expecting a full size product for $19.99 ,nor was I expecting a sample size . That being said, I’m willing to give it a try, who knows, maybe it’s made with fairy dust and gold and will make me 10 years younger ? 😉 I worked in high end cosmetics for more than 15 years so I definitely have an opinion. I’ll update and let y’all know .

Title: Great but WAIT Review: Great Ebony Bronzer for my milk chocolate skin!

UPDATE: I had to stop using it. I have combo sensitive acne-prone skin. It broke me out. :-(

Title: Rollers wont stay in hair
Review: The rollers that come w/this product are impossible to use. They kept sliding off the hair. Save your $ on this one.

Title: Really nice hairbrush for men or women
Review: This is a great hairbrush. I love how I can use it on wet hair and it detangles my hair quickly and painlessly. I have been using this every morning for the past month and I can honestly say it's one of the best brushes I have ever used. Quality wood, strong bristles. Highly recommend.

Title: Moisturized my face and neck generously but does not absorb quickly; I love the clean smell Review: I applied this on my face and neck and avoided my eye area since there was no mention if I could use this for that area. The cream is semi-thick with a subtle clean fragrance that is attractive to me. This moisturized my face extensively and since I have dry skin, that is perfect. However, what I really do not like about this face cream is that it feels tacky on my face and neck for hours and does not absorb into the skin easily. Only after I woke up in the morning was the tackiness gone and that was probably because it was wiped off by my pillowcases. If it were not for this, then I would like this as a winter face and neck moisturizer.

A thin plastic applicator that looks like a small boomerang is included but I found it useless since it is flat. I just used my fingertips to gather and apply the moisturizer.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Very nice. I like the material and it fit well.

Title: Nice
Review: Great quality. Love Carter’s brand.

Title: Nice, warm, quality robe!
Review: This is a really nice, plush man's robe. First, the blue color is rich and regal looking. Second, the material is quality and super soft. Last, it is super warm and great for these cold mornings in northern Florida. My husband is 5'11" and weighs about 195 lbs and this one size fits him perfectly. This would make a terrific gift for the man you love!

Title: Breaks and crumbles
Review: I have used Mitchum deodorant for many years and have always been happy with it.However,with this formula it breaks apart and crumbles. I then have to throw away the pieces and it is wasted. I will go back to using the gel. Thanks

Title: Soft, stylish headband with ponytail hole; best for longer hair; runs a bit large
Review: This headband is soft, stylish, colorful, and well-made. However, it is best for longer hair. Also, the band runs on the larger side with a very large pontytail hole. I have short to medium length fine curly hair, and I cannot use the ponytail hole. However, even if I fasten this around my head, it wants to slide off. If one has a big head and a thick head of long hair, then this will work. This is definitely not suitable for me.

Title: One Star
Review: Useless

Title: Amazingly product was not bent or damaged, however the ...
Review: Amazingly product was not bent or damaged, however the box it was in showed signs of abuse. There was no packling to protect item and had a partial piece of plastic around it. Item came with one end cap no connectors for making connection inside the casing.

Title: nice ...but.........
Review: entirely TOOOOOOOO heavy for my use  i have to return it

Title: Not true to size
Review: I got these in a 3 x..which would be about size 12. I opened the package and did a hand stretch with them.. They are about size 8.. There is no way they will fit. Also there is the yoga waist band that is about 1 1/2 in wide. The seam from where the panty ends and meets the yoga strip doesnt even stretch as much as the panty part so I bet that will rip first. All in all the material is very soft and might be comfy if it was sized to fit.

Title: Tablet 10 inch, Android 8.1 Tablet PC, 16GB, 5G WiFi and Dual Camera, GPS, Bluetooth,
Review: Absolutely love this little tablet, works very well, just what I was looking for!

Title: Don't carry a camera without it!
Review: What a lifesaver!!!

Title: Nothing Like My Old Fire
Review: My old Fire ran out of space and it had no way of adding more memory. There was nothing left for me to delete. When I finally could afford a new one, it came as a huge disappointment. Yes, it's larger, yes, it has more features. It also has ads because I couldn't afford one without. Very difficult to navigate and although it took files from the old one, not one of my purchased books can be found on it, not in cloud (where is the cloud?). I'm 75 years old and pretty computer savvy, but this Fire is just too annoying to have to spend so much time trying to get what I need from it. My Gmail? Oh hell, I have to open a brand new account, seems it didn't transfer, and won't transfer. Not impressed.

Title: Its works "okay"
Review: This item was supposed to cause me less stress when trying to connect; however, I have to reset it at least 2x per day.

Title: My hair was too dark for this product to lift.
Review: My hair is medium brown.  I didn't expect it to lift my original color to this light of a color, but I did expect to see some lift.  It did cover the grays, but didn't lift the color off of the rest of my hair.  If your hair is a little lighter, I think this product would work great for you.

Title: Two Stars
Review: Did not work in my area.

Title: Not nude
Review: This is more brown than nude! Do not like at all.

Title: Cute, casual top & lots of compliments Review: Definitely a cute top, and very comfortable. The length was a bit on the shorter side though, even on my 5'4" frame, so I'd image it would be noticeably shorter on someone taller/with a longer torso.
It's survived a few trips through the washing machine and I haven't noticed any color fading.

Title: Five Stars
Review: Great iPad cover. Saw my brother with one and had to have it. Great product.

Title: Cute!
Review: These Guess sunglasses are cute and stylish. The arms don't seem very sturdy and I worry about the longevity. They provide adequate protection from the sun. They aren't too snug or tight. It comes with a decent storage case.

Title: Hard to see dial. No back light Review: I primarily wanted a small radio to listen to AM at night and this one turned out to be a challenge because there's no backlight on the
Tuning dial. It's impossible to read the dial. You can't tell which mode you're in ( AM, FM or Weather) because the writing is tiny.
Fortunately I tend to stay on one station most of the time because I listen to " Coast to Coast" on AM8.70. & I have mastered the Power Key & lock switches in the dark.
Reception is good and I use Sony headphones. With off brand headphones, not so good.
This radio is probably OK if you're using it when it's light but not in the dark.
Print on keys wears off quickly, less than 1 year use.

Title: Tile Pro
Review: The Tile Pro is not a good product, it does not track using your phone.

Title: Cute, but not for me
Review: Didn’t like the fit on me

Title: Concealed my blemishes when blended but am not fond of the applicator & it does not brighten
Review: I used this on my blemishes by blotting the problem spots and then blending.  However, I do not care for the wand applicator. I would have preferred a cream in a tube. Also, there is nothing "brightening" about this as it is a brownish or medium tan color.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Idea is great but not as "maneuverable"  as it appears

Title: Nice serum, but kind of expensive
Review: This is a nice facial serum. Absorbs quickly into my ski, goes on easily. My skin does feel softer and smoother after using it twice a day for almost 3 weeks now. It also does seem to be a little firmer as well. I am deducting a star because of the price. I have used many serums over the years now (I am 60 years old) and I have a lot of experience with different brands and their impact on my skin. This is really nice but not worth the $90 ticket price. If it goes on sale I would recommend it.

Title: Only for masks with thin ear elastics; not for eyeglasses Review: These chains have two purposes. They can either be worn as chain jewelry or to hook onto a mask that has a very thin elastic. The clasp is not easy to get around the elastic as I had to be careful to make sure the elastic was inside the hook. At one point I got it caught at the end of the hook simply because there is not much "hook" room to play with.

Nevertheless, I like these two chains. They come with a carry pouch as can be seen in my photo.

The current price of $7.41 is a reasonable $3.70 per chain. Note, however, that my absolute favorite mask chain is [[ASIN:B08HQZ1D1Z the Luxure Store Chain]], which is almost four times the price.

Title: Slipper sox are for winter, they are heavy knit
Review: I thought these would be more like Dr. Scholls slipper sox..these are heavy knit, I'm sure in winter they will be fine but it's too hot now....

Title: Great portable monitor
Review: Worked great for a vacation monitor. Had no issues with my MacBook. Good resolution, no dead pixels. Very easy to carry around

Title: Made in China that should stop you there.
Review: Made in China and not made very well for the price. Mine broke putting it on my jacket.

Title: Broken strap
Review: I purchased this for a 10 year old. He loved it but unfortunately the strap has broken already. Will not purchase again

Title: Save yourself the hassle....
Review: One of the applicators broke off into the tube the first time I pulled wand out. Defective. Also, the spoolies do not look anything like the ad picture. They are not big& fluffy.And the ad is misleading because it shows 2 tubes but you really only get one.I'm sending this back, I want a refund.

Title: So-So
Review: Overall worth the $11 I paid for it, but not much more.  Definitely better sound than the built in laptop speakers, but I was hoping for about 50% more volume since I'm using it in a large area with background noise.  The clips to attach to laptop are poorly designed as others have mentioned.

Title: Hard Pass
Review: Too wet, not waterproof and it's sticky.

Title: I hate the forest fragrance; otherwise it works like Epsom Salt Review: The forest fragrance has notes of fir, cedar, and spruce. Unfortunately, I absolutely hate the fragrance as it smells dirty to me.  Nevertheless I tried this in a hand bath. Since there were no directions on the package, I used 1/4 cup in warm to hot water. It took a long time (about 10 minutes) for the salts to dissolve. My hands came out feeling soft.

The only difference to me between this and Epsom salt is that this has a fragrance and typical Epsom salts do not. However, some of today's Epsom salts have fragrances but they are not as good as this.

The current price of $28 is extremely pricey for this especially when there are probably only four servings in this container. Since I cannot stand the fragrance, I would not purchase this no matter how cheap it was. I am never using this one again.

Title: Run small, stretchy. Review: I took my chance ordering these pants, as it did Not say the size, big mistake!
I wear a size 8 or 10.
These pants are a size 3 or maybe 5, and are stretchy. .
I have very skinny ankles, that I can put my fingers around, even though these are skinny jeans, that I do wear,
The legs are tight.,
My daughter is 5’9, wears a 5, and these pants fit her a bit tight!

The material seems nice but on the thin side.
I would say, size up.

Title: Disappointed , baggy, big, did not shrink. Review: So disappointed !
I didn’t expect these to be this baggy, and I’m a older women.
There not any type of yoga pants that I have ever bought before.
I put this in the washer and dryer hoping they would shrink, and smooth down.
Which they didn’t.
I’m 5’2, 128 lbs.
I should have ordered a Medium Not Large at least they would have fit.
I do have sweat pants in large that fit smoother ,nicer and a better material
then these are.
These do have two pockets on each side that is nice, but not flattering.
The bottom of the legs have a nice knit cuff , but there big and hangy,
And just long enough to come to the bottom of my ankle bone almost.
The material is like a cheesy polyester.
These will probably fit my husband!

That said since the Covid I’m home almost all of the time, and these pants
I can wear around the house.

Title: Body mist
Review: Spray

Title: Spiked hair is a little outdated but can be fun!
Review: This works well without the glossy shine. It's not so much of a wet look as the other gels. If you are into the spiked look, give this one a try.  Don't forget you also get the great Axe scent.  Remember, it drives the girls wild!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Wish this would of lasted longer

Title: Underwhelming
Review: The earrings came in a box that didn’t appear to go with it and the backing was separated in the box. While they looked ok okay, I felt they were very cheap and badly presented. I wouldn’t recommend.

Title: Good gloves! Review: I just got these, but they seem very well made and sturdy. Outdoor Research is an excellent company and I have three other items from them, all of which are well made.

I measured my hands and compared to the company's size chart before ordering. They fit great. They work well with my phone.

These are very thick gloves - heavyweight, as it says. The packaging clarifies that they are designed for 20-40F weather and can be used as a liner.

I got the cacao color which in person is a warm brownish purple/plum. It's a nice color but I bought them for warmth and fit.

Title: Great and lots of choices on lashes easy
Review: The magnetic eyeliner and eyelashes kit was actually a great choice for me first time using magnetic. These lashes were very easy to apply. I gave adhesion 4 stars but that might have been the way I applied eyeliner?? They did stay put except for a little on end so probably me. I love the fact you have choices and easy to remove makeup remover or baby oil. I highly recommend especially if never tried great price.

Title: camera
Review: Over all its about the same as the camera I was replacing, but I was disappointed to find out after I received it, that it operated on regular batteries and not rechargeable permanent.

Title: Computer guy said maybe to big for my reader
Review: Did not work for me

Title: Nail buffer works okay but Clippers are junk
Review: Would have given this a 5-star rating but the first time I use the nail clippers they broke. Both pairs. Very cheaply made.

Title: The color is not right
Review: The color on the screen and the color you get is way off.  I got soft honey and my hand next to the screen matches the color. The bottle of soft honey is at least 5 shades darker than what's shown. Very dark tan color. I'm a light color with soft pink.

Title: Glad I browsed through Amazon and found it
Review: Works perfectly: Glad I browsed through Amazon and found it:

Title: Five Stars
Review: Just wonderful. Exactly what I wanted to use at the ballgames!

Title: These came and are completely Rotted
Review: I have bought this product before so I know this is a bad batch. The product has rotted, the smell literally permeated like rotten garbage and the serums/products are cloudy and off color. I dared to put on the night serum, thinking is is just me? No. I woke up to a face full of red itchy bumps. I have to throw out.

Title: Headphones
Review: Headphones work great.

Title: Four Stars
Review: Nice thick scarf. Good color

Title: Philosophy Purity
Review: I've used philosophy products for many years... I sometimes venture out and try something "new" or different and bounce right back to Philosophy particularly with their cleansing line.  There is little out there that can top Purity... I've tried HUGELY more expensive brands and WAY cheaper ones.  Purity works very well - gently - but effectively... I like the faint, clean scent and it has never caused my skin any issue of any kind. Have been nervous to try buying through amazon with all the reports of fake products but so far so good. However, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Really nice tropical shirt for the money!!!
Review: This is a really nice casual shirt. Similar to Tommy Bahama or Margaritaville brands, but at much less of a cost. My husband looks perfect in this and a size large fits him perfectly (5'11", 195 lbs). Colorful and well made, this would make a great holiday gift for the man you love. It's also not too flashy looking, low profile print looks terrific on. Highly recommend!

Title: I needed a good size hand mirror framed in plastic to hang under ...
Review: I needed a good size hand mirror framed in plastic to hang under water in my turtle tank. This is perfect. The turtles love it!

Title: Three Stars
Review: makes the data connected sound when plugged into my computer, that's scary.

Title: Moisturizes eye area well but package says "avoid contact with eyes"; I love my Nuxe or Oil of Olay more than this Review: I prefer my Nuxe pump eye cream and my Oil of Olay over this. I blended around the orbital bone as instructed even though it said in the next sentence to avoid contact with the eyes. Since it is eye cream that worried me.

I used this morning and night over and under my eyelids. It is moisturizing but, as a rule, I avoid eye creams that are for the eye yet say "avoid contact with the eyes." If it did not say that, I would have rated this 4 stars as it does moisturize. Nevertheless, I prefer Nuxe or Oil of Olay over this. There's also a slight smell to this cream that is neither pleasant or unpleasant to my nose. Personally, I would prefer a nice fragrance or non at all.

Title: It feels like this leaves a film on my hair; I’m not crazy about this duo – 2.5 stars Review: There are two 16.9 ounce bottles in this set of shampoo and conditioner. Although there is the typical medicinal fragrance of tea tree oil, it is not overpowering as I expected, which is good. However, the shampoo does not lather copiously and it does not spread easily. I feel like a film is left behind on my hair. The conditioner also feels the same way but not as bad. My short to medium fine curly hair turned out lackluster after using these products.

The current price of $23.95 ($25.95 minus $2) comes to $11.98 per bottle, which is reasonable. I just wish I liked this more.

Title: Yucky
Review: Did not come up any where near what I thought it would I do not like this at all

Title: Leaves my skin smooth and silky but I do not care for this lavender fragrance
Review: This eight fluid ounce bottle of oil is wrapped extremely well in plastic to avoid leakage. The oil is light and thin but does moisturize and leave my skin silky. Unfortunately, I do not care for this lavender fragrance. The current price of $12.97 is reasonable for this.

Title: Difficult to attach to the wall
Review: On the top the cord blocks the middle hole so it is impossible to attach a screw there.  I am returning it.

Title: A+
Review: Excellent brush set

Title: 0.5 ounces
Review: I was expecting a large jar from the picture. This is a lotion and not a cream. I felt nothing special about the product that a decent lotion wouldn't provide.

Title: Don't buy
Review: Broke super easy

Title: Awkward, big and bulky! Review: This is a very awkward piece of hair styling equipment. In one Ad it shows 2 pieces. Like one piece is a dryer and one piece is a comb. Apparently, this is to show you the inside of this. It does not come apart. It is bulky and hard to figure out exactly the process for straightening your hair. This is NOT a dryer / straightener. The instructions that come with this product clearly state, use only on dry hair. I tried finagling this thing for about an hour. You can straighten small pieces of hair by sort of acting like your coming your hair.
I would not recommend this product. I returned mine.

Title: Great
Review: Great! Fits as expected. I got a 3X. I’m 5’4”, 240, 44DDD.

Title: Slow cluttered progaming,slow speeds,bad audio and battery Review: The screen quality looked like it had bad filter turned on,especially while watching various TV shows. The speakers wear very basic and didn't have any surround sound quality to it.
The Tablet seem to be tripping over its own programing(slow to load, like a device that is old and worn out, and maybe has to be cleared of all the programing clutter) like a old device the has to be reset to factory, even though its brand-new.
Simple settings like wifi buried under layers steps just to change something or reconnect to a device.

Title: “Tissue-sized” wipes that are as strong as baby wipes but they are dry; they hold up well when wet Review: I ordered one pack which only has 70 tissues. Note that it says a six-pack no matter the pack size and that is incorrect.

They look and almost feel exactly like unscented tissues. However, they perform very well. These are strong and hold up when wet to pick up messes, clean urine off a litter pan, etc. They are perfect for cleaning a baby's bottom or pet's bottom as well. I use these to clean my cat's urine off the walls of the litter pan but I wet the wipe first. They can be used to remove make-up with soap and water.

These are expensive. At the current price of $9.90 it comes to $.14 cents per wipe, which is about $.10 to $.12 cents more than wet baby wipes can be purchased for. Also a big negative to me is that there is no perforation in the package. Instead I have to cut the side open to extract the wipes.

Title: Look elsewhere for a good bubble bar Review: This is called a bubble bar, yet produced essentially no bubbles. All it did was color the water and leave a very faint scent. I like to support small businesses and have purchased many handmade bath products from sellers on etsy and thought this would also be good, especially priced at $5.99 for two "bubble bars", but I wouldn't repurchase these.

I took a chance on this since there were no other reviews, but I should have looked at feedback left for the seller themselves since my experience was similar to others. It came packaged in a plastic bag and was broken. This isn't a huge deal to me since it's not like it's something to be displayed, but that combined with the fact that it didn't even work just left the impression of it being a really shoddy product. The way that these are packaged needs to be redone for sure.

Title: did not work well and had to return
Review: It was inconsistent and didn't sound good.  Didn't work with all my components. I think I will start looking at sonos or something....

Title: AS Advertised!
Review: THe quality is excellent, very well made. However Their must be a better design for folding the cover backward to stand the unit vertically. trying to slide the cover under a stiff tap is ridiculous! Half the time it slides out and collapses. Come on Guys, hire and engineer to do it better!

Title: Everything fits fine, but arms are too big for me
Review: I sized down and the arms are still big on me. The rest fits fine (but I did note “Too Large” on the fit survey if you’re looking at that is something you are looking into. If you’ve had a tremendous amount of weight loss and have skinny but batwing upper arms similar to mine you’ll want to size down at least one size. I wish I had sized down 2 sizes. I’m not sure if the chest band will be too tight if I order the next smaller size, though, but I know the arms will be better. I’ll rewrite my review if I opt to get the smaller size.

Title: It's okay
Review: Sometimes I gotta repeat myself and yell.... but it eventually hears me

Title: One Star
Review: Not a very nice watch, the color on the band fades quickly,  don't RECCOMENDED THIS

Title: flat zippered makeup organizer
Review: I actually purchased these to keep my personal nail tools in and bring to my nail appointments.  My nail tech likes that they are flat and spreads out the files, tools, clippers out in a way that is easy to grab what she needs.  They are clear, thick vinyl like material. The zipper is sturdy.  They aren't going to last for ever, but they will last for a few years I think.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Great price
Review: Lightweight, soft and comfy.  Love them and they fit under my gloves too.  These are lightweight, so if you are looking for thick gloves, this would not be a good purchase for you.

Title: Amazing way for the man in your life to take care of his skin!
Review: My son is far from being a metrosexual, but he is getting older now (35) and I think he is finally realizing that he needs to take care of his skin to begin minimized the effects of aging. This is a great daily scrub, he uses it in the shower. He loves the masculine scent and his skin feels smooth and soft after using. This has become part of his morning routine now and I have already ordered him another tube. Highly recommend!

Title: Do Not But-Top fits LOUSY/Bottom half OK
Review: Top leaves much of back exposed due to hinge flap and no matter how much you adjust the front of the “top” there’s a big exposed white section so it looks cheap and out of tolerance. CRAP

Title: Absolute waste of $
Review: These are so cheap, they dont stay on the ear piece.  Absolute waste  of $

Title: Great set of hair clippers!
Review: During this pandemic, I was looking for a good set of hair clippers to use on my two grandsons and my husband. This is a great clipper device. It fits well in my hand and is super easy to maneuver (especially around a squirming 2 and 5 year old). It comes with a load of attachments so it easily goes from doing the hair to trimming the back of the neck to getting rid of those sideburns. Comes in a great box as well, good for gift giving. Highly recommend!

Title: Good large-sized buff puffs that create copious suds but it's loosely wound Review: Mesh buff puffs are the only thing I use in the shower besides a back brush. I love them because they generate a lot of suds and they provide good coverage during showering. These are large and similar to the ones I buy at Walmart for $2 each. There are four puffs and they work like any other mesh loofah I regularly use. I have no idea what it means to have this charcoal infused but I notice no difference in sponge quality or performance over my typical Walmart sponges.

However, what I am disappointed about is that they arrived loosely wound (see photo that shows long pieces sticking out). I do not feel these will last long because of this and that is the only reason I rated these 3 stars.

The current price of $9.99 comes to a competitively priced $2.50 each puff. If these puffs were not so loosely wound, they would have gotten 5 stars from me.

Title: they work
Review: for the price they work. i have a hard time keeping them in my ears while running, a little annoying but not a deal breaker

Title: 50' ft phone cord
Review: Have ONE corded phone in the house for when the power goes out and where it is, is a distance from the plug in... so rather pay the  $300 for the phone company to come out and install just ONE outlet... I went this way.  Works as it should.. a connection to a corded phone a million miles (ok.. just about 30 feet) from the phone outlet.

Title: Cheap metal makes my skin break out.
Review: Cheap metal makes my skin break out.  Tried coating with nail polish which didn't help much.

Title: batiste dry shampoo
Review: the best blonde dry shampoo I have found.  Hard to find locally, but easy on Amazon.  It doesn't flake off.. lasts all day...washes out easily.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful

Title: Partial power
Review: Didnn my t use right away and now Nilotic al plugs work

Title: Doesn't Work
Review: After research about generic/CHI brands, this flat iron seemed to have the best ratings. The directions those who have fine hair (me), the setting doesn't need to be at 450. The 450 setting doesn't work to straighten my hair or get that hot/My hair is a tad more soft but that's it/The Argan Oil was pictured in a small bottle; it came in a small flat package. No response from customer service.

Title: Remover is great, bottle needs work
Review: I would have given this 5 stars across the board, however they need to work on the design of the bottle. As in other reviews, the bottle shrinks up when you use it. Also, if you aren't careful you can initiate the pump too easily. Just make sure you have a cotton ball or remover pad over the opening to avoid the liquid from spurting out. The remover is great & works quickly, just think the bottle needs work.

Title: Did not work on my laptop
Review: It is nice player, just make sure compatible with your computer.

Title: Great
Review: They are great in design but i ordered wide and expected it when i did not.  I was not enthusiastic about the width but maybe i can get them wet and stretch them.

Title: Runs small
Review: I wanted a loose fitting shirt to exercise in so I ordered a size up.  It was extremely tight in the chest.  Very disappointing since I liked the color and lightweight material.

Title: Not true to size
Review: I got a 1x hoping it was ok but it is more of a smaller medium..so its not true to size. It is a beautiful green with pink and white flowers. The skirted part has a nice flow to it..good for twirling lol. Nice length on the dress and sleeves. The material is good quality and stretchy. Too bad it is too small.

Title: Low under the arms, not real comfortable Review: The material is nice, not a bright color of lavender that I was afraid it was going to be.

I do not see a size in this , but I assume it’s a medium!
I put this on over my head, then pulled it down.
The cut for me is odd.
I’m a older women, 5’2, 126 lbs, size 8….
bra size 34 to 36 B, or C.
This is cut low under the arms and is not flattering for me, there are cups in this, but under the bust this fabric curls up on me.
Straps are thin and cannot be adjusted, but they need to be pulled up a bit for me.
Also not too comfortable.

I would say if your 100, to 110lbs, small busted this would fit and be comfortable.

Title: Comfortable
Review: Was hoping that these jeans were not too heavy. Got them and they are perfect. On the lighter side as far as  material. just what I wanted

Title: Didn’t receive the colors pictured
Review: I didn’t get the colors pictured in the 2 pack! One was supposed to be pink and the other a black snake skin look!  It was not stated that they would be a random pic!  I kept them but am disappointed!! Now I’ll try and track them down at Target!

Title: Micheal Kors
Review: Beautiful watch and its not a fake. My only comment is that you need to be prepared bc this is a heavy watch.

Title: Protective
Review: Sturdy

Title: Blonde came out Dark brown on my eye brows, I looked like I had man brows. A joke! Review: I’m fair with light eyebrows. When i used this revlon blonde eyebrow marker my eye brows where a very dark brown,
And looked like I had thick dark brown Mens eye brows.
It was laughable.

The other side of the stick you unscrew, and has a very small round sponge, I think that might have powder on it to be used under your Eyebrow to look good!
I could not tell that I put anything on my brow bone!

I put this on the inside if my wrist from this pencil, looks to be some type of a light color liquid that dries fast.!

Might work well for someone else, but not me.

Title: Great above average, high quality wireless headset!
Review: I love these wireless Shure earphones. In the morning when I go for my walkout with my dog, they are a staple with my attire and allow me to listen to my audio books without the hassle of wires connected to my iphone. Shure has been a staple to me since I was in my twenties (I actually used to be in a band and had Shure microphones), so I can testify to the quality of the Shure name (I like their sound quality better than my Bose headphones at about a third of the price). These are noise isolating and will work wonderfully for air travel as well.These would make a great Christmas gift for someone you love.

Title: Everyone should own this radio in the event of an emergency!
Review: This is a super nice transistor radio. I love the large LED display, is visible from very far away (and with my eyesight is a great feature). Antenna really pics up neighboring stations easily and clearly. I was in the market for a quality battery operated radio to have around my house in the event of a power outage (I am in rural Florida and this happens quite often). Highly recommend this radio for anyone in the market for one.

Title: Best leggings ever
Review: I've never given a 5 star review before so get these pants. I'm 5 10 about 160lbs and got a tall large. They are amazing. So comfy

Title: Gives my lips that Porcelain Doll look; too light for my taste but great for mixing Review: First of all, this says a pack of 12 but since there is no price, I cannot be sure that is correct. I received only one lipstick. Vine reviewers usually only receive one of an item when it says that on the Vine page. However, it did not say that this time, so it is possible the product description is wrong on the Amazon site. 4TIFY lipsticks run about $10 to $15 each so if the price is in that range, then it is only for one lipstick.

This lipstick is true to color. It has a porcelain doll look to it which is very fleshy looking. It is too light to make my lips pop. I can use this to tone down darker colors but I personally do not care for this color on my fair skin. Nevertheless, 4TIFY lipsticks in general are excellent from what I have been trying but this one misses its mark for me.

Title: Cute, but fabric is thinner than I would like Review: I love wearing long maxi skirts in the summer! This one is made out of a very soft fabric. I wouldn't call it sheer, but it does allow some light to shine through thus showing the outline of your legs. The skirt is well made, but I found it to be just a little too large. I am a plus size 5'6" mom. I usually wear a size 18. I ordered the 1x and it was a little too big. It wasn't falling off by any means, but I would have preferred a slightly tighter fit. It does show all the curves and bumps and lumps. I would wear this during the evening time slot when the sunlight won't shine through the fabric and reveal my legs!

*I purchased this at a discounted price in exchange for my honest & unbiased review. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

Title: Item not as described, did not fit my laptop
Review: Did NOT fit my Dell Inspiron M5030. The tip won't fit the little jack on the side of my laptop. Bought a quality adapter/charger straight from Dell, cost $59.99 but 90w (better than 65w with this model) and it FITS.

Title: True to color
Review: Very pretty and color nice.

Title: Good
Review: Good but too small

Title: maybelline tattoo ink eye liner crayon
Review: This is a pointed, rollup crayon.  Sadly there is no sharpener so it's best the first couple of uses and then is rounded.  If you smudge with the foam tip - you probably won't care.  If you like a fine, precise line - like I do, it's less good.  It stays on for a day.  Does wash off with proper cleansing. I purchased dark brown and black.  Both are strong, accurate colors.  Just wish we could sharpen.

Title: Great shave but overpriced
Review: Gave this to my husband to try. He may be old school (he just recently turned 60), but he really wasn't impressed. He likes his shaving cream to be the shake up and foam on type. This goes on almost like a lotion and when shaving he doesn't even see it. He told me he likes the old fashioned kind of foam as he can always immediately see if he missed any areas. On the plus side, he loved the way his skin felt after shaving, said it was one of the nicest/closest shaves he has had. But, for the money for such a small tube, he felt it was over priced.

Title: really pretty
Review: this is for a christmas gift for my BFF  i get her a few little things here and there  i hope she loves this  nicer than i thought and it came in a pretty velvet bag

Title: THE QUALITY IS AMAZING, THE CHARGE LASTS FOREVER AND IT HAS A GREAT PRICE!
Review: This Bluetooth speaker is the best I’ve ever run across!  My son bought one, and I as SO impressed that I bought one, too!  I use it with 2 iPad mini’s and my iPhone XR, and my son uses it on his Android phone, with the same great results. The charge lasts forever and the quality is amazing!! {And no, I am NOT being paid for this review. What you read is what I mean.} Given the quality of this speaker, the price is incredible!

Title: Great UV protection in a convenient spray!
Review: I need to begin by saying I love La Roche and Ahava products. Use both exclusively in my daily skin regimen and my 60 year old skin looks better than it did 20 years ago (no kidding). I love this light spray. Easy to apply, strong enough to block UVA rays, and is non greasy. I had never used a spray UV product before and I must admit I am sold. I love the way I can apply it quickly to my legs and arms. For my face, I sprayed it into my hand and applied. No residue, nice smell. Very pleased.

Title: CHEAP, CHEAP, CHEAP - just like a $1 store brush
Review: This feels like a $1 store brush priced at $7.99. It is super cheap and feels horrible to hold. The only thing that it has going for it is that it is lightweight and it does brush my hair. It is best for the detangling in the shower or just blow drying on vacation when one wants to carry a lightweight brush. Nevertheless, I would pass on this one. It feels super cheap.

Title: Love the colors
Review: I really like the cut of the parties but they should use elastic that doesn’t irritate the skin

Title: Great little wireless mouse!
Review: This is a reasonably priced wireless mouse. Fits well in my hand and is super easy to maneuver. I have been using this mouse for over a month now and I have to admit, it's one of the nicest mice I have ever used. I do a lot of spreadsheet details for work and this mouse is quick and accurate. Highly recommend if you are in the market for a new mouse.

Title: It's a cheap iPad cover, what can I say
Review: It does what it's supposed to do; cover the iPad.  Fits good but not the greatest in folding the top cover back to hold the iPad in a tilted position.  I touched the screen and it fell over.

Title: Seem like good quality overall but the keyboard is very loud
Review: Seem like good quality overall but the keyboard is very loud. That's the risk you take buying online and not trying it out first. I have had higher level logitechs in the past that were soft touch.

Title: Cute, But Runs Small
Review: These are cute, basic casual sandals. They don't have any support of any kind. The straps are thin, but attached well.  I was excited for my 17 year old daughter to have some new summer sandals. Unfortunately they run really small and narrow. My daughter wears a size 9 shoe. Normally, sizing wouldn't really be an issue with shoes like this because they're practically open all around. However, the straps are too tight on her and she couldn't slip her foot all the way in it. She might have had better luck if her feet were super narrow. As it is, her feet aren't particularly wide.

Title: Great low price mouse, another great Amazon Basics product.
Review: Great basic mouse, comes in a variety of colors. No issues at all with it. Easy to connect and easy to use. Fits well in my hands and maneuvers well. For less than $8.00 it's a great mouse to use for your computing needs.

Title: Slightly Smaller Than Needed
Review: Well made, but just ever so slightly smaller than what we need. My husband has had to trim just about everything that he keeps in his wallet insert.

Title: Broken
Review: The fact that it arrived broken. Will not buy again

Title: Best facial wash for men!
Review: My husband has been using this nightly to wash off the effects of daily dirt. His facial skin (in combination with other Sky Organic products) has never looked better. It is so important to take care of our skin as we age and, unfortunately, most men have not recognized this need. This is a great facial wash, cleans without drying skin, and leaves the skin looking clean and refreshed. Highly recommend. Would make a great stocking stuffer stuffer for the man that you love in your life!

Title: disappointing
Review: very disappointed -  the holes for the turn screws werent drilled properly  the parts didnt sit flush  so i have a return in progress  i really wanted this but oh well life goes on

Title: Shrinkage
Review: Lost a size or two in washing/drying

Title: So behind on keystrokes showing up on computer, keys are hard, lights are a joke! Review: If you want a conversation piece to show people the lights, make sure they don't blink because lights turn off so fast and you are left with a dark keyboard until you touch a key or wake the mouse. The keys are HARD and that makes typing difficult for a writer that thinks on the keystroke. The price is outrageous for such a piece of plastic garbage. My daughter bought me one for HALF the price and the keys are so easy and the response time on that wireless keyboard is instant. So unless you just like an arcade 'lights up' type of toy, spend half the money and get a real, functional keyboard and mouse and forgo the quickly vanishing, uneven lights. Never will fall for a 2-only reviews of item, when only one shows. Going back as fast as UPS can drive.
Added note: Company offered a $20 gift card if I would delete this review. This review stands, I will not delete it for a price, that alone should warn you about this company!

Title: trimmer set
Review: Husband has a beard and mustache - as he has a full face of hair so this trimmer helps to keep things neat.  It comes with a nice zippered bag to keep all the pieces.  I am hoping that the stainless steel aspect means the blade will last longer.  Was easy to charge, set up and use.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: A great product
Review: Fits great. Highly recommended this durable product

Title: Too narrow
Review: I loved these shoes but they were too narrow for my feet in the toe area, even after sizing up .5 size.

Title: Great smoothing cleanser for men!
Review: My 36 year old son who typically hates men 'beauty products' loves Jack Black products. This exfoliating cleanser is no exception. He uses it in the shower every morning and he has told me he loves the fragrance (musky scent) and the way his skin looks and feels. It is not a strong exfoliator but enough to keep his skin feeling soft and smooth and aids in his shaving. He highly recommends!

Title: Smells Great Hope it Works Review: smells good i could smell it before i opened it and i know this is a good company so im hoping for some good results and that it works as good as it smells
UPDATE: so far so good !! love it
UPDATE: i cant stand the can - hard to open with arthritic hands i have to get a small container to scrape it into but i do love the cream

Title: My new favorite shampoo and conditioner!
Review: I have been getting keratin treatments a few times a year for quite a while now. I need to use sulfate shampoos to help prolong the effects, which usually means I am spending more than normal on shampoos. When I saw this combo I had to try it. I love the fact that it contains keratin and that it is sulfate free. It lathers up great and smells wonderful. My hair looks and feels softer and shinier than it has in years and I know it is prolonging my treatments. I highly recommend this shampoo and conditioner to anyone who wants to use quality products and have their hair looking and feeling great!

Title: Manicure bench is narrow, tall, slippery, & it smells Review: At the current price of $15.99, this manicure bench is more reasonably priced than a competitor with the same bench. The quality of the workmanship is pretty good but the legs elevate this bench about 5.25 "off the ground. Since the bench is narrow on top, the person leaning their hands may have a tendency to tip this over. In addition, there are no rubber feet on the "legs." As a result, it is necessary to put a towel under this bench to keep it from slipping when placed on a solid non-stick surface.

Other than this, this bench is very nice. If it were lower to the ground, about two inches wider, and had rubberized feet on the bottom, this would have received 5 stars. In its current state it is functional but not the best it could be. The fact that it smells is also bothersome to me. I suppose it could double as a child's pretend ironing board.

Title: Stopped using
Review: I tried this product for a week and am going to stop. It irritated my eyes pretty bad the first couple days even though I wiped excess serum off the applicator and applied a minimal amount above my lashes like liquid eyeliner. I stuck with it and the irritation went away but I don’t feel comfortable using it with the potential side effects that these products with prostaglandins have.
