I believe this product is a quality product similar to Latisse, but I don’t think it’s for me. You should definitely do some research before using and decide if the benefits are worth the risk.

Title: It is hard to keep thw nail clean from dirt
Review: Ok only down side is that the coating attracts dirt. It's hard to keep it from getting dirty even tho i was my hands 1000 times a day the coating you can tell attracts dirt.

Title: Doesn't cool gaming laptops well Review: I love the sound and it's heavy but comfortable.....however the cooling aspect is a joke. My laptop, ASUS Republic of gamers, was overheating so I had to switch cooling mats making this an expensive speaker dock for our crappy laptop.

I regret this purchase.

Title: Decent quality and works right where it is supposed to.
Review: I could not get it to work and the instructions were sketchy, at best. Grrr...

Title: Great slipper
Review: This slipper is great quality and value. I think this slipper will last longer compared to other affordable slippers I have purchased

Title: This is my favorite deodorant, and it is less expensive to buy ...
Review: This is my favorite deodorant, and it is less expensive to buy twin packs on line than in a drugstore.

Title: Easy and does what it needs to do!
Review: I always thought these were for men. Not true! This is easy, painless and discreet. Women don’t have bushy nose hairs like men, but if you like to have a beautiful appearance this is the perfect item.

Title: Nice card, a bit loud when fans are maxed
Review: Beautiful card. Runs well and seems solid. My only complaint is when it winds up to full speed it's a bit loud and when it's at full load it gets hot with the stock fan curve. Stays below 60 when fans are blasting though.

Title: Cheap dollar store combs; work as designed but will break easily
Review: These combs are so cheap that they feel like they are from the dollar store. They work as designed but I feel like they won't last. Just combing through my hair makes it feel like the tines will break. The current price of $8.99 is too much for this as it comes to $2.25 per comb. I would not expect to pay more than $.75 cents per comb based on the quality.

Title: Doesn't last don't buy
Review: I really liked this when I got it but it only lasted 6 months.  In the meantime I bought another one and it only lasted 6 months.  Also the blue tooth connection was very poor and didn't work all the time.

Title: Won as a Gift at Holiday Party
Review: I really enjoy Alexa

Title: Not great for fine or thinning hair.
Review: Love the concept and if you have regular hair - or plenty of it - this item will work for you. For those of us born with fine hair, we live vicariously through those with great hair.

Title: Cute Print, But Unflattering on Me
Review: I have ordered a few different tops from this brand. Pay attention to their size chart! They run about a size smaller. If you follow their chart, you'll be fine. I'm a size 16 and ordered my usual size, XL. Unfortunately for me, their XL is more of a 14. I should have ordered the next size. If I had looked at their size chart in advance, I would have known. Regardless of the sizing issue, which is my fault, the shirt is just okay. The fabric is soft. The baby doll style is very unattractive on me. I would prefer a little longer shirt. This one goes up too much when I raise my arms up. I found the arms to be a bit tight, which is probably because I ordered the wrong size. I wasn't a fan of the lace up neckline either. It was very unflattering on me. The quality seems fine. I liked the print of the fabric.

Title: This smells like macaroons and does not have enough product in each towelette to be moisturizing for me Review: This review is for the face and body towelettes. There are 10 single use towelettes (price unknown) in the box the size of a disposable hand wipe. The towelette is hard because the coconut oil has solidified. The action of applying it against my skin melted the oil slightly so that I could apply it.

To me this is not worth the purchase. It smells like macaroons which is off putting. The smell does dissipate after application, however. There is not enough oil to do more than my hands and one arm and the amount was too small to have much moisturizing effect. In a pinch on-the-go this is better than nothing but I am disappointed.

Title: Smells awful, has orange tinge, & is sticky slimy; disgusting; went right in the garbage
Review: This pack of four anti-aging serums smells so bad that I had to suppress a dry heave. In addition, the gel has an orange tinge to it. It goes on sticky and slimy and is absolutely disgusting. I threw this right in the garbage.

Title: Arrived very wrinkled
Review: Spent 25 min ironing the terrible wrinkles. Runs very large.

Title: This is a bare bones basic curling iron; good for tight curls on very short hair Review: This review is for the 9mm Curling Iron-Pink.

I have short to medium fine curly hair and I can get even a more tighter curl with this iron. However, it is a bare bones model. There is a light telling the user when it has reached a certain temperature (meaning it stopped blinking); however, it is hard to see because it is the same color as the iron (reddish pink). There's a loosey goosey on/off switch on the one side and a sticky temperature control that goes from 80 to 230 degrees. Nevertheless, this all works.

The kick-stand is good as is the swivel cord ability.

This makes my curls tighter because of the small barrel. If one is looking for a tight curl and wants a super basic curling iron, then this is it.

Title: They look like orthopedic shoes in person- way cooler in online picture.
Review: The shoes that arrived were too big for me despite me ordering my usual size. They also run really wide! Buy these if you want to look like Tiny Tim in orthopedic boots.

Title: OK but a little too short
Review: was a gift for a friend  she said it was OK but a bit too short so she has to wear spank under it  she ordered a medium and said it was a little small for a medium

Title: good product at a decent price
Review: perfect fit in 3.5 slot. . .the dual holder allows to install extra SSD any time. . . or you can go with a HDD for more storage space

Title: Product runs small.
Review: Was going to buy a size 4 and they were out of stock. Went up to a size 5 hoping she could wear them longer. Was extremely small. I’m

Title: Overheat, flicker not happy
Review: I got these do to the review and the first cable with in 2 days started to flicker charging. The second one is overheating and my phone is only at 46%.

Title: Great for men!
Review: My husband has never considered himself a metrosexual kind of guy. But now that he is in his 60's he's become more aware of how important it is to take care of his skin. This is a really nice pack of products from cleanser to moisturizers it's a nice way for him to start a regimen. Also comes in a nice box and would make a great holiday gift for the man you love.

Title: Blah
Review: I brought these to hold up my Thunda Thigh socks. Iam a size 18/20 with thick thighs. These still allowed my socks to fall down. May work for you though.

Title: Static - sometimes
Review: This works great with my headphones in the house.  In my Mini Cooper, which is why I purchased this aux cable I get a horrible static buzz in my right front speaker.  I DO NOT get that noise with my radio or CD player.  I am 🙁

Title: Not that well made
Review: “Fingers” loose.

Title: jumbo clear cosmetic zippered case
Review: I purchased this to hold a bunch of velcro like rollers I use on occasion.  It's perfect for that as it is clear and you can see what's in it!  The zipper is a bit of a challenge. Partly because the case comes folded flat.  I recommend you heat for just a few seconds in your dryer (I have a dryer closet so it didn't tumble - but warmed up) and so I could more easily unfold it without damaging the bag.  The zipper had a really big tongue on it - thank goodness - other wise it might impossible to zip.  The square top is another part of the challenge to the zipper because it's a sharp edge on both ends - requiring both hands at the very least.  They could have made the zipper just open the top, and not go down the sides, solving the zipper challenge, BUT it wouldn't open as wide.  Eh. That is kind of a bummer.  But it isn't fatal to me - just annoying - lost a star for that.  It is plastic and so it could become torn or pierced - I recommend light use.  The handles are a woven cloth like feel to them and the handles are very long. Works for me.

Title: Really makes my body feel silky and moisturizes well but I cannot stand the chemical aroma
Review: I was surprised by the large quantity of cream at 15 ounces. This can be used on the face and body and I have been applying it to my body. The thick cream moisturizes well and I feel it is comparable to most other moisturizers I use. I would not consider this any more anti-aging than any other thick moisturizer. The major issue I have with this cream is that I really dislike the chemical smell.  If it had a pleasing fragrance, I would have rated this 4 stars.

Title: No credit card slots
Review: I was hoping this could be used as a wallet, but there weren't any pictures of the inside. There are only two zippered compartments. It would work for when you just need something to put a few items in, like your phone, id, cash, credit card, makeup. It looks similiar to the picture, but it looks more masculine in person. The leather isn't very soft and reminds me of a mens toiletry bag. The zippers also aren't the smoothest.

Title: Defective velcro
Review: Velcro stopped sticking. The prickly part wore out the soft side of velcro. I added velcro and it happened again.

Title: Looks yellow, shinny, not a fan. Review: This was very different then what I expected!
Come in a nice size large looking eye shadow looking container.
It’s light yellow, very iridescent, and has a light sparkle.
I’m fair, but not happy with a yellow glow on certain parts of my face.
It does not give any high lights.
I’m not a fan.

Title: Nice sound. Volume control and on/off button didn't work. Review: The sound quality is very nice. It comes with 3 sets of buds to fit the size of your ear. It also comes with 3 sets of wing tips. This makes it very easy to find a comfortable fit. The zipper case is also a nice plus. It has room for the earbuds and the spare parts.

The reason for only 3 stars is because the volume control and on/off button doesn't work. I tried clicking the buttons and holding them down. There was no change in the volume and it wouldn't turn off or on. That was a huge disappointment.

Title: Look elsewhere
Review: For the positives, this comes in a great gold container and a really nice box (great for gift giving). Other than that, I really didn't like it for the money. I got this replace an exfoliator I typically keep in the shower. When I first opened it I found it was kind of a jelly based cream that has kind of a light, funky (not necessarily pleasant) fragrance. The exfoliating granules are few and far between, so don't think you will be getting any kind of a scrub. It does clean my face, so it does that job well. Just for the money, you can do better.

Title: A bit snug
Review: I bought this dress minutes before a friend purchased and she received hers 4 days ahead of me. I ordered a size small, that’s what dress size I usually wear. It fit everywhere but the thighs(I wear 3 in jeans), it’s snug at the bottom so I’d order Medium next time. It’s also a bit short but that’s ok, I originally wanted it to wear as a top with leggings. I’m 5’3’’ 118lb

Title: Too soft, but good for cleaning delicate mushrooms. Review: Brushes look good, But!
I usually buy these brush at the beauty supply to keep in
The guest Shower, and also I like them for washing potatoes better then
The potato brushes. These are easy to handle.
But there way too soft To just wash my nails when I’m just wash my hands.

If your nails are a little dirty, or your gardening, doing yard work. or just wash off veggies.
These will not clean your nails or hands!

But These soft brushes are good for brushing / cleaning off mushrooms,
those need a soft brush, and No water.

Title: love it
Review: i used this for my Insignia Flex 9.7 tablet  it worked fine  no problems at all  and for that im thankful !!!  :)

Title: Probably great for a professional
Review: I was in the market for a new camera and when I saw this bag in the Vine program I thought I would snap it up. I did get my Canon Rebel (thanks Amazon!) and several lenses to boot (in preparation for my trip this month to Israel). Although the quality of the bag is good, the size to me is really inconvenient. First, it is shaped like a back pack, which makes it kind of big. I am not sure if I am going to be able to bring this on the plane with me (as the boarding guidelines state 1 carry-on and I have a purse and laptop I am bringing). In addition, there are straps and zippered compartments which are not really conveniently placed. It's not an easy bag to get your gear in and out of. I see this bag as a great tool to have if you are backpacking as you have a place to hang a tripod and there is a small storage area if you wanted to bring a snack with you. But for someone like me, who wants it for sightseeing/traveling, I think a more conventional camera bag would have done the trick better.

Title: Unflattering, little small, but works well as an undershirt
Review: I usually order men's shirts similar to this or with short sleeves as undershirts. I order them in medium for a snug fit and in large if there is a chance I want to wear it as an outer shirt.  However, this one is very unflattering. The white rim with the black actually does not look good and makes the shirt look cheap. Also, this large feels lie a medium and a half.  Normally when I order a men's large it is loose on me. This one is not tight but it is not very loose either.  Overall, this is fine as an undershirt but I cannot picture this as super attractive as an outer shirt.

Title: Disappointing product
Review: As a long-time Kindle/ Kindle Fire user, I had expected the Fire TV Stick with Voice Remote to function as well as the Kindles I have owned (I am on my third).  Unfortunately, the Fire TV Stick has been a major disappointment.  Multiple apps do not work or will not load at various times (Netflix has never worked).  The Fire TV Stick seems to overheat every single time I use it and I end up having to unplug it and wait a few hours (or overnight) for it to work correctly again.  It usually overheats within about two to three episodes of a tv show (approximately 2 to 2.5 hours of use).  The home screen is always slow to load (and sometimes freezes, which means I have to restart the Fire Stick).  The only reason I have kept the Fire Stick is for Amazon music streaming, so the $34.99 cost seems okay to me (I bought the Fire Stick on sale during Amazon's Prime Day 2016).  I know my internet connection is not the issue because I can stream the same shows on my Kindle Fire at the same time, and it works without any issues.

Title: Cute sticker
Review: Love the turtle

Title: Most amazing eyeliner in the market today!
Review: I am so impressed with this eyeliner. Typically, I have a difficult time with eyeliners. I really like a pencil type eyeliner, but often times it doesn't color the way I want and I find myself using it on paper or something to get it to start. Then I will try liquid eyeliners which I find messy, hard to manage and not lasting as long. In comes this L'Oreal Infallible pencil. It fits the bill from a standard pencil usability basis, but unlike a pencil, it colors flawlessly. It is creamy, smooth and is long lasting. I will never switch to another brand of eyeliner. This is simply the best one out there.

Title: use as intended
Review: looks like original / wouldn't tell the difference if it didn't say replacement . . .

Title: Go to dermatologist
Review: I would not use this to freeze age spots. Leaves pink scars. Better of going to a dermatologist

Title: Good night time moisturizer
Review: This is a nice night time skin moisturizer. Thick and creamy, this is meant to be used at night (does not absorb quickly into the skin). I have used Crepe Erase in the past and don't feel that this lives up to its more famous brand, but overall it is a decent moisturize. I have seen a softer improvement in my skin and the crepiness  does seem to be diminished, but I am afraid it is just a temporary improvement (if I stop, I am sure it will quickly return). Overall, it's a nice moisturizer but may be overpriced.

Title: Problem after a week
Review: Bought this tv for my mom and the sound went out after a week. Returned it for an LG... Problem fixed

Title: Some good, some bad. Review: First with the bad: the adhesion is terrible. Either the glue is too strong or too weak. Peeling the sticker paper off the organizers was a pain, and sticking them to the wall didn't last long. Many of the little cable hooks have come loose on their own. Thankfully the kit comes with several and I haven't used a bunch of them, so I have extras.

The Velcro straps are fine, though a bit too strong. Of course, it's not name-brand Velcro, so it does an adequate job for its manufacture.

The other parts are fine but not used with adhesion for my purposes. The only real issue I have with this kit is the adhesion used, so if that's your primary need then I'd consider an alternative.

Title: My hair did feel stripped of residue but I did not care for the strong scent at all Review: I really could not get over the smell of this shampoo. It was strong and reminded me strongly of a flea soap we used on our dog when I was a kid. The smell is strong enough that it lingered on my hands and hair for most of the day. But I do have to admit, I noted a definite difference in my hair. It seemed cleaner and subtle but not different from other more pallettable shampoos.

Also, this leaked quite a bit in shipping. I would have liked to see a better seal for something that would be shipped individually. A foil seal would be best, but something needs to be done to make it a better sealing packaging.

Title: It’s an instant glam bam look for a ho hum outfit!
Review: I love me a toasty scarf.  It not only looks chic, but makes my neck and shoulders nice and warm on cold chilly days.  It just glams  up a ho hum outfit.

Title: A+
Review: Excellent

Title: Huge
Review: Huge twice mr size and I’m pretty chunky

Title: Sleeves are a Little Short
Review: Men's shirts can vary a lot in sizing. My husband is 6'2" and weighs about 205 pounds. He usually wears size larges in shirts. This does fit, but the sleeves are a little shorter than he prefers. Also, it gapes depending on his movements. The material is light weight and wrinkles easily. Overall, it's okay.

Title: Junk
Review: Has major limitations. Could not load one movie on there just because it was over a particular size even though the disc itself had Oodles of space. Absolutely worthless.

Title: Nice
Review: This is a very nice stand to have handy when you are not playing with your VR. It's sturdy and does not tip over.

Title: Great shave, great price, great razor!
Review: My son actually was quite impressed with this Solimo razor. He normally uses Gillette products and has for the past 15 or so years, so for him to tell me he liked this really means something. He told me that he got a really close shave and the moisturizers left his skin feeling soft and smooth, one of the best shaves he has ever had (his words). For the money, this is a great alternative to other name brands!

Title: Sexy and stretchy!
Review: I love this! Sexy and stretchy! I ordered another one!

Title: Three Stars
Review: Be aware, these are SMALL.

Title: Great camcorder, does what it needs to do
Review: I got the Sanyo Xacti with my only recent experiences of shooting movies with a Flip Camcorder. At first, I thought the weight might be an issue (because it was so much bigger and heavier than the Flip). But, now that I have it, and have used it several times in the last month, this Sanyo will now become my only camera. I love the pictures it takes and the stabilization features helps me take pictures without the shaking and movement that I get with my other camera. I haven't used it for underwater use yet, but plan to when I make a trip to the Carribean in the Spring. According the other reviews, the Xacti takes great pictures under water as well. I love the color of the camcorder too (I know that's such a girly thing to say). Anyway, great camera for the price. Don't hesitate to buy it.

Title: What a great gift set!
Review: I love this gift set! First, I love the fragrance. Peach has always been one of my favorite fragrances and in this gift set the fragrance is light and not overwhelming. It includes a candle and a bath bomb (bubbles) a small bar of soap and some light luxurious massage oil. Just draw your bath, light the candle and you have everything that you need for a great spa experience! It also comes in a great gift box which would be perfect for a woman you love or just a special someone (like a teacher, etc). For the price, this cannot be beat for a nice gift. Highly recommend!

Title: this smells weird
Review: I love this brand of sugar scrub but this is the first time I tried the lemon and its weird. it also was shipped and left out in the heat causing the package to leak so maybe that was the issue.

Title: Good quality, glad I purchased
Review: They’re milestone stickers, not much to say. They work well and meet my expectations. They’re good quality and the image on them is clear. The sticker is thick, so when it comes to sticking into a rounded baby torso, sometimes the edges peel up but that really isn’t a big deal since you just stick it on them for five minutes to take the picture and that’s it.

Title: Very disappointed Review: The underwire is of no use when the straps are not adequate to hold the twins up. I wear 44D so I need support this bra is not made for big busted women.
Very disappointed and do not recommend

Title: Three Stars
Review: Battery is not easy to change.

Title: Great way to hydrate your lips and look great!!
Review: This is a great way to keep your lips in great condition. Typically, I am always taking care of the skin on my face, but I never think of the lips (except when I apply gloss/color during makeup applications). This is a great way to hydrate your lips and after just a few minutes of applying, you will see an immediate difference. My thinner lips looked fuller and slightly plumper and the fine lines immediately around my lips seemed to fade away. I highly recommend this to everyone who wants to look their best, particularly before special events where you want to look your best.

Title: Nice if you ever get it connected to your system
Review: Must have a PHD to connect to system with the inadequate instructions provided.  Cannot understand voice on system- muffled: cannot hear it.  It took me several days to get it to work.  After 3 days customer service responded with information I already had.

Title: Five Stars
Review: This stuff smells amazing.... got it for my man. I really like it

Title: Not really purple
Review: Soft and comfy, but it's not really purple. It's more of a gray color, which isn't what I was looking for. Still comfortable to wear, so I'll keep it, but I am disappointed that it's not the purple it appear to be.

Title: Burned a little bit
Review: So, When I was using the Skin Relief body wash, I though it would not burn my skin where it was peeled due to dry skin from a long time ago and I used this body wash before too but, it was bought in the store. For some reason when I used this body wash it burned that part of my skin for a few seconds and after that I did not continue to use it on that certain part on my skin.

Title: DON'T WASTE YOUR MONEY!
Review: BOUGHT THIS BATTERY WILL NOT HOLD A CHARGE. DON'T WASTE YOUR MONEY. YOU GET WHAT YOU PAY FOR CRAP!

Title: Great Buds for use in an office or other similar locations.
Review: These are great inexpensive ear buds.  My only complaint would be  lack of bass in the music.  Other than that, these are a good low-cost selection for some wireless buds.  I use mine every day at work.

Title: So soft.
Review: I'm 5 10 about 170 . Bigger in the mod region. I purchased the smaller size and they are amazing.

Title: Mediocre style and value.
Review: I love and prefer silver jewelry, so was excited to receive this necklace. I was underwhelmed by it, though. The pendant is much larger than I would consider "in style" these days, and certainly larger than I typically wear. I do like that it's quite a shiny silver, and the celtic-like design is pretty. I just wish it were smaller, or a little more delicate. The chain is on the short side, which I prefer, but it's a dull silver compared to the pendant, and has tiny links; it does not feel sturdy and seems like it will break easily. Considering I would likely change this pendant to a different chain if I were to wear it regularly, the $20 (for basically the pendant) is more than I would typically pay. Just a 3-star "it's okay" necklace/style/value in my book.

Title: Won't work with Rode Go Wireless to connect to GoPro
Review: I am not sure if this product works for anything else, but it does not work as an adapter for connecting the Rode Go Wireless lavalier mic to a GoPro Hero 7, despite fitting the connector specs.  I thought I would try it since the price was <1/5 what GoPro charges for their adapter, but I knew that it was possible it may not work.  I plan to keep this adapter anyway since I may need it for something else in the future.  The build quality appears nice and the connections fit accordingly.

Title: Great combination and surge protector
Review: I have to say that this does fit my needs. I am using this for a television, blu-ray and surroundsound set up. The three foot cord is perfect and does not clutter up the floor with too much cord. I love the fact that this came with an extension cord (as I needed one that matches). I don't agree with the others upset about the 6 ft extension not working with the surge protector as a problem. It is actually not meant for that purpose. For my use, this is perfect and you can depend on the Belkin name for a quality surge protector. Kudos

Title: One Star
Review: ordered wrong size. Returned!

Title: Absorbs some moisture from soaking wet hair but is not drying; nice scrunchies
Review: These are really nice, thick scrunchies. However, they only absorbed a little bit of water from my soaking wet short to medium fine curly hair. These are not drying at all. Just use these at scrunchies only and do not expect miracles.  I do like the quality of these. They look and feel like a terry cloth towel but they are made of 85% biconstituent fiber (79% polyester 21% plymamide--notice how this does not add up to 85%, but that is what the label says) and 15% polyester.

Title: Disappointed
Review: Disappointed but you get what you pay for. Purchased soley for our son to pay games on and on his profile we kept getting error messages for the downloads, it's not intuitive, so how is a child supposed to navigate it, and you didn't get previews on his profile before downloading. Very Disappointed. Was pretty excited about this for his birthday present.

Title: Beautiful rich green color stones, quality silver
Review: My favorite color is green and I have a lot of jewelry in this exact color. I love the look of this and the silver and green cubic zirconia stone quality is amazing for less than $20. I deducted a star because I couldn't figure out how to put this one by myself (I actually had to have my husband try to do it and it took him a while to figure it out). Actually, taking it off was just as complicated. Outside of that, it's really pretty and would make a nice gift for someone.

Title: Fits ok but pills like crazy Review: I bought this for my boyfriend, within two weeks he was needing to shave the massive amount of pills off the exterior. Now he has to shave it weekly to even wear it. I bought it just over a month ago...

It's also a little snug on him for his size, would have liked to see it less form fitting like a hoodie should be.

Title: Some benefits
Review: I am not sure that this increased our speed.

Title: Love this Avia jacket for spring and fall weather!
Review: Absolutely great, lightweight windbreaker jacket to wear. My husband got this for a recent trip to Panama (rainy season). It was warm in Central America and showers popped up occasionally. This jacket folds up easily and wrinkles come out quickly when you put it on. Keeps the rain/wet out without being too warm. Great jacket!

Title: Its OK
Review: I am replacing the one my husband got a few months ago. He likes it but it does fall apart and is a pain for the credit cards to be slid in each holder.

Title: Nice top but not for me
Review: I purchased a 2x, looks great on the model in the advertisement but it looked awful on me.  The fabric and design (blank and white) is pretty.  I donated it so someone else could look good in it.

Title: Paper Shirt
Review: This shirt is like someone took a paper bag and turned it into a shirt. Very weird material.

Title: Perfect for Bose QC ii
Review: Not a bad aftermarket case. A little on the big side but still manageable for traveling I'd say. All in all I would recommend... no issues so far.

Title: Not for Oily Skin
Review: I have oily skin, and this primer didn't help keep my foundation in place through the day.

Title: Recieve 3 pairs of red plaid socks. Made well, 5 yr. said there comfortable. Review: I was supose to 6 pairs of childrens socks, as the colors shows.
But instead I recieve 3 pairs of red plaid socks! Nice if I would have got them before Xmas.

The socks are nice, they fit the 5 yr. and he wears a size 11 shoes. These socks come to the bottom of his knees, and
He says there comfortable.

Title: Great for dry, curly hair
Review: I have very thick, coarse,  2B, low porosity, dry, curly hair. This works well for me and does not dry my hair out. This has been my HG for a few years now. I also love that it is truly unscented. This cleanser is in between shampoo and co-washing. It makes very little lather and I use a lot of it.... so if you have fine hair, it may be too heavy for you. Their Gentle Lather shampoo is more sudsy than this and removes more oils from the hair... it would be a better option for fine hair or people who have oily hair. I use this along w the Too Shea conditioner, and the Aloeba conditioner, which I use as a daily leave in ...combined with their Spiralicious Gel.

Title: Mini Dash Cam,1.5‘’ LCD Screen, by Drivsong
Review: The deal breaker is the SD card slot, where you can easily insert it into the camera body instead of the slot and then there is no recovery unless you crack the  camera body to retrieve it. I am bummed because I like the simple setup and operation. Full HD, DVR,120° Wide Angle, G-Sensor, Loop Recording. I don't want someone busting open my car to steal this so I can't vouch for the parking protection. 1280 x 720p 30fps high speed video recording.

Title: Thankful to have a replacement remote. Works well
Review: Works well

Title: Not recommended.
Review: Low quality.  One failed after first month.  Not recommended.

Title: DISAPPOINTMENT
Review: The product was not what I expected, it ran super small in the waist and didn't have the stretch I expected in the waist. I did not return the pants,  although your return policy is great, I am going to try altering them because the fabric is so soft and i live the design of the pant.

Title: Three Stars
Review: The strap does not hold the iPad securely in place.

Title: No support
Review: This bra was not at all supportive.  It is comfortable and almost feel like you have nothing on.  This is probably ok if you are small chested.  If you need a bit of support and/or lift, this bra isn’t for you.

Title: Bluetooth speaker
Review: It's okay but doesn't work that well would like to have a new one if possible or my refund back

Review: Great fit

Review: This was not pajama fabric. These were jeans

Title: My phones are working fine
Review: Easy to install and worked when plugged in

Title: Great dress
Review: Very comfortable and cute.

Title: Customer service was awesome. Order up one size
Review: Fits like an xl. Customer service was so nice when dealing with return

Title: NO GLUE JUST SCREWS
Review: It came in quickly.  My son and grandson put it together for me in about 3 or 4 hr.  Time out for dinner and couple of beers.  Back to putting it to finish and test it out.  TV hung perfectly.  Fit right in the same corner a much smaller stand was in Clean looks with the wires now.

Title: Two Stars
Review: way too big for small hands

Title: Cute and comfortable hoops! My wardrobe staple!
Review: Hoops are a wardrobe staple for me- I go through a lot of them and I was happy to find these! Love these hoops-got them in "yellow gold" and plain steel "silver" definitely plan on getting more tones and styles. They are the perfect size and weight. Super comfortable.

Title: Very short bottom
Review: Top fit well. . Bottom is very short and, most importantly, does NOT have an inner liner.

Title: Poor quality and over priced. Review: The tote bag is of very poor quality and it's way overpriced. The canvas had a strong offensive odor to it and It arrived very wrinkled and creased with black marks on the bottom of the bag. I paid full price for it; however, it appeared to have been used.

I definitely do NOT recommend this item.

Title: pretty watch, well made
Review: I love this watch and wear it often, absolutely no issues, it's very pretty!

Title: save your $$$$
Review: I was very excited to get this,  but unfortunately it didn't work for me at all, and I was very disappointed.

Title: Foot too small, calf too big, one zipper didn’t work
Review: The pair that arrived had the outer zippers that didn’t function. The footbed ran really small, I could hardly get my foot in it. I had sized up, too. There definitely was no room for an orthotic. However, they are rather cute.

Title: WTF?
Review: No instruction no way to create a shape and hard to peel off.

Title: Smells awful, has orange tinge, & is sticky slimy; disgusting; went right in the garbage
Review: This pack of three anti-aging serums smells so bad that I had to suppress a dry heave. In addition, the gel has an orange tinge to it. It goes on sticky and slimy and is absolutely disgusting. I threw this right in the garbage.

Title: Down in da boot, it is what ya need!
Review: Riding out hurricanes is not something I would recommend.  Some folks though, stay, and this little gizmo not only has a hand crank, but solar pac as well.  Covers all the bases .  Was a gift and was much appreciated.  Everybody should have one for back up.

Title: Goes on smooth, these are more brown colors. No brushes. Hard to open. Review: What I received is not exactly what this Maybelline showed! Although nice, but disapointed!
The two large eyeshadows in the middle are not what it shows.
The one on the left its frosted gold, the one on the right is a very shiny frosted brighter gold.
My picture showed left side, gold & lighter gold, right side is a lavender pink with a lighter pink swirled.
All the colors look swirled with a lighter color. Not what I got!
Most of the colors are frosted. The four on the bottom at each side are not really frosted. The black or gray on the right bottom is
Just a hint of frost compared to the other frosted colors.

You do not need to use much, there soft and go on smooth.
I do not know what this sells for, but I think this should of come with a couple of nice small brushes.!

I'm giving this a 3 star, as I'm not a fan of frosted colors, and I did not get the colors for my coloring I thought I was getting.
Hard to open.

Title: My Husband’s Favorite
Review: This is the only hair spray my husband will use, and buying through Amazon is much less expensive than buying it at a drug or grocery store.

Title: I wish it came in XS
Review: Nice quality fabric and design.  If XS would have been an option I would be giving it 5 stars.  Fit is big on a small female.

Title: mink oil soap Review: UPDATE BELOW....I live in Oregon... and Mink Oil soap and other products are made in Oregon - a nice bonus. But that aside, me and my family have used mink oil soap for years. We have many who have sensitive skin, dry skin, allergies, etc. This is the one thing we can all use. It never dries. It feels luxurious. In my opinion is spa for your skin treatment. You really have to try it once and you'll be hooked too. I've been ordering for years. It costs a little more, but it's so much better that its worth it - but ultimately, it doesn't irritate or make our skin issues worse, and in some cases, better. I really encourage everyone to try it - just once and see for yourself. They offer many different mink oil products, we just use the soap. You will need a soap dish that allows it to dry in between uses. I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.
UPDATE: 10/18/2019 Eh. I accidentally ordered the "fresh" scent... Not so much. It doesn't smell good or fresh in any way to me, a personal opinion of course. I still consider the original a five star experience.

Review: Not well constructed. Don’t expect them to last long

Title: It's good
Review: I like this item for helping. What I dislike is the fact it responses to everything. Without even saying it's name sometimes.

Title: Great cosplay props but very fake compared to the same pieces I already had.
Review: Does not look at all like the picture it feels very cheap! I have the original version of the heart and Forest Stone already and these ones look SO CHEAP compared to the ones I bought. They are the exact same design but seem to be made from plastic instead of whatever metal mine are made from and the inside of the box feels very cheap too but I guess they would make for great cosplay props though! The Goron stone in particular is VERY FAKE, it is literally plastic not even a stone or fake glass or transparent plastic, but just one colour red plastic. Overall it felt like a great gift for someone who cosplays or a kid basically. I would not buy this for myself to wear as jewelry though.

Title: Good Headset
Review: I bought a headset which is pretty much the same but for my Honda Goldwing. These have a two-year warranty from the company and after a little over a year my microphone stopped working. I got in contact with the seller and they seemed willing at first to help. Then all of a sudden my messages would not go through because they’ve been blocked by the seller. I guess they’re not going to help after all. I will definitely be contacting Amazon and the manufacturer.

Review: Very cute but pretty heavy. On top of that it’s hard to take on and off.

Title: Runs a little small but a nice shirt
Review: Nice, reasonably priced, fleece sweatshirt. I found it ran a little small on me. Not that it was tight, but that I tend to like my sweatshirts a little loose on me around the muffin top area and this shirt was very huggy. I had ordered the size large but probably would have been better in an extra large. Shirt is soft and well made, though.

Title: Runs a bit small
Review: I'm 5'10" and pretty much an XL / size 16 in clothing. This dress came down to right around or at the tops of my knees, so the length was good but the chest was too tight and the fabric was too thin. The fabric stretched too much at the chest and you could see my bra right through it. If it was made out of a nicer, thicker fabric, I probably could have made it work. But will have to return these. I bought it in the dark red and navy, same issue with both. If they offered a 2x, then I would be glad to re-order the next size up but it seems that they only go to xl.

Title: Too big and too thin
Review: This was about 2 sizes too big and the material was too thin and made it see through. It’s a cute style so maybe if we sized down and chose a less see through color it might work for us.

Title: Cute for younger children. Review: This Elsa necklace from frozen the 4 and 6 yo love. They do have another one different that they love also.

The heart with the Elsa picture in it is a pretty good size.
The heart is a gold color medal with a fancy design around it with a picture of Elsa, and a hard plastic cover over it.
Do not get this wet, as I would think water would get inside, and ruin the picture.
The heart hangs on 4 thin pretty blue cords, with the organza ribbon running through it, that gives it a soft look.
The connecter in the back is silver medal a type of spring catch.

The card this comes on is thin, but is decorated in light color printed on flowers, and in the middle of it,
It says, Girls Rule in black.

This came in a plain lite brown box with a Amazon plain sticker, that does not look gift giving to me. Inside the box in plastic is the necklace. If this is a gift plan on rewrapping this.

I took a star off for the packaging, and another off cause the pendant is Ok, but any young girl that loves frozen would be
Happy to get this.
How long this will last is a mystery to me!

Title: I PAID EXTRA FOR THIS ,NOW FREE Review: I got this because i needed it.,paid 19$ and then two days later you gave it away FREE ,I wrote you asking for refund ,it was not even shipped yet and you said no refund,! not very happy
i feel that what good for the goose is good for the gander (me)

Title: I love these slides
Review: I love these slides. Very nice leather and great buckle accent. Overall very nicely made. Right now they are still kind of stiff to slide on but they havent bothered my feet at all- leather is nice quality and i know it will soften and give a bit once worn.

Title: Three Stars
Review: Assume is fine product but gave it as part of a gift so did not actually use.

Title: Powerful hair dryer!
Review: I was in the market for a good traveling hair dryer for my trip to Italy this summer. I was totally afraid that I would be sacrificing power for size, but I opted to try this Lasrz model. FIrst, it's a great size and folds nicely to fit easily into my suitcase. Second, and most important, it's got great power settings. My hair was able to be dried just as well (or even better) than I get with my regular full size dryer. I love the way it fits in my hand and has great maneuverability. I am starting to use this now on a regular basis in my home. And I absolutely love this dryer. Highly recommend!

Title: Nice set, but small
Review: Not a bad bath set, but I know you can do better. Small in size (only 3 bath fizzies) so if you are planning to give this as a gift (as the name suggests), you might want to keep that in mind or use it as an add-on gift (or stocking stuffer). I really liked the fragrances (both tea and thyme) and the creams are very moisturizing. Nice way to pamper yourself for a couple of 'spa days', probably should look into buying products separately in larger sizes.

Title: Did not work with Samsung Galaxy A03s
Review: Was excited to get this SD drive, but it didn't fit in my phone, so asked for a refund.

Title: In love with a safety razor!
Review: This is a really nice safety razor. To be honest, it's been years since I have used one of these (I typically use disposables) and I was really surprised at the close shave I received. My legs were totally soft and smooth and it seemed to me that the shave lasted me longer than the shaves I had with the disposables. This is a unique razor and felt really good in my hands (ergonomic) and allowed me to easily shave. Also, changing blades was easy. I think I am now hooked on this one. Highly recommend!

Title: WINGS MISSING FEATHERS
Review: I was disappointed and have not have time to write til now.  Missing feathers and falling out those that are in.  Should have used better glue to adhere.

Title: tinting glass cup
Review: I use this for my eyebrow tinting and it's perfect.  It's tiny... about 1 1/2" tall and about 1" opening in the top... but you don't want a huge bowl for eyebrow tint.  I used cotton swabs to mix just the right amount and apply.  This dish is easily cleaned and because it's so small, very easy to store with my tinting supplies.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  And I hope this was helpful to you!

Title: Not first time buying but definitely last.
Review: What happened. On the left is ones I ordered awhile ago on the right are ones I got today. I struggle just opening the case without breaking it. It's a piece of crap. The quality of the case drastically decreased or I got ripped off. Either way very unhappy.

Title: Overpriced, not great
Review: Overall, not thrilled about this gel. It is a little thick and does not absorb quickly into my skin (leaving my face feeling slightly sticky). I have been using it for about 3 weeks now and have not seen any noticeable improvement in my skin. I do not find it to be moisturizing at all and for $70, I think you can do better elsewhere if you are looking for some kind of a moisturizing formula for your face.

Title: Cute, soft, great zipper!
Review: I’ll be ordering more!

Title: Beautiful palette- very pleased
Review: Beautiful palette- very pleased! I got one as a gift and one for myself. Great range of both fun and neutral colors. Its a keeper!

Title: Nice, lightweight clips; they have a mild hold; love the colors Review: I really like these clips even though they are delicate. The neutral colors are nice and one barrette was included in the package which matches the darker marbleized clip.  I have short to medium fine curly hair and these clips held up my hair in the back.

The current price of $11.99 for four pieces, comes to a slightly pricey $3 per item. Note that nowhere on the Amazon site does it say a barrette would be included. Therefore, I have no idea if this was part of the package or just thrown in at the last minute. If only the clips are included, the price per item is a very pricey $4 per clip. At this price, I would pass on these clips because they are not worth that much.

Title: Very  comfortable & super soft; wrist stitching too tight for sizing & also over 100% too pricey
Review: These gloves are somewhat true to size except for the stitching around the wrist which is too tight for the sizing specified. They are super comfortable and soft and are made of felt-type material and fake leather in the palm area. The felt material is extremely thin even though it is double-lined. After having tried these, I really like them but the price of $35 is about $20 too much. Since they are so thin, they are good for mild winters and not for super cold temperatures. They also need to make the wrist stitching elasticized or at least larger.

My Sleeves are just short and I’m disappointed.

Review: Because these are shell, they are all unique - however, mine has an ugly black spot on it.  Eh.  And the magnet is not a strong as it should be.  I would replace the magnet if I were going to use it - but the black spot is too distracting.  Makes it look cheap.  So, it's in the trash.

Title: Not worth it

Title: Cute and Cheap

Title: Pissed Off Customer
Review: We brought this Bulb June 2011 and it has lasted until now but this is the second one it originally went out within 30 days... they advertise as a Samsung replacement Bulb but what they have done is purchased a third party Samsung Housing they put in a knock-off Bulb that does not give you near the quality of picture and color that the actual Phillips Bulb does which is a little more expensive, but well worth it.  It is not hard to replace just the Bulb. I advise that you replace you bulb with a genuine Phillips Bulb.

Title: Confused
Review: Can quite figure out how to use this. So can't say I will get much use out of them.

Title: Left a residue
Review: Very odd fragrance. Almost like paint or plastic. Absorbed quickly but left what felt like a film on my skin.

Title: One of my favorite moisturizers, ever!
Review: I love this Michael Marcus moisturizer. I use it every morning after I shower and at night before I go to bed. It applies thick and rich and will absorb fairly quickly. After using for over a month now, I can honestly say my skin is softer, fine lines are diminished and it is noticeably healthier looking. I am 67 and my skin needs a good rich moisturizer and this definitely is what I needed. Highly recommend!

Title: Love the colors but doesn’t really glow in the dark & very small amount of polish Review: There are five TINY jars of nail polish in this set. Each jar is only .17 ounces of polish. This nail polish goes on sheer and sometimes lumpy even after I shook the bottles. In addition, only two colors faintly glow in the dark -- the yellow and the pink (see photos).

This polish does not live up to its claims. I do LOVE the whacky and vibrant colors but this does not perform as specified. The current price of $8.99 comes to $1.80 per color but it is not worth that price even though they do cover and color the nails with polish. If these performed as claimed, then I would have rated this 5 stars.

Title: Sheds; generates static; curve of brush molds to head; pricey Review: At the current price of $10.99 this brush is about $7 or $8 more than it should be priced in my opinion.

I do love the curve of the brush and how it molds to my head. I also love the purple color. Unfortunately, the brush sheds a lot (see the black lines in my two photos). Also, the bristles are not even; it almost looks like a used brush. In addition, my hair was full of static after using this.

In summary, this brush is functional but the negatives coupled with the high price has me recommending to look elsewhere.

Title: Great Backpack
Review: This is a great backpack! The chocolate brown color is beautiful for men or women &  it’s the perfect size!  I carry my iPad, my reader, and an extra hoodie & all sorts of things and there is still room.  I’ve had several people ask me where I got it, and I love it!  I could easily put my small laptop in there too. 👍🏼👍🏼

Title: natural look
Review: Better than waterproof. Does not budge until you take it off. This product is not volumizing, but does lengthen and add color. The product dries quickly, so you must work quickly. You can not build this mascara, if you do, you lashes will stick together in a bad way. This requires a few strokes of the wand and that is it. Taking if off is simple. Drench a cotton pad with warm water and soak your lashes. The tubes of mascara will release and go down the drain. No dark racoon eyes to deal with. This mascara creates a natural look. Hope this review helps.

Title: Smells horrible it's been a while
Review: It's been a while since I bought this brand and honestly I don't know why never had a problem with it but I know they sometimes have certain products that are not so good quality, my point; these smell horrible! I have bought all kinds of brands from these cucumber towelettes everywhere and I had never smelled something so gross I am not sure why, also they felt a little dry when they arrived probably had been in storage for long and close to expiration date but I did not notice an expiration date on them not sure if they are expired maybe that is why they smelled so bad... I may use them for other stuff.

Title: Smells good but not a great cleanser
Review: Ok facial cleanser but wayyyy overpriced. I like the cucumber mix and the fragrance. Didn't feel it removed my makeup very well and it actually didn't make me feel clean. It is very water based and I found it better as some kind of a toner or something other than a facial cleanser. And $30 for this small bottle? No thanks, I can do better with my other facial cleansers.

Title: Great conditioning hair set for everyone!
Review: This is really an amazing shampoo and conditioner combination. Not only does it get your hair clean, it also has argyle oil which helps keep your hair smooth and shiny and in great condition. By keeping your scalp hydrated it helps minimize dandruff. To me this new Head and Shoulders variety is one of the best in the market today. It also has a light fragrant rose essence which makes your hair smell great as well. Highly recommend this for all people, young or old, male or female, whether you have dandruff issues or not. This is great hair care!

Title: Cute
Review: Bought these for a present and my sister loved them. I thought they would be a little thicker though

Title: Sits too high--fabric is limp and too sheer
Review: Not really usable. They have two garters, like what is used to hold up stockings, and they are so small that they can barely attach to the bra straps. However when this is done, the dickey is sitting up too high. Because of the garters, they cannot be lowered and attached to the part of the bra right below the straps. Also, they are made from a very sheer nylon with a wide band of lingerie type lace. Think nylon panties. An improvement would be to make an attachment device that would allow for an adjustment of height, such as a button and long loop. Also they should be made out of polyester or cotton so they won't look like underwear. Also, the beige one is a strange color, too dark.

Title: Sadly Disappointed Review: For more than a month I've been bounced between rehabilitation facilities and the hospital and quite often there's some patient who's unwell and acting out, yelling, screaming, throwing things. If you've ever spent a while in either type of facility you know the experience. When I saw these headphones available for review I jumped on the idea. I had a friend deliver them and where do I begin?
* They barely fit in the mesh like bag that offers NO protection to your headphones.
* I think I have a fairly normal sized head but they fit tight on my ears not painful for short term but extended wear could be an issue.
* Sound is muddy, bass is overwhelming, even after adjusting my equalizer over and over. I finally got them to sound ok, just ok.

Fit isn't great. Sound isn't great. Carry bag isn't great. I'll use these until I get home and can find a better pair. Not impressed.

Title: Five Stars
Review: These are super comfortable, very pleased and may purchase more in other colors. LOVE

The positive is that the magnetic hold is solid. I think Apple should have perhaps put a slit at the bottom so you can push the cards up from the bottom.

And I'm buying a 2nd pair. They said they also cancel out background noise very well too. They also said it has a good microphone.

Title: It worked for me..
Review: It works perfectly with my three year old LED Seiki TV, no programming necessary. No other accolades necessary.. I've been using a clunky universal for months now and switching between devices was annoying- this remote worked out of the box. Highly recommend.

Title: Too expensive, but it does make my skin smooth
Review: My skin feels smooth and silky after applying Ainhoa Luxe Hydra Luxe anti aging cream.  I love the smell of it and the silky feeling.  Other products give the same feeling for less price.  I think it would take more than one jar to be able to really know if it makes a real difference.

Title: Great value!
Review: Nice scarf!!!!

Title: Had to swap it out
Review: This isn't my first Evho. I wanted another one for the kitchen. This one periodically wouldn't hear my commands. It got to be all the time, so I swapped it out. The new one they sent was refurbished, which I felt like I bought a new one, so they should send a new one. The refurbished one works, but it periodically couldn't hear my command either. I changed the command word from Alexa to Amazon, and it works fine now

Title: Nice facial mask
Review: This is a really nice facial mask by Erno Laszlo, Easy to mix (I didn't have clumps like another reviewer stated0, easy to apply. I am deducting a star as I didn't see very dramatic results (I have used 4 of these already), but I will say applying the mask and having a half hour of 'me' time is worth it all. I love the relaxing aspect of the mask. This is also easy to peel off (don't apply too much or it will take a while to solidify).

Title: Three Stars

Title: A slipping hazard
Review: The shoe top fabric is nice but the bottom is made of some kind of plastic that reminds me of the wheels on a big wheel.  They are a fall hazard.  I wouldn't even donate them so as not to bring that on anyone else.  I actually threw them out and will be more careful in future orders.

Title: Good product but hard to install
Review: We purchased this for the newer iPad. It works okay but is absolute horror to install. Maybe I did it wrong but the bubbles were really hard to get out

Title: Strong scent, works ok, but allot of bad ingreds. Review: Not a bad body lotions, but if your sensitive to a scent, I think its strong.
That said there is allot of ingredients that I do not think are health for the body.
Although my hands feel good using this.
Its only greasy for a short time, but that scent remains!

Title: it's so so
Review: I always love to try new types of liners. Having deep set eyes makes using liner very difficult. This stuff is ok you can make it thicker or thin but make sure you use primer and press into your lid to prevent smudging

Title: Nice, thick night facial moisturizer
Review: Nice, thicker, night facial cream. Doesn't absorb that quickly so it can transfer to your pillowcases if you are not careful. It has a real luxurious feel and I awaken in the morning with my skin feeling super soft and smooth. Seems to do the job well in moisturizing my skin, just be sure you allow sometime for the cream to absorb before going to bed.

Title: the initial is smaller than i expected
