Title: great cleaner, not sure it protects colored hair though.
Review: i found this a little harsh in cleaning the scalp: and if you use nonpermanent coloring - that gets stripped out.  i am using it to clean stands of my hair without the scalp clean and you will need conditioner.  nice delicate fragrance.

Title: They are just ok
Review: They just look ok... narrow by toes and no room to stretch

Title: Not the same hunter green as the Sivvan scrub pants
Review: Great scrubs for wearing, but the hunter green top DOES NOT MATCH the hunter green pants. Two distinctly different shades of hunter green. So I can't wear them together without it looking like I can't match colors. Very disappointed.

Title: good product at a decent price
Review: using this addlink in a desktop and my laptop / easy install. . . perfect fits. . .did help increase speed of my computers. . .

Title: Not Ideal for Grinding Natural Nails Review: This PROFESSIONAL ELECTRIC NAIL DRILL (35000RPM, with 6 Drills for Acrylic Gel Nails, Home Salon Use) has both a manual control and a foot pedal control. As the product page states, using it takes some practice. It’s really intended for grinding acrylic nails, and for other serious grinding applications.

It was my intention to use the device to grind natural nails (in particular, one toenail that has nail fungus, that would benefit from thinning). However, the machine runs so fast, and my hand/eye coordination is so poor, I’m afraid to use it. For me, ordering this sophisticated grinder for use on natural nails was a mistake.

Title: Expensive but comfortable underwear
Review: I really like the fabric these underwear are made off. Very smooth and fresh. I bought these because I normally have issues with regular underwear. My crotch area usually gets a rash and i get soreness and tenderness in my thighs close to my privates. I believe the idea is there but the design needs change. I cannot use the hole for the penis because i move around at work my part comes out of the pouch into the underwear. Also it's not easy to remove the front pouch when you go to urinate. I do not recommend it for someone that is trying to separate the privates. The bag for the testis is too small and the hole for the penis is not close to the body.

Title: Too small
Review: So hard to shop for these items on amazon - size was off but easy return policy. Also hard when bra size is like 44B because the bras lose their attractiveness in style and look.

Title: Snags!
Review: Absolutely loved the color, feel, and clasp method of this band but it kept snagging on all my clothes!

Title: Great for Sensitive Skin!
Review: This is a creamy cleanser. The consistency is similar to a lotion. It doesn't lather up. I was really excited to smell this because it has lavender and grapefruit extract, but it doesn't smell like either of those. It doesn't smell bad, it just smells "meh". When I think about my favorite face products, I tend to like ones that have amazing natural scents. I'm in my early 50's and my skin is fairly sensitive. It didn't irritate at all. I'm also dealing with "maskne" from frequent mask wearing and it does seem to help with that, or at least it doesn't aggravate my skin. Overall, I found this to be okay.

Title: A bit too tacky for my taste, don't care for "honey" aroma, but does moisturize
Review: I am always trying face creams and I decided to purchase this for $6.99 plus tax at a local Marshalls. This definitely moisturizes and is more for winter than summer because the cream is thick. I put this over my entire face and neck at night. What I do not like is the fragrance, which smells like honey to me. I also do not like the tacky feeling of this product on my face. It almost takes all night to absorb in well or gets removed via the pillowcase; I'm not sure. Also, one night I made the mistake of rubbing my eyes and it does burn slightly. Although I will finish this cream, I would never buy this again because it is not to my liking despite its moisturizing effects.

Title: Great hat and mitten set for children
Review: This is an absolutely adorable winter set. My grandson is almost three and it was a perfect fit. Quality made and very soft (because of the fleece), it keeps his head and hands warm during this most brutal winter. I love the ear flaps on this hat as it keeps him even warmer and there is no need for earmuffs. This is a must have set in the winter for anyone with small children.

Title: Very nice
Review: Nice and warm, great value

Title: Four Stars
Review: Like it a lot.

Title: Okay
Review: Not for me - ruined my nail beds

Title: These are ok
Review: Not sure if these are original Tommy Hilfiger underwear.  there are so many knock-offs and this could possibly be some. The quality just isn't there.

Title: OK, but....
Review: Pretty, but thicker than expected. Does not have the seamless 'decal' look, as shown. The non-colored edge/outline around the artwork is quite prominent. This is not a decal film material.

Title: Manicure bench is narrow, tall, slippery, & it smells Review: At the current price of $17.99, this manicure bench is more reasonably priced than a competitor with the same bench. The quality of the workmanship is pretty good but the legs elevate this bench about 5.25" off the ground. Since the bench is narrow on top, the person leaning their hands may have a tendency to tip this over. In addition, there are no rubber feet on the "legs." As a result, it is necessary to put a towel under this bench to keep it from slipping when placed on a solid non-stick surface.

Other than this, this bench is very nice. If it were lower to the ground, about two inches wider, and had rubberized feet on the bottom, this would have received 5 stars. In its current state it is functional but not the best it could be. The fact that it smells is also bothersome to me. I suppose it could double as a child's pretend ironing board.

Title: Cool looking and functions
Review: Arrived fast and is exactly as described. Cool looking and functions

Title: Good Buy
Review: As received, this vest appears to be a fine choice.  More than I expected.  Haven't washed it yet, but I see no reason to anticipate it would not wash perfectly and look as good after washing as before.  I'm a happy customer.

Title: Thin and Uneven drawers
Review: The organizer is cute and it can hold a lot of items, but the down part is that the organizer feels pretty thin and the drawers does not fit correctly. The drawers are such a hassle to try to slide it back in cause it does not fit and when I try to slide it out, the drawer tilts to the side which is super annoying.

Title: Scent too strong
Review: The scent of this shampoo is way too strong for me to try this product. It smells like cologne to me on top of smelling so strong. After opening the bottle to smell my whole house smelled like it. I would smell the scent in a store first to make sure you like it.

Title: Big Feet-Big Socks!!
Review: Socks were AS LARGE as my husband's socks (standard size sold off the rack). The fabric & quality of manufacturing was fine, but comparing "end of heel to front of toe cap" it was same length as standard MEN'S sock, about 2 inches too long!!

Title: Really nice addition to every day beauty regimen
Review: Overall, this is a great moisturizing cream. I have been using it for almost 2 months now. My skin looks noticeably younger with more fullness. I also definitely can see a difference with the crows feet under my eyes. I love the way my skin feels. This cream goes on lightly,  absorbs into my face quickly and is perfect to wear under makeup. If there is any downside it's in the cost (not sure if it is worth almost $100).

Title: Attractive brush set with nylon-type bristles Review: There are 7 brushes in this set. Three are foundation / cheek brushes, two are for eyeshadow, one is for the lips, and one for the brow. The small headed brushes in this set are useful for blending eyeshadow powders or applying concealer.

The bristles are soft but they feel nylon-like which is not as good as brushes that feel like real hair. Also, the brush heads and case have a slight chemical smell. The magnetic closure case is super attractive, however.

This is a decent travel set for someone who is starting their make-up journey. The current price of $11.51 ($12.79 minus 10%) is competitively priced for this set as it comes to $1.64 per brush.

Title: Soft and comfy
Review: Make sure  you at least size down one size if not two. These are super comfy and I went back and ordered another pair.

Title: Perfect for gift giving!
Review: This is a really nice soap set for men. My husband tried all three bars and loves all of them. They also come in a really nice gift packaging so these are perfect to give to a teacher or relative/friend. They are also a convenience size so you can take them with you when you travel. Highly recommend!

Title: Four Stars
Review: Love them

Title: Firefly in a Starwars package.
Review: The keychain itsef is quite adorable it isn't the best quality to top it off it came in a Star wars package but that part made me laugh.  For the price it is a great item and great for any Firefly fan.  If it does come in the Starwars packaging,  then it can give them a giggle.

Title: Absolutely love these cases
Review: Amazing value!

Title: Messy. Review: I have use this twice, and I find it to be a mess!
When I took the Gel stick out of the tube it’s so thick there was slime hanging on it.
I Put it back in the tube, and when I took it out again I had to keep pushing
The stick/wand against the side to wipe it off, it was better, then put it on
My top eyelashes. Waited for it to dry a bit, then used the fiber wand it was not such a mess. Using the fiber wand I waited till it was almost dries before using more coats. I also used a clean eye-lash brush so It would not look so thick and clumpy on my eye lashes.
I use a good mascara but I’m more into a more natural look, then hard look, as that is what this looks like to me.
I have to say, I did not get black under my eyes from this, just a bit itchy.

Title: Do not waste your money Review: Update: Customer service sent another one to replace the one that did not work and within days it stopped working as well.

This POS has barely worked since I received it (I.e. screens connected to it don't work until directly plugged into computer or microphones going on and out) but in under a year it stopped working entirely. I'm so pissed that I spent the better half of my morning trying to figure out how something that is on just isn't working.

Title: earpiece case
Review: Husband kept losing the foam ear tips of his handsfree ear piece.  The case idea seemed like a good idea to help him keep track of the foam ear tips and so far it has.  Worthwhile try if you have the same issue!

Title: Terrible fabric
Review: Was not what I expected - fabric hot and unattractive.

Title: clear disposable shower caps
Review: I bought these to use when I give my hair a "spa" mask treatment.  I only use them once or twice... they work great.  They come "accordion" style as shown in other photos... but easily open up.  They fit well ... I have shoulder length hair - fairly thick and I don't have any trouble getting it all in... I suppose if you have SUPER long and thick hair they might be a little more of a struggle.  I am happy with these.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

Title: Awkward to use with left hand due to blade angle; cutting edge a bit dull for cuticles & thick nails Review: This cutter is just okay. The cutting edge is slanted and on one side only. I am right handed and using this in my right hand is easy. However, it is awkward to use this in the left hand because the cutting side has to be angled away from the user.

I tried cutting my cuticles and it is a bit dull for this. It did an okay job but was not as sharp as I expected. It did cut my fingernails fine. However, it is not strong enough for thick toenails. To me this is more of a fingernail and cuticle clipper than and ingrown toenail or regular toenail clipper. In fact, it says cuticle trimmer right on it.

This comes with a felt cinch-strap carry case that is over five times bigger than needed although that is a nice touch.

Title: Guess it is ok if you know what you are doing
Review: it is ok still do not know how it works

Title: Zipper broke
Review: Super cute but zipper broke after the first wear. It’s replaceable but will cost almost as much as the skirt to get fixed.

Title: Avoid This Cheap-O
Review: Avoid, always hear feedback

Title: Not worth buying
Review: Not happy with product the balls came off and could not be put on will not buy this again very disappointing

Title: This is cute
Review: This is cute and the ear pods fit good in here

Title: Didn’t work at all lenses loose/broken.
Review: These didn’t work. Idk if they were damaged in shipping or what, but the lenses were loose or something. I could see half a lens with its edge in the frame and the rest was missing. It looked like it came loose or was broken.

Title: Easily removed
Review: I was hopeful but it didn’t last. I tried two different times to apply the lipstick hoping I hadn’t waited long enough the first time but each time it was applied it was easily wiped off, transferred to my cup.

Title: Nice Material, But Does Wrinkle
Review: I ordered my actual size rather than ordering up or down. I've had other Amazon Essential clothing items and their sizing seems to be pretty accurate. I currently wear a size XL or 16 in women's sizing. The sleeves on this shirt were too tight that I couldn't even get the shirt on to see about the rest of the fit. Other than the sizing, the shirts seems to be okay. The material is nice, but it does wrinkle as one might expect from oxford cloth. Buttons are securely attached. Seams are fine.

Title: Manufacturers defect and terrible customer support.
Review: Just brought this TV in March and the panel is screwed. Turns out it's a manufacturers defect. Trying to get this TV replaced or repaired has been HELL!  I had been calling support since March and finally got through at the end of July. I've been transferred to 3 different departments just to get the exchange finalized. No one has made any effort to contact me about when or how this exchange will take place. Terrible!

Title: This is a tricky straightener to use but it works; best on long hair Review: I have short to medium fine curly hair and this straightener is difficult to use on that length hair. It is best for longer hair because one has to get the strands to seat between the tines in the the ironing comb.

I used on dry hair (hair needs to be dry, per the instructions). I then set this to about 280 degrees. There is no degree setting that is readable on the handle. It only has a marker for the lowest setting at 265 degrees and the highest setting at 365 degrees Fahrenheit (or 130 to 200 Celsuis).

Once the light stopped blinking to let me know the temperature had been reached, I tried to use this like a comb to comb it through my hair. That DOES NOT WORK as it does not grip the hair. Instead I had to thread my hair into the comb by pulling it away from my scalp and laying the comb over my strands to get it between the tines. Once I did that, the straightening power was great.

If it were not so tricky to use, I would highly recommend this. However, it does take some getting use to.

Title: soap pumps
Review: I purchased these to use with my shampoo and conditioner.  First, forget the twist on funnel as it's just easier to pour or squeeze your product into the bottle.  Then, the pump action... the conditioner actually comes out fairly well.  But the shampoo - you have to pump down and pull up the nozzle to get a tiny bit out.  Hmmm.. * note - I tried several different types of shampoo and even hand soap.  I really wanted to be able to quick pump a couple of squirts of shampoo one handed... that is not going to happen with these.  The funnel can be used with thinner fluids and is hard sided... so you need to be able to screw it on to a bottle you're planning to use or hold it.  It's got a pretty good opening- about 3/4" eyeballing it. The bottles are clear plastic, as are the pumps - with metal inner spring.  All it all I am going to use what I have but I am going to keep looking for an effective pump action bottle.  I may have expected too much out of these.  I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.  Hope this helps!

Title: Just Awful
Review: I purchased this product to use as a moisturizing hair milk. I don't know if it doesn't play well with other products or if my hair just doesn't like the ingredients. It left residue in my hair and made it really dull (lacking shine). Also my hair felt kind of crispy. My wash day was ruined because of this product. I hate waste, but I'm throwing this stuff away immediately! The only good thing about it is the pleasant coconut scent.

Title: Worked as described
Review: Put these in for my 2021 Sienna sliding door speakers because the aftermarket 3.5" speakers had too much bass and were rattling the panel. This is the perfect frequency, blocker. Still allowed the mids without the bass rattle.

Title: Conditioner creamy but do not like aroma & left shower floor slippery; love dispenser
Review: I have short to medium fine curly hair and wanted to try this on me. Unfortunately, it's just okay. The condition is creamy and hydrating with being too relaxing but it left my shower floor very slippery. I also dislike the fragranceThe only thing I really loved was the dispenser as pressing down on the top pops up the top.

Title: Didn’t work for me
Review: It made me stink

Title: Okay
Review: These are were a little loose on my head... but they are very cool and a little retro, although a little too large for true retro.

Title: Too sticky
Review: Too sticky too like there's cotton candy in my hair! Yuck!

Title: Eh
Review: It's not worth the price. Isn't as good as a bristle brush.

Title: Gives legs nice appearance
Review: I use these as part of a dance team costume and I like the way they look.  I'm 5'-3.5" and 125lbs. The Small/Medium fit fine.  The band waist band is not too tight.  My only complaint is that the foot pad extents to the sides of my foot and it's visible when wearing strappy shoes.

Title: Not good for the 7 port hub
Review: Don't know if it is the actual power supply or not but blew my 7port hub (which supposedly it was designed for according to amazon add).  It was listed as new but it didn't come in any packaging so maybe I just got taken for a ride.

Title: My neck feels moisturized & a tad bit firmer but not much better than my face cream; too $$$
Review: I applied this medium-weight scentless cream to my neck after my shower. My neck felt moisturized and only a little bit firmer than usual. However, I always apply my face creams to my neck and did not find too much difference between that and this other than the slight firmness. To me this is not worth the $60 price tag.

Title: Sturdy chain
Review: Nice necklace

Title: Failure
Review: One has failed.  Worse, for some reason the plug will insert only into some USP ports.

Title: Protects as it's supposed to.
Review: Works perfectly for my son's Chromebook and he is able to fit everything he needs for his chemistry class in with it.

Title: Good Quality Knit Material; Unfeminine Wide Elastic Waistband
Review: These TOMMY HILFIGER WOMEN'S BASIC LOGO PAJAMA PANTS (size medium) are made from comfortable, good-quality knit fabric.  However, the medium size is a little large for a 5' 3" size 8-10 like myself.  The waistband is too loose, and the legs need to be shortened by at least an inch to be wearable (even as pajamas).  Also, I don't care for the wide elastic band at the waist, which reminds me of men's boxing shorts, and doesn't feel at all feminine.

Title: Great men's night moisturizing serum!
Review: My husband has never been anywhere near a metro-sexual male, worry about skin or hair care. As he has now approached age 60, he is finally starting to come around to seeing how important it is to take care of your skin. This night serum is great. A simple wash of his face before bedtime and an application of this Tieso is all it takes. He has been using it for almost a month now and I can see a difference in his skin. It looks refreshed and smoother and I think he is waking up looking more refreshed every morning. A little goes a long way and it is absorbed quickly in his skin. Highly recommend!

Title: “Tissue-sized” wipes that are as strong as baby wipes but they are dry; they hold up well when wet Review: There are two packs of 50 tissues each for a total of 100 tissues.

They look and almost feel exactly like unscented tissues. However, they perform very well. These are strong and hold up when wet to pick up messes, clean urine off a litter pan, etc. They are perfect for cleaning a baby's bottom or pet's bottom as well. I use these to clean my cat's urine off the walls of the litter pan but I wet the wipe first. They can be used to remove make-up with soap and water.

These are expensive. At the current price of $20.99 it comes to $.21 cents per wipe, which is about $.17 cents more than wet baby wipes can be purchased for. Note that the first wipe is difficult to remove from the box because each box is so tightly packed. The high price is the only reason I lowered my ranking.

Title: protection
Review: ordered by accident and tried to get a refund to no avail

Title: Smaller Than Expected
Review: I ordered these for an upcoming trip. I didn't pay attention to the measurements given. They ended up being smaller than I expected. I was hoping for the larger of the two (the medium one) to be quart sized for my toiletries, but it's smaller than the quart sized bags. Since I can only take one quart bag filled with my liquids, I want to go with the largest that falls within the maximum measurements. So the sizing issue is really my fault because I didn't pay attention when ordering. However, the quality of the bags is just mediocre. The plastic is thinner than I anticipated. It's also stiff and it was difficult to reshape it. The zippers seem weak and I'm not sure how long they will last. Overall, the bags are okay, but not great.

Title: Broken at 3 mo.
Review: It’s terrible that this is the shortest lasting lightning cable we’ve ever purchased. I really liked these up till day. Now it has to be professionally extracted. Such a waste of time over a cheap piece of… Dot. Time is money, go buy something decent not this.

Title: ... sometime fall off kind of not strong enough but like it
Review: It okay but back of sometime fall off kind of not strong enough but like it

Title: Attractive, but???
Review: The product looks like the listing photo.  However it is made from thin material with no body or warmth.  Promoting it as a sweatshirt is very misleading.

Title: ... night my feet are so smooth I would highly recommend it!
Review: This worked after the first night my feet are so smooth I would highly recommend it!

Title: Bulky mesh puffs whose puffiest section creates copious suds Review: Mesh buff puffs are the only thing I use in the shower besides a back brush. I love them because they generate a lot of suds and they provide good coverage during showering. The full mesh area is similar to the ones I buy except these have an extra section or sections to look like a Christmas tree and snowman.

The Christmas tree loofah is actually a stretchy back puff. The other one is the regular puff. Both work but they are a bit bulky to use. I like the snowman one the best because I can use the top part as a handle while washing with the lower puff. After trying these, this is okay but not ones I would ever order again.

The current price of $8.59 comes to an expensive $4.30 each puff.

Title: Pretty cap; well-padded; does not stretch; will work for a child Review: I love the color of this cap. The exterior is waterproof and the interior feels like it is made of soft fleece. It is certainly a beautiful cap but I cannot use it. The sizing is more for a child because even though the band around the cap has a little stretch, the stitching holding that band in place DOES NOT stretch. I had a hard time getting this comfortably over my head.

If the bottom stretched so adults could use this comfortably, then this would have received 5 stars from me at the current price of $9.99.

Title: Tray only slides from one side Review: I ordered this 2 pack thinking I could put them side by side with the storage pockets on the outside on each side ...

Technically, you CAN still do this... if you don't mind not using one off the center paper drawers.... because the drawer only slides out one way/side.

To be able to use both drawers, you would have to deal with the gap between the risers for the side storage pocket... which if you have small monitors (like I do), this will not work well .

Title: Blech
Review: A bunch of keys just stopped working after only having it for 2 weeks.  Poor quality.  Not even work the 29.99 I paid for it.

Title: Although the purple one was great! Also
Review: Quality was not the same as the purple shirt by the same name.  The labels were different, so I believe they did a shell game on me.  Never buying from them again.  Although the purple one was great!  Also, it was wrinkled and not in original packaging like the purple shirt.

Title: Quality has went way down
Review: I always use these files and I was extremely disappointed at how horrible they are. There is literally no grit on any of the sides and it was just a giant waste of money. Don't buy!

Title: I love Tom's toothpaste but...
Review: I love Tom's toothpaste BUT, I didn't realize they had multiple flavors.  "Fennel" flavor was sent and it is horrible.  I reordered Peppermint and I'm very happy with the product.  I do not recommend "Fennel" flavor...it's gross.

Title: Cheaply made
Review: Looks trashy and cheaply made

Title: Nice little camera
Review: Great for keeping an eye on your pets without the eyesore of a camera.

Title: Shampoo lathers & strips my hair clean but stinks; conditioner hydrates & smells nice Review: I have short to medium-length fine curly hair. This shampoo lathers and cleans well and leaves my hair squeaky clean. The conditioner hydrates well. The fragrance of the shampoo is absolutely repulsive to me. The fragrance of the conditioner is subtly nice and fresh.

As to its ability to thicken hair, I will not be using it again because I cannot stand the shampoo. Yes it is for men but I use men's products and women can use this too.

The current price of $19.91 ($24.89 minus 20%) is competitively priced for this as it comes to $9.96 per 8-ounce bottle. Not each bottle comes with a snap up cap and a pump.

Title: Broke right away
Review: The zipper broke within less than a minute of me wearing it

Title: Cute but hat is small
Review: Cute! I ordered a 6-12 month outfit for my almost 6 month old. The top and pants fit perfect!! The hat is too small- left a red line in his head and he has a smaller than average head so the hat clearly runs a bit small. Very soft fabric though and already washed and dried it twice and the decals look good.

Title: Large but cute
Review: Not very soft. Cute pattern but large for the size. Wish the pants had pockets too!

Title: This fragrance is too intense for my senses Review: I love trying new fragrances and often buy them at TJX, Marshalls, and Home Goods without knowing what they smell like. I usually choose the high-end names. I purchased a 1.6 ounce bottle for $24.99 at Marshalls.

The scent is strong and smells like something from the 1920's (like my grandmother wore). For me its okay but not a scent I would buy again simply because it is too intense.

Title: fast dry nail treatment
Review: This works fairly well... but maybe not quite as fast as advertised.  That being said, it does make it easier to move on than without.  I like it - will continue to use it.  Super easy.  Paint your nails - let that dry at least a couple of minutes.  Then use the dropper - and drop from your cuticle to the tip of your nail and let that dry for another couple of minutes.  You're good to go.  Just to be fair, I paint with clear nail strengther - so it's pretty forgiving.  I still think these drops would help cut down the time you wait for sure.

Title: Great sunblock - a little greasy, but does the job
Review: Slightly oily (why I rated it 4 stars), but it is light. Needed to wait a bit before applying my foundation (to assure it was absorbed in). Works well, love that it is an SPF50 for my face. Lasted hours while I was outside (used this on a cruise where the sun was brutal). This bottle will last a long time as a little goes a long way.

Title: Not as advertised
Review: Not easy to use. Ripped one trying to open it initially, I guess I didn’t zip it back and forth enough???  Did protect clothes.

Title: BEWARE!!!!!!......Cheap product.....DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!
Review: Fell apart after only being worn a few times.......Cheaply made product......DO NOT BUY!!!!!!!!

Title: Not for big heads.
Review: If you have above average sized head, it will fit but won't stay over your ears.  It will keep wanting to ride off.  Super annoying and cold in with winter.

Title: Beautiful and comfy
Review: Love everything about these slippers.  Very comfortable.

Title: Perfect!!!
Review: Comfy and pretty... they are perfect! True to size

Title: Revlon quality eyebrow liner
Review: Nice eyebrow pencil, but it is fairly thin and not the way I typically like a brow marker to be. Might work for others and I really like Revlon products so I am rating this as 4 stars. Color is really nice (soft brown) and it does cover well, just because it is thin I need to apply several times to cover fully. Probably will work well for others.

Title: Didn't work for long
Review: The first one broke within about 2 weeks.  The replacement worked for a short time and now I get that dreaded message about it not being certified and doesn't charge my phone anymore.

Title: Dock extender - does not work
Review: Purchased the dock extender for my new iPhone 4S with an OtterBox Commuter case.  I have multiple radios with an iPhone dock.  With my previous iPhone 3GS with an OtterBox Commuter case, I could just dock it on the radio.  Once docked, I could then charge my iPhone and also play songs/books from the iPhone through the radio speakers.  Also, the radio controls would operate my iPhone.  Apparently with my new iPhone 4S/case combination, caused it not to dock snuggly and not work with my iPhone docking radios.  I purchased the dock extender cable in anticipation that all would work as it did previously.  The cable appears to make a good connection and the iPhone make a sound when I plug it into the cable.  Unfortunately, the iPhone will no longer play through the radio nor will any of the radio controls work with the iPhone.  I guess I will have to look at getting a different type of docking radio.  Also, I tried a different dock extender cable from another Amazon vendor and it also did not work.

Title: Great Air Flow .. with a 2 cent power button Review: Love this case .. roomy nice airflow lots of bays
But then they go and put a lousy toggle switch for a power button on top ?
Horrible placement, and switch doesn't work 1/2 time
Great case less the cheap power button .. had to replace with my own power button

Amazing a 5k+ high end build was brought to a halt by a cheap power button !
Come on Phantek !

Title: It is awesome!!!
Review: This product was awesome and I would've kept it but it did not fit my Galaxy Buds2; Even though it implys that it will fit my type of case. It was too big for my earbuds case, unfortunately. I really liked it because it glows in the dark and was pink. Would've preferred a lavender or some sort of shade of purple that glowed in the dark though!

Title: An Okay Television
Review: Not a bad TV not a great TV. Needed for a bedroom where it's more used for company or background noise than for watching. That being said within the limited viewing angle the picture is reasonably good. For the money this suits our needs.

Title: When I say it works overnight, it does!  Deserves a 10 star rating!!!
Review: I really wish I had taken a before shot of my hands so you could see the difference this made.  I find that my hands are starting to become cracked and itchy because of both colder temps and that I am washing my hands a lot since the COVID crisis.  Since I received the items yesterday I immediately started using them because my hands were really suffering.  My hands were literally fixed overnight.  No more itching, no more redness, and they feel amazing.  I love that there is a day and night treatment.  Both work amazingly well and I would highly recommend to anyone looking to heal their poor tired hands.  If I could give it 10 stars, I would.  Thanks O'Keeffe's for your amazing products!!!

Title: Shampoo has almost ZERO lather but it’s moisturizing; fragrance OK; pump terrible to open Review: I ordered this shampoo and their [[ASIN:B0896V9PB1 combo pack]] at the same time and regretted it. I have short to medium fine curly hair and this left my hair conditioned but flat; I really dislike this. The fragrance is just okay. The current price of $39.57 is insane for this but I would not buy this at any price after trying this.

The shampoo almost has ZERO lather and feels like I am washing with a hand lotion. Their other shampoo was even worse. I did not even feel like this got my hair clean.

Also, it took me about 20 minutes of fiddling with the top (before I got in the shower), to open the pump. Once I got it open, I had to pump it about 9 times before the shampoo dispensed. I had high hopes for this shampoo but they have been dashed based on my results.

Title: The toe does not hold up as well as other PUMA socks Review: I always buy PUMA as it is good fit and value for
The money. However, these specific socks are not as strong at the toe as other puma socks

Title: pay Attention Review: It's an ok set but didn't have the size or type of bit i needed
for my project and became just an extra set to collect dust.

Title: Too tight cuz slim not wide but it fit !
Review: Like it but too tight and fit size good but need wide thanks

Title: Large barely fragrant bath bombs w/zero performance; purple/gold ones turn the water almost black Review: There are eight individually wrapped bath bombs in this set. They are lightly fragrant but not really pleasingly so.

I dissolved one purple/gold bomb in close to hot water and there were no suds created, only a fizzing action. The water immediately looked almost black and glittery (due to the gold). Since I personally do not like the color rings caused by bath bombs in my bath, I use them in a foot bath. One bath bomb dissolves in less than five minutes in close to hot water. The fragrance was barely detectable. I personally would never want to bathe with these. I am glad, however, that the color did not adhere to my skin, my foot bath, or my towels.

The current price of $15.99 comes to $2 per lackluster bath bomb. I'll pass on these as they are one of the worst bath bombs sets I ever tried.

Title: Great for hiking
Review: I wore this on a 7 mile hike up and down a mountain in the spring in the south - it was very comfortable, I felt cool and stayed dry. I did cut the stitches between the thumb hole and the hem - they just hold the seam closed, the seam itself is sewn separately so this enlarges the opening without damaging the seam. I would purchase another.

Title: Seemed ok, but not worth it overall Review: These switches work fine for awhile, but once I started to introduce TIVO devices into my network, these switches were nothing but problems. Since I switched out these switches, my entire network has stabilized and been faster,

Overall I cannot recommend these green switches as they seem to have issues with certain devices.

In the end .. switch quality does matter

Title: Really nice facial cleanser, great for sensitive and problem skin
Review: I have extremely sensitive, dry skin, exacerbated by some moderate psoriasis. I am always on the look out for skin products I can use which will not irritate my skin and will improve the overall appearance of my skin. When I saw this cleanser I wanted to try it and I am glad I did. First, I love the light (almost indistinguishable) fragrance and second I love how clean and fresh my skin feels after using it, removing all makeup. I have been using this twice daily exclusively for over 3 weeks and I can tell you that this is one of the finest products I have used on my face to date. I highly recommend!

Title: works, just a bulky applicator.
Review: the application was awkward and because it was effetely a giant rounded sponge, the color covered more area that I wanted.  However it stayed on and washed away in the next shampoo wash.  No odor and I wouldn't try sleep with it as it did smear on my hand after a workout - not sure how much you sweat when you sleep.  i think there are better applicators out there.

Title: Thin, not as soft as other shirts of this type, true to size; tag is annoying Review: I got this for me to wear as an undershirt. It is a nice shirt but is thin. It is imported from Argentina and is made of 100% polyester. The tags on the internal left side of the shirt are super annoying. I had to cut them out as they are about 6 inches in length and kept bothering me. Other that the lack of softness and annoying tags, this is a nice shirt.

I wash this in a lingerie bag and hang dry it.

Title: OK if you're a Roman Soldier
Review: Looks like a copper-colored hat. Sucks.

Title: I recommend to anyone with eczema or any sensitive skin issues!
Review: I have eczema and I am always looking for items that will not impact my skin. Body washes have tended to be very drying on my skin, causing it to peel and itch after using, so I had stopped using it. I was anxious to see how Dove did, since I do rely on them for alot of my skin needs. I can say that this body wash is great, my skin comes out soft and clean after using and I have no negative side effects. I now keep one in my shower and use this daily and I absolutely love it! Highly recommend!

Title: Works well
Review: Stays on well and the color is perfect. No tugging to put it on.

Title: Too dark for lite fair coloring. Review: This is too dark a color for my fair coloring. I tried just a small amount on my two fingers, and a little moisturizer also.
This did not spread creamy on my cheeks, and I thought my skin is a bit oily!

For me I looked like a little old lady with too much blush on with white skin.

Just not for me...
Although I think if you have darker color skin this would look good.
I usually use a pink color of blush..

Title: This is the color of wet cotton candy
Review: This is not the pale pink that's on the package. It's more dark pink. I thought it would be a light cotton candy pink but this is the color of the cotton candy after it gets wet. You know that deep pink cotton candy gets when its wet? Its that exact color. They lie and now I have to live with it. If you dont want a dark pink dont buy this.

Title: Bought these for a gift they were too small
Review: These socks were extremely thin and made for very thin feet for some reason, I bought them as a gift and they did not fit properly thankfully it was the only thing that didn't work out for us but I actually looked for the ones that looked bigger because of the person I was gifting this to and honestly I was a little let down because they looked so cool. When worn they looked way too tight and I think they are made way too thin even maybe for teenagers not fit for adult sizes.

Title: No Bluetooth!
Review: No Bluetooth?  What doesn’t have Bluetooth these days,  I realize this was a cheap tablet but come on.

Title: Wonderful skin protection for your body
Review: I need to start by saying I am 60 years old, live in Florida, and try to avoid sun exposure as much as possible (primarily to help minimize aging impacts). I have used CeraVe sunscreen for my face in the past, this is the first time I used the skin lotion. I love how smoothly it goes on, absorbs fairly quickly and does not leave a real greasy feeling on my skin. The 50 SPF factor is icing on the cake and helps my arms and legs (primarily exposed) stay protected even while I am out for hours. This is also fairly water resistant and I have tried it at the beach and it maintained its protection even after skin is wet (didn't immerse myself, just dipped my feet and legs). I love CeraVe as they make great products and are always competitively priced (much better than the designer skin protection and just as effective).

Title: There is no delete key! WTF?
Review: Akso, keyboard is not lighted.

Title: Meh, just to learn phrases to get by.
Review: You get what you pay for, and is just gives you so much.  Immersion? I don't think so whe pn you have experienced Rossetta Stone!  But if you want a cheap way of testing your language leanring abilities then this will suffice.  It goes through a series of exercise with repeating, but nothing interactive to give you feedback on how your pronouncement is good.  No text books, just listen and repeat.  Meh.  If you are really interested, I recommend the Rosetta Stone.

Title: Like the Results, But Not Crazy About the Application Method Review: This is definitely a unique acne spot treatment. I do like the list of ingredients that goes into making this. I am in my late 40's and still have to deal with acne. This does clear up my acne quickly.I have not had any issues with skin sensitivity with this product. Nor has it caused any excessive drying of my skin. The bottle says that there is cucumber fragrance, but all I can smell is the Isopropyl Alcohol. I am not a fan of the application method. Regular cotton swabs can't reach the bottom of the bottle. I am glad to see an expiration date on the product and it is easy to find, too! I have found that it's best to apply a nighttime. When it dries, it turns white, so when I've used it in the morning, I've had to deal with white spots.

*I was provided with this acne spot treatment for the purpose of trying it out & reviewing. My thoughts & opinions are my own.

Title: Really Thin
Review: I have a similar style bag for my toiletries. I liked the brush holder spots in this one and thought it might be good for makeup. The bag is a little smaller than my other which is fine, but the material is extremely thin and just feels cheap. The zippered netting compartment was very difficult to unzip and it wasn't easy to put items in. I was going to take it on vacation with us this past week, but in the middle of loading it with my items, I stopped and decided to use my old make up bag instead.

Title: Very very very not happy
Review: I booked you a v guess that's right to of date I've used them Mexican 10 time let's see there's chunks of Fountain missing the plastic has cracked in several places on numerous growler the thing opens up in the middle of the night and the phone goes one way and get stuck in your hair and somehow the plastic things and ends up like somewhere else you never seem to be able to find hello again if I do not hear from the vendor I will be asking them for a replacement for both of them because they are both in the same horrible condition and I don't like wasting money since I'm on SSI and we all know that they give you money that nobody could live on for a month not with rent bills food like cable groceries cell phone I will child who just has to have every video game system new computer and game under the sun

Title: Great
Review: Great brush! Both sides. No complaints.

Title: Poor quality
Review: Poor quality -Tore after first use and had scratches on my luggage

Title: Cute
Review: When my granddaughter comes over this is the show usually watch " the demon slayer"  When I got these stickers in gave them to her she was very excited. They are printed nice and clear.

Title: My new favorite way for eyeshadow!
Review: This was the first time using an eyeshadow stick, so I wasn't sure if I would like it. I found it incredibly easy to use (I used for under my brow line for contouring purposes. I loved this champagne color and the glitter (not too much, just right for my use. Color was great, consistency was great and it lasted me all day at work. I just ordered an additional one for my eyelid coloring. Highly recommend!

Title: I liked it at first
Review: I've had this for a couple months now. I liked it at first, but then the USB chargers on the bottom row stopped working.  It was one of the reasons I had bought it in the first place so I was pretty disappointed.  But then I realized that the plugs come out of the surge protector ALL THE TIME. I mean, I have to replug things in a few times a day.  They just sit there, half in, half out, which seems dangerous to me. I regret buying this. It looks cool, but then it just fizzled out after a couple months.

Title: Neat Idea!
Review: The Morse Code bracelets are a neat idea. I don't know the code, so I assume the code of the bracelet I received is correct. The bracelet itself is very thin, but seems to be sturdy enough. It is adjustable. It's a bit pricey for what it is though. Overall, it's okay.

Title: Nice mist spray. Scent is over whelming for me! Review: A Bigger nice looking bottle then I thought it was going to be.
Has a good fine mist sprayer.
You spray Happy Buddha oil on you body, and lightly rub it in.

I think the scent is too strong, it’s not my favorite, and last for a long time. I’m sneezing from this!
My Daughter liked the scent as my friend does.

My friend has a tattoo. When my friend sprayed this on her tattoo it looked fresh.
My hands feels smoother, but does not look smoother !

The more I use this, the more it bothers my throat, and my nose.
Maybe I’m allergic to this, which has never happened to me before!!
But the scent is too over whelming for me...

Title: Not what I was expecting but okay.
Review: it's a bit too big for my taste and arrived having a really strange smell, I can see myself wearing this for the outdoors or if I lived in a cabin far from the city but as it is I didn't quite like it as much. Comparing it to other similar dresses even though this is spring style I would say it's very disproportionate from the shape and sizing feels a bit off. Also just to note that it feels a lot like jean fabric almost too rough.

Title: Good Size!
Review: This is a good size backpack if you're looking for one that's not too large and not too small. It's larger than a mini back pack. It could be considered a smaller "full sized" one. My daughter is using a similar sized one for school this year. It is smaller than a lot of backpacks, but it does a decent job. She does find that with a bag this size, she can't keep unnecessary items in it! I was disappointed to see that this doesn't have any interior pockets. There is an outer zippered one, but none inside. I have a few other Tommy backpacks and I think they all have interior pockets. This bag is made of canvas. It's not very thick material. Overall, this is an okay bag, but not as nice as other Tommy bags I have seen.

Title: bad area for this type of
Review: Did not work as advertised  , bad area  for this type of antenna

Title: Smells great, doesn't last though
Review: Great scent but overall just a very average conditioner. Doesn't weight down or leave hair greasy looking, but also doesn't moisturize as well as it could.

Title: styrofoam head
Review: I bought a wig to wear for an event... Have never worn a wig before... so I thought this would be useful.  It is - for holding, styling the wig... *note: don't forget to "pin" the wig down before trying to style it. ...What would make it a five star?  Suction cups or weighting the bottom... or something to make it stand solidly.  It's super easy to knock over.  Just my thoughts.

Title: This is very easy to use.  Works great with Macbook Pro
Review: This docking station works great with the macbook pro.  Had no issues using it.  Recommended
